require('express');\nconst bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');\nconst crypto = require('crypto');\nconst jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');\nconst rateLimit = require('express-rate-limit');\nconst User = require('../models/User');\nconst { \n authenticate, \n rateLimitLogin, \n validateRefreshToken,\n logActivity \n} = require('../middleware/auth');\nconst { sendEmail } = require('../utils/email');\nconst { validateUserRegistration, validateUserLogin } = require('../utils/validation');\n\nconst router = express.Router();\n\n// Rate limiting\nconst authLimiter = rateLimit({\n windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes\n max: 5, // 5 attempts per window\n message: {\n success: false,\n message: 'Too many authentication attempts, please try again later.'\n },\n standardHeaders: true,\n legacyHeaders: false,\n});\n\nconst generalLimiter = rateLimit({\n windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes\n max: 100, // 100 requests per window\n message: {\n success: false,\n message: 'Too many requests, please try again later.'\n }\n});\n\n// Apply rate limiting to auth routes\nrouter.use('/login', authLimiter);\nrouter.use('/register', authLimiter);\nrouter.use('/forgot-password', authLimiter);\nrouter.use('/reset-password', authLimiter);\nrouter.use(generalLimiter);\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/register\n// @desc Register a new user\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/register', async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { error } = validateUserRegistration(req.body);\n if (error) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: error.details[0].message\n });\n }\n\n const { firstName, lastName, email, password, company, role } = req.body;\n\n // Check if user already exists\n const existingUser = await User.findByEmail(email);\n if (existingUser) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'User with this email already exists'\n });\n }\n\n // Create email verification token\n const emailVerificationToken = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n const emailVerificationExpires = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000); // 24 hours\n\n // Create user\n const user = new User({\n firstName,\n lastName,\n email,\n password,\n company,\n role: role || 'viewer',\n emailVerificationToken,\n emailVerificationExpires\n });\n\n await user.save();\n\n // Send verification email\n try {\n await sendEmail({\n to: user.email,\n subject: 'Verify Your Email - Cargo Shipment Tracker',\n template: 'emailVerification',\n data: {\n name: user.fullName,\n verificationUrl: `${process.env.FRONTEND_URL}/verify-email?token=${emailVerificationToken}`\n }\n });\n } catch (emailError) {\n console.error('Email sending error:', emailError);\n // Don't fail registration if email fails\n }\n\n res.status(201).json({\n success: true,\n message: 'User registered successfully. Please check your email to verify your account.',\n data: {\n user: {\n id: user._id,\n firstName: user.firstName,\n lastName: user.lastName,\n email: user.email,\n company: user.company,\n role: user.role\n }\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Registration error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during registration'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/login\n// @desc Login user\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/login', rateLimitLogin, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { error } = validateUserLogin(req.body);\n if (error) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: error.details[0].message\n });\n }\n\n const { email, password } = req.body;\n\n // Find user and include password for comparison\n const user = await User.findByEmail(email).select('+password');\n \n if (!user) {\n return res.status(401).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Invalid email or password'\n });\n }\n\n // Check if account is locked\n if (user.isLocked) {\n return res.status(423).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Account is temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts'\n });\n }\n\n // Check if account is active\n if (!user.isActive) {\n return res.status(401).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Account is deactivated. Please contact administrator.'\n });\n }\n\n // Verify password\n const isPasswordValid = await user.comparePassword(password);\n \n if (!isPasswordValid) {\n await user.incLoginAttempts();\n return res.status(401).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Invalid email or password'\n });\n }\n\n // Reset login attempts on successful login\n if (user.loginAttempts > 0) {\n await user.resetLoginAttempts();\n }\n\n // Update last login\n user.lastLogin = new Date();\n \n // Generate tokens\n const token = user.generateAuthToken();\n const refreshToken = user.generateRefreshToken();\n \n await user.save();\n\n // Log successful login\n await user.logActivity('login', { success: true }, req);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Login successful',\n data: {\n token,\n refreshToken,\n user: {\n id: user._id,\n firstName: user.firstName,\n lastName: user.lastName,\n fullName: user.fullName,\n email: user.email,\n company: user.company,\n role: user.role,\n permissions: user.permissions,\n isEmailVerified: user.isEmailVerified,\n lastLogin: user.lastLogin,\n profile: user.profile\n }\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Login error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during login'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/refresh-token\n// @desc Refresh access token\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/refresh-token', validateRefreshToken, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const user = req.user;\n const oldRefreshToken = req.refreshToken;\n\n // Generate new tokens\n const token = user.generateAuthToken();\n const refreshToken = user.generateRefreshToken();\n\n // Remove old refresh token\n user.revokeRefreshToken(oldRefreshToken);\n \n await user.save();\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Token refreshed successfully',\n data: {\n token,\n refreshToken,\n user: {\n id: user._id,\n firstName: user.firstName,\n lastName: user.lastName,\n fullName: user.fullName,\n email: user.email,\n company: user.company,\n role: user.role,\n permissions: user.permissions,\n isEmailVerified: user.isEmailVerified,\n profile: user.profile\n }\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Token refresh error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during token refresh'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/logout\n// @desc Logout user\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/logout', authenticate, logActivity('logout'), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { refreshToken } = req.body;\n \n if (refreshToken) {\n req.user.revokeRefreshToken(refreshToken);\n await req.user.save();\n }\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Logout successful'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Logout error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during logout'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/logout-all\n// @desc Logout from all devices\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/logout-all', authenticate, logActivity('logout_all'), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n req.user.revokeAllRefreshTokens();\n await req.user.save();\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Logged out from all devices successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Logout all error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during logout'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/verify-email\n// @desc Verify email address\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/verify-email', async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { token } = req.body;\n\n if (!token) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Verification token is required'\n });\n }\n\n const user = await User.findOne({\n emailVerificationToken: token,\n emailVerificationExpires: { $gt: Date.now() }\n });\n\n if (!user) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Invalid or expired verification token'\n });\n }\n\n user.isEmailVerified = true;\n user.emailVerificationToken = undefined;\n user.emailVerificationExpires = undefined;\n \n await user.save();\n\n await user.logActivity('email_verified', {}, req);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Email verified successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Email verification error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during email verification'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/forgot-password\n// @desc Send password reset email\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/forgot-password', async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { email } = req.body;\n\n if (!email) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Email is required'\n });\n }\n\n const user = await User.findByEmail(email);\n \n if (!user) {\n // Don't reveal if email exists or not\n return res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.'\n });\n }\n\n // Generate reset token\n const resetToken = crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');\n const passwordResetToken = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(resetToken).digest('hex');\n const passwordResetExpires = new Date(Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000); // 10 minutes\n\n user.passwordResetToken = passwordResetToken;\n user.passwordResetExpires = passwordResetExpires;\n \n await user.save();\n\n // Send reset email\n try {\n await sendEmail({\n to: user.email,\n subject: 'Password Reset - Cargo Shipment Tracker',\n template: 'passwordReset',\n data: {\n name: user.fullName,\n resetUrl: `${process.env.FRONTEND_URL}/reset-password?token=${resetToken}`\n }\n });\n } catch (emailError) {\n console.error('Password reset email error:', emailError);\n user.passwordResetToken = undefined;\n user.passwordResetExpires = undefined;\n await user.save();\n \n return res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error sending password reset email'\n });\n }\n\n await user.logActivity('password_reset_requested', {}, req);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Password reset link sent to your email'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Forgot password error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during password reset request'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/auth/reset-password\n// @desc Reset password\n// @access Public\nrouter.post('/reset-password', async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { token, password } = req.body;\n\n if (!token || !password) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Token and new password are required'\n });\n }\n\n // Hash the token to compare with stored hash\n const passwordResetToken = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(token).digest('hex');\n\n const user = await User.findOne({\n passwordResetToken,\n passwordResetExpires: { $gt: Date.now() }\n });\n\n if (!user) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Invalid or expired reset token'\n });\n }\n\n // Set new password\n user.password = password;\n user.passwordResetToken = undefined;\n user.passwordResetExpires = undefined;\n \n // Revoke all refresh tokens for security\n user.revokeAllRefreshTokens();\n \n await user.save();\n\n await user.logActivity('password_reset_completed', {}, req);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Password reset successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Reset password error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error during password reset'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/auth/me\n// @desc Get current user\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/me', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n user: {\n id: req.user._id,\n firstName: req.user.firstName,\n lastName: req.user.lastName,\n fullName: req.user.fullName,\n email: req.user.email,\n company: req.user.company,\n role: req.user.role,\n permissions: req.user.permissions,\n isEmailVerified: req.user.isEmailVerified,\n lastLogin: req.user.lastLogin,\n profile: req.user.profile,\n createdAt: req.user.createdAt\n }\n }\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get user error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Server error'\n });\n }\n});\n\nmodule.exports = router;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"### 10. ","workspace_file_chunks":[]},{"status":"success","request_id":"26b37e5f-21c1-4943-9bcf-3a04835510c4","request_message":"","structured_output_nodes":[{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## **Phase 2: Authentication & Authorization System - COMPLETED!**

I've successfully implemented a comprehensive enterprise-grade authentication and authorization system! Here's what we've built:

### ✅ **Authentication Features Completed:**

1. ** JWT-Based Authentication**
 - Access tokens (15 min expiry) and refresh tokens (7 days)
 - Automatic token refresh with axios interceptors
 - Secure token storage and management

2. ** User Registration & Login**
 - Professional login/register forms with Material-UI
 - Email verification system
 - Password strength validation
 - Account lockout after failed attempts

3. ** Password Security**
 - Bcrypt hashing with salt rounds
 - Password reset via email
 - Strong password requirements
 - Password change functionality

4. **️ Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)**
 - **Admin**: Full system access, user management, system settings
 - **Operator**: Create/edit shipments, update statuses, view analytics
 - **Viewer**: Read-only access to shipments and reports

5. ** Permission-Based Authorization**
 - Granular permissions: `create_shipment`, `edit_shipment`, `delete_shipment`, `view_analytics`, `manage_users`, `system_settings`
 - Protected routes and components
 - Higher-order components for protection

6. ** Security Features**
 - Rate limiting on auth endpoints
 - Account lockout after failed attempts
 - Audit logging for user activities
 - IP address and user agent tracking
 - Refresh token rotation

7. ** Email Integration**
 - Email verification for new accounts
 - Password reset emails
 - Professional email templates

8. ** Protected Routes**
 - Route-level protection
 - Component-level protection
 - Role and permission-based access
 - Graceful error handling

### ️ **Architecture Highlights:**

**Frontend:**
- Redux store for auth state management
- Axios interceptors for automatic token handling
- Professional UI components with animations
- Form validation and error handling
- Loading states and user feedback

**Backend:**
- Mongoose models with advanced features
- JWT middleware with comprehensive validation
- Rate limiting and security hardening
- Audit logging and activity tracking
- Email service integration ready

**Security:**
- OWASP security best practices
- Input validation and sanitization
- Secure password handling
- Token rotation and revocation
- Account protection mechanisms

### **Files Created:**

**Frontend:**
- `src/services/authService.js` - Authentication service
- `src/store/authSlice.js` - Redux auth state
- `src/components/auth/LoginForm.js` - Professional login
- `src/components/auth/RegisterForm.js` - Registration with validation
- `src/components/auth/ProtectedRoute.js` - Route protection
- `src/utils/validation.js` - Comprehensive validation utilities

**Backend:**
- `models/User.js` - Advanced user model
- `middleware/auth.js` - Authentication middleware
- `routes/auth.routes.js` - Authentication endpoints

### **Ready for Phase 3: Advanced Functionality**

The authentication system is now ready to support:
- Real-time WebSocket connections with user authentication
- Role-based data filtering
- User activity tracking and analytics
- Advanced reporting with user permissions
- Multi-tenant support if needed

Would you like me to continue with **Phase 3: Advanced Functionality** which includes:
- Real-time WebSocket features
- Advanced reporting system
- PDF generation
- Email notifications
- Enhanced shipment tracking

Or would you prefer to test the current authentication system first?

 1	const express = require('express');
 2	const mongoose = require('mongoose');
 3	const cors = require('cors');
 4	require('dotenv').config();
 5	
 6	const app = express();
 7	
 8	app.use(cors());
 9	app.use(express.json());
 10	
 11	// Connect to MongoDB
 12	mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/cargo-tracker', {
 13	 useNewUrlParser: true,
 14	 useUnifiedTopology: true
 15	});
 16	
 17	const db = mongoose.connection;
 18	db.on('error', console.error.bind(console, 'connection error:'));
 19	db.once('open', () => {
 20	 console.log('Connected to MongoDB');
 21	});
 22	
 23	// Routes will be added here
 24	app.use('/api', require('./routes/shipment.routes'));

 26	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;

 1	const router = require('express').Router();
 2	const Shipment = require('../models/Shipment');
 3	
 4	// Get all shipments
 5	router.get('/shipments', async (req, res) => {
 6	 try {
 7	 const shipments = await Shipment.find();
 8	 res.json(shipments);
 9	 } catch (error) {
 10	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 11	 }
 12	});
 13	
 14	// Get specific shipment
 15	router.get('/shipment/:id', async (req, res) => {
 16	 try {
 17	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 18	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 19	 res.json(shipment);
 20	 } catch (error) {
 21	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 22	 }
 23	});
 24	
 25	// Create new shipment
 26	router.post('/shipment', async (req, res) => {
 27	 const shipment = new Shipment(req.body);
 28	 try {
 29	 const newShipment = await shipment.save();
 30	 res.status(201).json(newShipment);
 31	 } catch (error) {
 32	 res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
 33	 }
 34	});
 35	
 36	// Update shipment location
 37	router.post('/shipment/:id/update-location', async (req, res) => {
 38	 try {
 39	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 40	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 41	
 42	 shipment.currentLocation = {
 43	 location: req.body.location,
 44	 coordinates: req.body.coordinates,
 45	 timestamp: new Date()
 46	 };
 47	
 48	 const updatedShipment = await shipment.save();
 49	 res.json(updatedShipment);
 50	 } catch (error) {
 51	 res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
 52	 }
 53	});
 54	
 55	// Get shipment ETA
 56	router.get('/shipment/:id/eta', async (req, res) => {
 57	 try {
 58	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 59	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 60	 res.json({ eta: shipment.eta });
 61	 } catch (error) {
 62	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 63	 }
 64	});
 65	
 66	module.exports = router;

 1	import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
 2	import axios from 'axios';
 3	
 4	const API_URL = 'http://localhost:5000/api';
 5	
 6	export const fetchShipments = createAsyncThunk(
 7	 'shipments/fetchShipments',
 8	 async () => {
 9	 const response = await axios.get(`${API_URL}/shipments`);
 10	 return response.data;
 11	 }
 12	);
 13	
 14	export const updateShipmentLocation = createAsyncThunk(
 15	 'shipments/updateLocation',
 16	 async ({ id, location, coordinates }) => {
 17	 const response = await axios.post(`${API_URL}/shipment/${id}/update-location`, {
 18	 location,
 19	 coordinates
 20	 });
 21	 return response.data;
 22	 }
 23	);
 24	
 25	const shipmentSlice = createSlice({
 26	 name: 'shipments',
 27	 initialState: {
 28	 items: [],
 29	 status: 'idle',
 30	 error: null
 31	 },
 32	 reducers: {},
 33	 extraReducers: (builder) => {
 34	 builder
 35	 .addCase(fetchShipments.pending, (state) => {
 36	 state.status = 'loading';
 37	 })
 38	 .addCase(fetchShipments.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 39	 state.status = 'succeeded';
 40	 state.items = action.payload;
 41	 })
 42	 .addCase(fetchShipments.rejected, (state, action) => {
 43	 state.status = 'failed';
 44	 state.error = action.error.message;
 45	 })
 46	 .addCase(updateShipmentLocation.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 47	 const index = state.items.findIndex(item => item._id === action.payload._id);
 48	 if (index !== -1) {
 49	 state.items[index] = action.payload;
 50	 }
 51	 });
 52	 }
 53	});
 54	
 55	export default shipmentSlice.reducer;

 1	import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
 2	import { useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';
 3	import { fetchShipments } from '../store/shipmentSlice';
 4	import { 
 5	 Table, 
 6	 TableBody, 
 7	 TableCell, 
 8	 TableContainer, 
 9	 TableHead, 
 10	 TableRow, 
 11	 Paper,
 12	 Button,
 13	 TextField,
 14	 Box,
 15	 Typography,
 16	 Chip,
 17	 CircularProgress
 18	} from '@mui/material';
 19	import AddShipmentForm from './AddShipmentForm';
 20	import ShipmentDetails from './ShipmentDetails';
 21	import AddIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Add';
 22	import SearchIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Search';
 23	
 24	const ShipmentDashboard = () => {
 25	 const dispatch = useDispatch();
 26	 const shipments = useSelector(state => state.shipments.items);
 27	 const status = useSelector(state => state.shipments.status);
 28	 const [openAddForm, setOpenAddForm] = useState(false);
 29	 const [filterText, setFilterText] = useState('');
 30	 const [selectedShipment, setSelectedShipment] = useState(null);
 31	
 32	 useEffect(() => {
 33	 if (status === 'idle') {
 34	 dispatch(fetchShipments());
 35	 }
 36	 }, [status, dispatch]);
 37	
 38	 const filteredShipments = shipments.filter(shipment =>
 39	 shipment.containerId.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase()) ||
 40	 shipment.status.toLowerCase().includes(filterText.toLowerCase())
 41	 );
 42	
 43	 const getStatusColor = (status) => {
 44	 switch(status.toLowerCase()) {
 45	 case 'in transit': return 'primary';
 46	 case 'delivered': return 'success';
 47	 case 'delayed': return 'error';
 48	 default: return 'default';
 49	 }
 50	 };
 51	
 52	 if (status === 'loading') {
 53	 return (
 54	 <Box display="flex" justifyContent="center" alignItems="center" minHeight="400px">
 55	 <CircularProgress />
 56	 </Box>
 57	 );
 58	 }
 59	
 60	 return (
 61	 <Box>
 62	 <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mb: 4 }}>
 63	 <Typography variant="h4" component="h1" sx={{ fontWeight: 500 }}>
 64	 Shipments Dashboard
 65	 </Typography>
 66	 <Button 
 67	 variant="contained" 
 68	 color="primary"
 69	 startIcon={<AddIcon />}
 70	 onClick={() => setOpenAddForm(true)}
 71	 >
 72	 Add New Shipment
 73	 </Button>
 74	 </Box>
 75	
 76	 <Paper sx={{ p: 2, mb: 3 }}>
 77	 <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mb: 2 }}>
 78	 <SearchIcon sx={{ color: 'action.active', mr: 1 }} />
 79	 <TextField
 80	 fullWidth
 81	 label="Search shipments"
 82	 variant="outlined"
 83	 size="small"
 84	 value={filterText}
 85	 onChange={(e) => setFilterText(e.target.value)}
 86	 />
 87	 </Box>
 88	
 89	 <TableContainer>
 90	 <Table>
 91	 <TableHead>
 92	 <TableRow>
 93	 <TableCell><Typography fontWeight="bold">Container ID</Typography></TableCell>
 94	 <TableCell><Typography fontWeight="bold">Current Location</Typography></TableCell>
 95	 <TableCell><Typography fontWeight="bold">Status</Typography></TableCell>
 96	 <TableCell><Typography fontWeight="bold">ETA</Typography></TableCell>
 97	 <TableCell><Typography fontWeight="bold">Actions</Typography></TableCell>
 98	 </TableRow>
 99	 </TableHead>
 100	 <TableBody>
 101	 {filteredShipments.map((shipment) => (
 102	 <TableRow key={shipment._id} hover>
 103	 <TableCell>{shipment.containerId}</TableCell>
 104	 <TableCell>{shipment.currentLocation.location}</TableCell>
 105	 <TableCell>
 106	 <Chip 
 107	 label={shipment.status} 
 108	 color={getStatusColor(shipment.status)}
 109	 size="small"
 110	 />
 111	 </TableCell>
 112	 <TableCell>{new Date(shipment.eta).toLocaleDateString()}</TableCell>
 113	 <TableCell>
 114	 <Button
 115	 variant="outlined"
 116	 size="small"
 117	 onClick={() => setSelectedShipment(shipment)}
 118	 >
 119	 View Details
 120	 </Button>
 121	 </TableCell>
 122	 </TableRow>
 123	 ))}
 124	 </TableBody>
 125	 </Table>
 126	 </TableContainer>
 127	 </Paper>
 128	
 129	 <AddShipmentForm open={openAddForm} onClose={() => setOpenAddForm(false)} />
 130	 <ShipmentDetails
 131	 open={!!selectedShipment}
 132	 onClose={() => setSelectedShipment(null)}
 133	 shipment={selectedShipment}
 134	 />
 135	 </Box>
 136	 );
 137	};
 138

 1	import React, { useState } from 'react';
 2	import axios from 'axios';
 3	import { useDispatch } from 'react-redux';
 4	import { fetchShipments } from '../store/shipmentSlice';
 5	import {
 6	 Dialog,
 7	 DialogTitle,
 8	 DialogContent,
 9	 DialogActions,
 10	 TextField,
 11	 Button,
 12	 Grid,
 13	 MenuItem
 14	} from '@mui/material';
 15	
 16	const API_URL = 'http://localhost:5000/api';
 17	
 18	const AddShipmentForm = ({ open, onClose }) => {
 19	 const dispatch = useDispatch();
 20	 const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
 21	 containerId: '',
 22	 route: [
 23	 {
 24	 location: '',
 25	 coordinates: { lat: '', lng: '' }
 26	 }
 27	 ],
 28	 currentLocation: {
 29	 location: '',
 30	 coordinates: { lat: '', lng: '' }
 31	 },
 32	 status: 'pending',
 33	 eta: ''
 34	 });
 35	
 36	 const handleChange = (e) => {
 37	 const { name, value } = e.target;
 38	 if (name.includes('.')) {
 39	 const [parent, child] = name.split('.');
 40	 setFormData(prev => ({
 41	 ...prev,
 42	 [parent]: {
 43	 ...prev[parent],
 44	 [child]: value
 45	 }
 46	 }));
 47	 } else {
 48	 setFormData(prev => ({
 49	 ...prev,
 50	 [name]: value
 51	 }));
 52	 }
 53	 };
 54	
 55	 const handleCoordinatesChange = (type, coord, value) => {
 56	 setFormData(prev => ({
 57	 ...prev,
 58	 [type]: {
 59	 ...prev[type],
 60	 coordinates: {
 61	 ...prev[type].coordinates,
 62	 [coord]: value
 63	 }
 64	 }
 65	 }));
 66	 };
 67	
 68	 const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
 69	 e.preventDefault();
 70	 try {
 71	 await axios.post(`${API_URL}/shipment`, formData);
 72	 dispatch(fetchShipments()); // Refresh the shipments list
 73	 onClose();
 74	 } catch (error) {
 75	 console.error('Error creating shipment:', error);
 76	 }
 77	 };
 78	
 79	 return (
 80	 <Dialog open={open} onClose={onClose} maxWidth="md" fullWidth>
 81	 <DialogTitle>Add New Shipment</DialogTitle>
 82	 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
 83	 <DialogContent>
 84	 <Grid container spacing={2}>
 85	 <Grid item xs={12}>
 86	 <TextField
 87	 fullWidth
 88	 label="Container ID"
 89	 name="containerId"
 90	 value={formData.containerId}
 91	 onChange={handleChange}
 92	 required
 93	 />
 94	 </Grid>
 95	
 96	 <Grid item xs={12}>
 97	 <TextField
 98	 fullWidth
 99	 label="Current Location"
 100	 name="currentLocation.location"
 101	 value={formData.currentLocation.location}
 102	 onChange={handleChange}
 103	 required
 104	 />
 105	 </Grid>
 106	
 107	 <Grid item xs={6}>
 108	 <TextField
 109	 fullWidth
 110	 label="Current Location Latitude"
 111	 type="number"
 112	 value={formData.currentLocation.coordinates.lat}
 113	 onChange={(e) => handleCoordinatesChange('currentLocation', 'lat', e.target.value)}
 114	 required
 115	 />
 116	 </Grid>
 117	
 118	 <Grid item xs={6}>
 119	 <TextField
 120	 fullWidth
 121	 label="Current Location Longitude"
 122	 type="number"
 123	 value={formData.currentLocation.coordinates.lng}
 124	 onChange={(e) => handleCoordinatesChange('currentLocation', 'lng', e.target.value)}
 125	 required
 126	 />
 127	 </Grid>
 128	
 129	 <Grid item xs={12}>
 130	 <TextField
 131	 fullWidth
 132	 select
 133	 label="Status"
 134	 name="status"
 135	 value={formData.status}
 136	 onChange={handleChange}
 137	 required
 138	 >
 139	 <MenuItem value="pending">Pending</MenuItem>
 140	 <MenuItem value="in-transit">In Transit</MenuItem>
 141	 <MenuItem value="delivered">Delivered</MenuItem>
 142	 <MenuItem value="delayed">Delayed</MenuItem>
 143	 </TextField>
 144	 </Grid>
 145	
 146	 <Grid item xs={12}>
 147	 <TextField
 148	 fullWidth
 149	 label="ETA"
 150	 type="datetime-local"
 151	 name="eta"
 152	 value={formData.eta}
 153	 onChange={handleChange}
 154	 InputLabelProps={{ shrink: true }}
 155	 required
 156	 />
 157	 </Grid>
 158	 </Grid>
 159	 </DialogContent>
 160	 <DialogActions>
 161	 <Button onClick={onClose}>Cancel</Button>
 162	 <Button type="submit" variant="contained" color="primary">
 163	 Add Shipment
 164	 </Button>
 165	 </DialogActions>
 166	 </form>
 167	 </Dialog>
 168	 );
 169	};
 170	
 171	export default AddShipmentForm;

 1	import React from 'react';
 2	import { MapContainer, TileLayer, Marker, Popup, Polyline } from 'react-leaflet';
 3	import 'leaflet/dist/leaflet.css';
 4	import L from 'leaflet';
 5	
 6	// Fix for default marker icon
 7	delete L.Icon.Default.prototype._getIconUrl;
 8	L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions({
 9	 iconRetinaUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-icon-2x.png'),
 10	 iconUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-icon.png'),
 11	 shadowUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-shadow.png'),
 12	});
 13	
 14	const ShipmentMap = ({ shipment, showRoute = false }) => {
 15	 const currentPosition = [shipment.currentLocation.coordinates.lat, shipment.currentLocation.coordinates.lng];
 16	 
 17	 // Create route coordinates array for the polyline
 18	 const routeCoordinates = showRoute 
 19	 ? shipment.route.map(stop => [stop.coordinates.lat, stop.coordinates.lng])
 20	 : [];
 21	
 22	 // Add current location to route
 23	 if (showRoute) {
 24	 routeCoordinates.push(currentPosition);
 25	 }
 26	
 27	 // Calculate bounds to fit all markers
 28	 const bounds = showRoute 
 29	 ? L.latLngBounds([currentPosition, ...routeCoordinates])
 30	 : L.latLngBounds([currentPosition]);
 31	
 32	 return (
 33	 <MapContainer 
 34	 bounds={bounds}
 35	 style={{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }}
 36	 >
 37	 <TileLayer
 38	 url="https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"
 39	 attribution='© <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors'
 40	 />
 41	 
 42	 {/* Current location marker */}
 43	 <Marker position={currentPosition}>
 44	 <Popup>
 45	 <strong>Current Location</strong><br />
 46	 {shipment.currentLocation.location}<br />
 47	 Status: {shipment.status}<br />
 48	 ETA: {new Date(shipment.eta).toLocaleDateString()}
 49	 </Popup>
 50	 </Marker>
 51	
 52	 {/* Route markers and polyline */}
 53	 {showRoute && (
 54	 <>
 55	 {shipment.route.map((stop, index) => (
 56	 <Marker 
 57	 key={index}
 58	 position={[stop.coordinates.lat, stop.coordinates.lng]}
 59	 >
 60	 <Popup>
 61	 <strong>Stop {index + 1}</strong><br />
 62	 {stop.location}<br />
 63	 Arrival: {new Date(stop.arrivalTime).toLocaleDateString()}
 64	 </Popup>
 65	 </Marker>
 66	 ))}
 67	 <Polyline 
 68	 positions={routeCoordinates}
 69	 color="blue"
 70	 weight={3}
 71	 opacity={0.7}
 72	 />
 73	 </>
 74	 )}
 75	 </MapContainer>
 76	 );
 77	};
 78	
 79	export default ShipmentMap;

 2	
 3	This is the frontend application for the Cargo Shipment Tracker system, built with React and Material-UI. It provides a user-friendly interface for tracking and managing cargo shipments in real-time.
 4	
 5	## Features
 6	
 7	- Interactive Dashboard
 8	 - Real-time shipment status updates
 9	 - Filterable shipment list
 10	 - Quick actions for shipment management
 11	
 12	- Map Integration
 13	 - Live shipment location tracking
 14	 - Interactive route visualization
 15	 - Marker clustering for multiple shipments
 16	
 17	- Shipment Management
 18	 - Add new shipments
 19	 - Update shipment status
 20	 - Track ETA and current location
 21	 - View detailed shipment information

 5	
 6	const app = express();

 8	app.use(cors());
 9	app.use(express.json());
 10	
 11	// Connect to MongoDB
 12	mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/cargo-tracker', {
 13	 useNewUrlParser: true,
 14	 useUnifiedTopology: true
 15	});
 16	
 17	const db = mongoose.connection;
 18	db.on('error', console.error.bind(console, 'connection error:'));
 19	db.once('open', () => {
 20	 console.log('Connected to MongoDB');
 21	});
 22	
 23	// Routes will be added here
 24	app.use('/api', require('./routes/shipment.routes'));
 25	
 26	const PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;
 27	app.listen(PORT, () => {
 28	 console.log(`Server is running on port ${PORT}`);
 29	});...

Path: src/store/shipmentSlice.js
 1	import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
 2	import axios from 'axios';
 3	
 4	const API_URL = 'http://localhost:5000/api';
 5	
 6	export const fetchShipments = createAsyncThunk(
 7	 'shipments/fetchShipments',
 8	 async () => {
 9	 const response = await axios.get(`${API_URL}/shipments`);
 10	 return response.data;
 11	 }
 12	);
 13	
 14	export const updateShipmentLocation = createAsyncThunk(
 15	 'shipments/updateLocation',
 16	 async ({ id, location, coordinates }) => {
 17	 const response = await axios.post(`${API_URL}/shipment/${id}/update-location`, {
 18	 location,
 19	 coordinates
 20	 });
 21	 return response.data;
 22	 }
 23	);
 24	
 25	const shipmentSlice = createSlice({
 26	 name: 'shipments',
 27	 initialState: {
 28	 items: [],
 29	 status: 'idle',
 30	 error: null
 31	 },
 32	 reducers: {},
 33	 extraReducers: (builder) => {
 34	 builder
 35	 .addCase(fetchShipments.pending, (state) => {
 36	 state.status = 'loading';
 37	 })
 38	 .addCase(fetchShipments.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 39	 state.status = 'succeeded';
 40	 state.items = action.payload;
 41	 })
 42	 .addCase(fetchShipments.rejected, (state, action) => {
 43	 state.status = 'failed';
 44	 state.error = action.error.message;
 45	 })
 46	 .addCase(updateShipmentLocation.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 47	 const index = state.items.findIndex(item => item._id === action.payload._id);
 48	 if (index !== -1) {
 49	 state.items[index] = action.payload;
 50	 }
 51	 });
 52	 }
 53	});
 54	
 55	export default shipmentSlice.reducer;...

Path: routes/shipment.routes.js
 1	const router = require('express').Router();
 2	const Shipment = require('../models/Shipment');
 3	
 4	// Get all shipments
 5	router.get('/shipments', async (req, res) => {
 6	 try {
 7	 const shipments = await Shipment.find();
 8	 res.json(shipments);
 9	 } catch (error) {
 10	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 11	 }
 12	});
 13	
 14	// Get specific shipment
 15	router.get('/shipment/:id', async (req, res) => {
 16	 try {
 17	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 18	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 19	 res.json(shipment);
 20	 } catch (error) {
 21	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 22	 }
 23	});
 24	
 25	// Create new shipment
 26	router.post('/shipment', async (req, res) => {
 27	 const shipment = new Shipment(req.body);
 28	 try {
 29	 const newShipment = await shipment.save();
 30	 res.status(201).json(newShipment);
 31	 } catch (error) {
 32	 res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
 33	 }
 34	});
 35	
 36	// Update shipment location
 37	router.post('/shipment/:id/update-location', async (req, res) => {
 38	 try {
 39	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 40	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 41	
 42	 shipment.currentLocation = {
 43	 location: req.body.location,
 44	 coordinates: req.body.coordinates,
 45	 timestamp: new Date()
 46	 };
 47	
 48	 const updatedShipment = await shipment.save();
 49	 res.json(updatedShipment);
 50	 } catch (error) {
 51	 res.status(400).json({ message: error.message });
 52	 }
 53	});
 54	
 55	// Get shipment ETA
 56	router.get('/shipment/:id/eta', async (req, res) => {
 57	 try {
 58	 const shipment = await Shipment.findById(req.params.id);
 59	 if (!shipment) return res.status(404).json({ message: 'Shipment not found' });
 60	 res.json({ eta: shipment.eta });
 61	 } catch (error) {
 62	 res.status(500).json({ message: error.message });
 63	 }
 64	});
 65	
 66	module.exports = router;...
Path: src/components/ShipmentMap.js
 1	import React from 'react';
 2	import { MapContainer, TileLayer, Marker, Popup, Polyline } from 'react-leaflet';
 3	import 'leaflet/dist/leaflet.css';
 4	import L from 'leaflet';
 5	
 6	// Fix for default marker icon
 7	delete L.Icon.Default.prototype._getIconUrl;
 8	L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions({
 9	 iconRetinaUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-icon-2x.png'),
 10	 iconUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-icon.png'),
 11	 shadowUrl: require('leaflet/dist/images/marker-shadow.png'),
 12	});
 13	
 14	const ShipmentMap = ({ shipment, showRoute = false }) => {
 15	 const currentPosition = [shipment.currentLocation.coordinates.lat, shipment.currentLocation.coordinates.lng];
 16	 
 17	 // Create route coordinates array for the polyline
 18	 const routeCoordinates = showRoute 
 19	 ? shipment.route.map(stop => [stop.coordinates.lat, stop.coordinates.lng])
 20	 : [];
 21	
 22	 // Add current location to route
 23	 if (showRoute) {
 24	 routeCoordinates.push(currentPosition);
 25	 }
 26	
 27	 // Calculate bounds to fit all markers
 28	 const bounds = showRoute 
 29	 ? L.latLngBounds([currentPosition, ...routeCoordinates])
 30	 : L.latLngBounds([currentPosition]);
 31	
 32	 return (
 33	 <MapContainer 
 34	 bounds={bounds}
 35	 style={{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }}
 36	 >
 37	 <TileLayer
 38	 url="https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"
 39	 attribution='© <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors'
 40	 />
 41	 
 42	 {/* Current location marker */}
 43	 <Marker position={currentPosition}>
 44	 <Popup>
 45	 <strong>Current Location</strong><br />
 46	 {shipment.currentLocation.location}<br />
 47	 Status: {shipment.status}<br />
 48	 ETA: {new Date(shipment.eta).toLocaleDateString()}
 49	 </Popup>
 50	 </Marker>
 51	
 52	 {/* Route markers and polyline */}
 53	 {showRoute && (
 54	 <>
 55	 {shipment.route.map((stop, index) => (
 56	 <Marker 
 57	 key={index}
 58	 position={[stop.coordinates.lat, stop.coordinates.lng]}
 59	 >
 60	 <Popup>
 61	 <strong>Stop {index + 1}</strong><br />
 62	 {stop.location}<br />
 63	 Arrival: {new Date(stop.arrivalTime).toLocaleDateString()}
 64	 </Popup>
 65	 </Marker>
 66	 ))}
 67	 <Polyline 
 68	 positions={routeCoordinates}
 69	 color="blue"
 70	 weight={3}
 71	 opacity={0.7}
 72	 />
 73	 </>
 74	 )}
 75	 </MapContainer>
 76	 );
 77	};
 78	
 79	export default ShipmentMap;...

Path: README.md
 1	# Cargo Shipment Tracker
 2	
 3	A real-time cargo shipment tracking application built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This application helps logistics companies and customers track cargo shipments with interactive maps and detailed status updates.
 4	
 5	## Features
 6	
 7	- Real-time shipment tracking with interactive maps
 8	- Comprehensive dashboard for shipment management
 9	- Detailed shipment information including:
 10	 - Container ID
 11	 - Current location (with latitude and longitude)
 12	 - Status updates
 13	 - Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA)
 14	- Interactive map visualization using React-Leaflet
 15	- Material-UI components for a modern, responsive design
 16	
 17	## Prerequisites
 18	
 19	- Node.js (v14 or higher)
 20	- MongoDB (local installation or Atlas connection)
 21	- npm or yarn package manager
 22	
 23	## Quick Start
 24	
 25	### Automated Setup (Recommended)
 26	
 27	**For Linux/Mac:**
 28	```bash
 29	git clone [your-repository-url]
 30	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 31	chmod +x start.sh
 32	./start.sh
 33	```
 34	
 35	**For Windows:**
 36	```bash
 37	git clone [your-repository-url]
 38	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 39	start.bat
 40	```
 41	
 42	### Manual Installation
 43	
 44	1. **Clone the repository:**
 45	 ```bash
 46	 git clone [your-repository-url]
 47	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 48	 ```
 49	
 50	2. **Install all dependencies:**
 51	 ```bash
 52	 npm run install-all
 53	 ```
 54	
 55	 Or install separately:
 56	 ```bash
 57	 # Backend dependencies
 58	 npm install
 59	
 60	 # Frontend dependencies
 61	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 62	 npm install
 63	 cd ..
 64	 ```
 65	
 66	3. **Set up environment variables:**
 67	 ```bash
 68	 # Copy environment files
 69	 cp .env.example .env
 70	 cp cargo-shipment-tracker/.env.example cargo-shipment-tracker/.env
 71	 ```
 72	
 73	 Update the `.env` files with your configuration if needed.
 74	
 75	4. **Start MongoDB:**
 76	 Make sure MongoDB is running on your system:
 77	 - **Ubuntu/Debian:** `sudo systemctl start mongod`
 78	 - **macOS:** `brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community`
 79	 - **Windows:** `net start MongoDB`
 80	 - **Docker:** `docker run -d -p 27017:27017 --name mongodb mongo:6.0`
 81	
 82	## Running the Application
 83	
 84	1. **Start the backend server:**
 85	 ```bash
 86	 npm start
 87	 ```
 88	 The server will run on http://localhost:5000
 89	
 90	 For development with auto-restart:
 91	 ```bash
 92	 npm run dev
 93	 ```
 94	
 95	2. **In a new terminal, start the frontend:**
 96	 ```bash
 97	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 98	 npm start
 99	 ```
 100	 The React app will run on http://localhost:3000
 101	
 102	3. **Seed sample data (optional):**
 103	 ```bash
 104	 npm run seed
 105	 ```
 106	 This will create sample shipments for testing.
 107	
 108	## Available Scripts
 109	
 110	### Backend Scripts
 111	- `npm start` - Start the production server
 112	- `npm run dev` - Start development server with auto-restart
 113	- `npm test` - Run API tests
 114	- `npm run seed` - Seed sample data
 115	- `npm run install-all` - Install both backend and frontend dependencies
 116	
 117	### Frontend Scripts
 118	- `npm start` - Start development server
 119	- `npm run build` - Build for production
 120	- `npm test` - Run tests
 121	
 122	## API Endpoints
 123	
 124	### Health Check
 125	- `GET /health` - Server health check
 126	
 127	### Shipments
 128	- `GET /api/shipments` - Get all shipments
 129	- `GET /api/shipment/:id` - Get specific shipment
 130	- `POST /api/shipment` - Create new shipment
 131	- `POST /api/shipment/:id/update-location` - Update shipment location
 132	- `PATCH /api/shipment/:id/status` - Update shipment status
 133	- `DELETE /api/shipment/:id` - Delete shipment
 134	- `GET /api/shipment/:id/eta` - Get shipment ETA
 135	
 136	## Project Structure
 137	
 138	```
 139	cargo-shipment-tracker/
 140	├── models/ # MongoDB models
 141	│ └── Shipment.js
 142	├── routes/ # Express routes
 143	│ └── shipment.routes.js
 144	├── cargo-shipment-tracker/ # React frontend
 145	│ ├── src/
 146	│ │ ├── components/ # React components
 147	│ │ ├── store/ # Redux store
 148	│ │ └── ...
 149	│ └── package.json
 150	├── server.js # Express server
 151	├── package.json # Backend dependencies
 152	└── README.md
 153	```
 154	
 155	## Technologies Used
 156	
 157	### Backend
 158	- Node.js
 159	- Express.js
 160	- MongoDB with Mongoose
 161	- CORS
 162	- dotenv
 163	
 164	### Frontend
 165	- React.js
 166	- Material-UI (MUI)
 167	- Redux Toolkit
 168	- React-Leaflet (for maps)
 169	- Axios (for API calls)
 170	
 171	## Features in Detail
...
Path: models/Shipment.js
 1	const mongoose = require('mongoose');
 2	
 3	const shipmentSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
 4	 containerId: {
 5	 type: String,
 6	 required: true,
 7	 unique: true
 8	 },
 9	 route: [{
 10	 location: {
 11	 type: String,
 12	 required: true
 13	 },
 14	 coordinates: {
 15	 lat: Number,
 16	 lng: Number
 17	 },
 18	 arrivalTime: Date,
 19	 departureTime: Date
 20	 }],
 21	 currentLocation: {
 22	 location: String,
 23	 coordinates: {
 24	 lat: Number,
 25	 lng: Number
 26	 },
 27	 timestamp: {
 28	 type: Date,
 29	 default: Date.now
 30	 }
 31	 },
 32	 status: {
 33	 type: String,
 34	 enum: ['pending', 'in-transit', 'delivered', 'delayed'],
 35	 default: 'pending'
 36	 },
 37	 eta: {
 38	 type: Date,
 39	 required: true
 40	 },
 41	 createdAt: {
 42	 type: Date,
 43	 default: Date.now
 44	 }
 45	});
 46	
 47	module.exports = mongoose.model('Shipment', shipmentSchema);...
Path: README.md
 1	# Cargo Shipment Tracker Frontend
 2	
 3	This is the frontend application for the Cargo Shipment Tracker system, built with React and Material-UI. It provides a user-friendly interface for tracking and managing cargo shipments in real-time.
 4	
 5	## Features
 6	
 7	- Interactive Dashboard
 8	 - Real-time shipment status updates
 9	 - Filterable shipment list
 10	 - Quick actions for shipment management
 11	
 12	- Map Integration
 13	 - Live shipment location tracking
 14	 - Interactive route visualization
 15	 - Marker clustering for multiple shipments
 16	
 17	- Shipment Management
 18	 - Add new shipments
 19	 - Update shipment status
 20	 - Track ETA and current location
 21	 - View detailed shipment information
...
Path: server.js
 1	const express = require('express');
 2	const mongoose = require('mongoose');
 3	const cors = require('cors');
 4	require('dotenv').config();
 5	
 6	const app = express();
 7	
 8	app.use(cors());
 9	app.use(express.json());
 10	
 11	// Connect to MongoDB

Path: src/store/shipmentSlice.js
 1	import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
 2	import axios from 'axios';
 3	
 4	const API_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';
 5	
 6	export const fetchShipments = createAsyncThunk(
 7	 'shipments/fetchShipments',
 8	 async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {
 9	 try {
 10	 const response = await axios.get(`${API_URL}/shipments`);
 11	 return response.data;
 12	 } catch (error) {
 13	 return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch shipments');
 14	 }
 15	 }
 16	);
 17	
 18	export const updateShipmentLocation = createAsyncThunk(
 19	 'shipments/updateLocation',
 20	 async ({ id, location, coordinates }, { rejectWithValue }) => {
 21	 try {
 22	 const response = await axios.post(`${API_URL}/shipment/${id}/update-location`, {
 23	 location,
 24	 coordinates
 25	 });
 26	 return response.data;
 27	 } catch (error) {
 28	 return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to update shipment location');
 29	 }
 30	 }
 31	);
 32	
 33	const shipmentSlice = createSlice({
 34	 name: 'shipments',
 35	 initialState: {
 36	 items: [],
 37	 status: 'idle',
 38	 error: null
 39	 },
 40	 reducers: {},
 41	 extraReducers: (builder) => {
 42	 builder
 43	 .addCase(fetchShipments.pending, (state) => {
 44	 state.status = 'loading';
 45	 })
 46	 .addCase(fetchShipments.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 47	 state.status = 'succeeded';
 48	 state.items = action.payload;
 49	 })
 50	 .addCase(fetchShipments.rejected, (state, action) => {
 51	 state.status = 'failed';
 52	 state.error = action.payload || action.error.message;
 53	 })
 54	 .addCase(updateShipmentLocation.pending, (state) => {
 55	 state.error = null;
 56	 })
 57	 .addCase(updateShipmentLocation.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
 58	 const index = state.items.findIndex(item => item._id === action.payload._id);
 59	 if (index !== -1) {
 60	 state.items[index] = action.payload;
 61	 }
 62	 })

 39	const StatsDashboard = ({ shipments }) => {
 40	 const totalShipments = shipments.length;
 41	 const pendingShipments = shipments.filter(s => s.status === 'pending').length;
 42	 const inTransitShipments = shipments.filter(s => s.status === 'in-transit').length;
 43	 const deliveredShipments = shipments.filter(s => s.status === 'delivered').length;
 44	 const delayedShipments = shipments.filter(s => s.status === 'delayed').length;
 45	
 46	 const deliveryRate = totalShipments > 0 ? (deliveredShipments / totalShipments) * 100 : 0;
 47	 const onTimeRate = totalShipments > 0 ? ((deliveredShipments + inTransitShipments) / totalShipments) * 100 : 0;
 48

 1	# Cargo Shipment Tracker
 2	
 3	A real-time cargo shipment tracking application built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This application helps logistics companies and customers track cargo shipments with interactive maps and detailed status updates.
 4	
 5	## Features
 6	
 7	- Real-time shipment tracking with interactive maps
 8	- Comprehensive dashboard for shipment management
 9	- Detailed shipment information including:
 10	 - Container ID
 11	 - Current location (with latitude and longitude)
 12	 - Status updates
 13	 - Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA)
 14	- Interactive map visualization using React-Leaflet
 15	- Material-UI components for a modern, responsive design
 16	
 17	## Prerequisites
 18	
 19	- Node.js (v14 or higher)
 20	- MongoDB (local installation or Atlas connection)
 21	- npm or yarn package manager
 22	
 23	## Quick Start
 24	
 25	### Automated Setup (Recommended)
 26	
 27	**For Linux/Mac:**
 28	```bash
 29	git clone [your-repository-url]
 30	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 31	chmod +x start.sh
 32	./start.sh
 33	```
 34	
 35	**For Windows:**
 36	```bash
 37	git clone [your-repository-url]
 38	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 39	start.bat
 40	```
 41	
 42	### Manual Installation
 43	
 44	1. **Clone the repository:**
 45	 ```bash
 46	 git clone [your-repository-url]
 47	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 48	 ```
 49	
 50	2. **Install all dependencies:**
 51	 ```bash
 52	 npm run install-all
 53	 ```
 54	
 55	 Or install separately:
 56	 ```bash
 57	 # Backend dependencies
 58	 npm install
 59	
 60	 # Frontend dependencies
 61	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 62	 npm install
 63	 cd ..
 64	 ```
 65	
 66	3. **Set up environment variables:**
 67	 ```bash
 68	 # Copy environment files
 69	 cp .env.example .env
 70	 cp cargo-shipment-tracker/.env.example cargo-shipment-tracker/.env
 71	 ```
 72	
 73	 Update the `.env` files with your configuration if needed.
 74	
 75	4. **Start MongoDB:**
 76	 Make sure MongoDB is running on your system:
 77	 - **Ubuntu/Debian:** `sudo systemctl start mongod`
 78	 - **macOS:** `brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community`
 79	 - **Windows:** `net start MongoDB`
 80	 - **Docker:** `docker run -d -p 27017:27017 --name mongodb mongo:6.0`
 81	
 82	## Running the Application
 83	
 84	1. **Start the backend server:**
 85	 ```bash
 86	 npm start
 87	 ```
 88	 The server will run on http://localhost:5000
 89	
 90	 For development with auto-restart:
 91	 ```bash
 92	 npm run dev
 93	 ```
 94	
 95	2. **In a new terminal, start the frontend:**
 96	 ```bash
 97	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 98	 npm start
 99	 ```
 100	 The React app will run on http://localhost:3000
 101	
 102	3. **Seed sample data (optional):**
 103	 ```bash
 104	 npm run seed
 105	 ```
 106	 This will create sample shipments for testing.
 107	
 108	## Available Scripts
 109	
 110	### Backend Scripts
 111	- `npm start` - Start the production server
 112	- `npm run dev` - Start development server with auto-restart
 113	- `npm test` - Run API tests
 114	- `npm run seed` - Seed sample data
 115	- `npm run install-all` - Install both backend and frontend dependencies
 116	
 117	### Frontend Scripts
 118	- `npm start` - Start development server
 119	- `npm run build` - Build for production
 120	- `npm test` - Run tests
 121	
 122	## API Endpoints
 123	
 124	### Health Check
 125	- `GET /health` - Server health check
 126	
 127	### Shipments
 128	- `GET /api/shipments` - Get all shipments
 129	- `GET /api/shipment/:id` - Get specific shipment
 130	- `POST /api/shipment` - Create new shipment
 131	- `POST /api/shipment/:id/update-location` - Update shipment location
 132	- `PATCH /api/shipment/:id/status` - Update shipment status
 133	- `DELETE /api/shipment/:id` - Delete shipment
 134	- `GET /api/shipment/:id/eta` - Get shipment ETA
 135	
 136	## Project Structure
 137	
 138	```
 139	cargo-shipment-tracker/
 140	├── models/ # MongoDB models
 141	│ └── Shipment.js
 142	├── routes/ # Express routes
 143	│ └── shipment.routes.js
 144	├── cargo-shipment-tracker/ # React frontend
 145	│ ├── src/
 146	│ │ ├── components/ # React components
 147	│ │ ├── store/ # Redux store
 148	│ │ └── ...
 149	│ └── package.json
 150	├── server.js # Express server
 151	├── package.json # Backend dependencies
 152	└── README.md
 153	```
 154	
 155	## Technologies Used
 156	
 157	### Backend
 158	- Node.js
 159	- Express.js
 160	- MongoDB with Mongoose
 161	- CORS
 162	- dotenv
 163	
 164	### Frontend
 165	- React.js
 166	- Material-UI (MUI)
 167	- Redux Toolkit
 168	- React-Leaflet (for maps)
 169	- Axios (for API calls)
 170	
 171	## Features in Detail
 172	
 173	### Dashboard
 174	- **Statistics Overview**: Real-time statistics with delivery rates and performance metrics
 175	- **Shipment Table**: View all shipments with search and filter capabilities
 176	- **Auto-refresh**: Automatic data refresh every 30 seconds
 177	- **Status Management**: Quick status updates and tracking
 178	- **Responsive Design**: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
 179	
 180	### Shipment Management
 181	- **Create Shipments**: Add new shipments with detailed information
 182	- **Location Tracking**: Real-time GPS coordinate tracking
 183	- **Status Updates**: Update shipment status (pending, in-transit, delivered, delayed)
 184	- **ETA Management**: Set and track estimated arrival times
 185	- **Route Planning**: Define and visualize shipment routes
 186	
 187	### Map Integration
 188	- **Interactive Maps**: Powered by React-Leaflet and OpenStreetMap
 189	- **Real-time Tracking**: Live location updates with timestamps
 190	- **Route Visualization**: Complete route display with waypoints
 191	- **Detailed Popups**: Comprehensive shipment information on map markers
 192	- **Responsive Maps**: Optimized for all screen sizes
 193	
 194	### User Experience
 195	- **Error Handling**: Comprehensive error messages and validation
 196	- **Loading States**: Visual feedback during operations
 197	- **Notifications**: Success/error notifications for user actions
 198	- **Form Validation**: Client-side and server-side validation
 199	- **Accessibility**: ARIA labels and keyboard navigation support
 200	
 201	## Testing
 202	
 203	### API Testing
 204	```bash
 205	# Test API endpoints
 206	npm test
 207	```
 208	
 209	### Manual Testing
 210	1. Create a new shipment
 211	2. Update shipment location
 212	3. Change shipment status
 213	4. View shipment details and map
 214	5. Test search and filter functionality
 215	
 216	## Deployment
 217	
 218	For production deployment instructions, see [DEPLOYMENT.md](DEPLOYMENT.md).
 219	
 220	### Quick Production Build
 221	```bash
 222	# Build frontend
 223	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 224	npm run build
 225	
 226	# Set production environment
 227	export NODE_ENV=production
 228	export MONGODB_URI=your-production-mongodb-uri
 229	
 230	# Start production server
 231	npm start
 232	```
 233	
 234	## Troubleshooting
 235	
 236	### Common Issues
 237	
 238	1. **MongoDB Connection Error**
 239	 - Ensure MongoDB is running
 240	 - Check connection string in `.env`
 241	 - Verify network connectivity
 242	
 243	2. **Port Already in Use**
 244	 - Change PORT in `.env` file
 245	 - Kill existing processes: `lsof -ti:5000 | xargs kill -9`
 246	
 247	3. **Frontend Build Errors**
 248	 - Clear node_modules: `rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json`
 249	 - Reinstall dependencies: `npm install`
 250	
 251	4. **Map Not Loading**
 252	 - Check internet connection
 253	 - Verify coordinates are valid numbers
 254	 - Check browser console for errors
 255	
 256	## Contributing
 257	
 258	1. Fork the repository
 259	2. Create a feature branch (`git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature`)
 260	3. Commit your changes (`git commit -m 'Add amazing feature'`)
 261	4. Push to the branch (`git push origin feature/amazing-feature`)
 262	5. Open a Pull Request
 263	
 264	### Development Guidelines
 265	- Follow existing code style
 266	- Add tests for new features
 267	- Update documentation
 268	- Test on multiple browsers
 269	- Ensure mobile responsiveness
 270	
 271	## Support
 272	
 273	If you encounter any issues or have questions:
 274	
 275	1. Check the [Troubleshooting](#troubleshooting) section
 276	2. Review [DEPLOYMENT.md](DEPLOYMENT.md) for deployment issues
 277	3. Open an issue on GitHub
 278	4. Check existing issues for solutions
 279	
 280	## License
 281	
 282	This project is licensed under the ISC License - see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.
 283	
 284	## Acknowledgments
 285	
 286	- [React](https://reactjs.org/) - Frontend framework
 287	- [Material-UI](https://mui.com/) - UI component library
 288	- [React-Leaflet](https://react-leaflet.js.org/) - Map integration
 289	- [Express.js](https://expressjs.com/) - Backend framework
 290	- [MongoDB](https://www.mongodb.com/) - Database
 291	- [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) - Map tiles

 4	// Middleware to verify JWT token
 5	const authenticate = async (req, res, next) => {
 6	 try {
 7	 const authHeader = req.header('Authorization');
 8	 
 9	 if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
 10	 return res.status(401).json({
 11	 success: false,
 12	 message: 'Access denied. No token provided.'
 13	 });
 14	 }
 15	 
 16	 const token = authHeader.substring(7); // Remove 'Bearer ' prefix
 17	 
 18	 if (!token) {
 19	 return res.status(401).json({
 20	 success: false,
 21	 message: 'Access denied. No token provided.'
 22	 });
 23	 }
 24	 
 25	 // Verify token
 26	 const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
 27	 
 28	 // Get user from database
 29	 const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-password');
 30	 
 31	 if (!user) {
 32	 return res.status(401).json({
 33	 success: false,
 34	 message: 'Token is not valid. User not found.'
 35	 });
 36	 }
 37	 
 38	 if (!user.isActive) {
 39	 return res.status(401).json({
 40	 success: false,
 41	 message: 'Account is deactivated.'
 42	 });
 43	 }
 44	 
 45	 if (user.isLocked) {
 46	 return res.status(401).json({
 47	 success: false,
 48	 message: 'Account is temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts.'
 49	 });
 50	 }
 51	 
 52	 // Add user to request object
 53	 req.user = user;
 54	 next();
 55	 
 56	 } catch (error) {
 57	 if (error.name === 'JsonWebTokenError') {
 58	 return res.status(401).json({
 59	 success: false,
 60	 message: 'Token is not valid.'
 61	 });
 62	 }
 63	 
 64	 if (error.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
 65	 return res.status(401).json({
 66	 success: false,
 67	 message: 'Token has expired.'
 68	 });
 69	 }
 70	 
 71	 console.error('Authentication error:', error);
 72	 res.status(500).json({
 73	 success: false,
 74	 message: 'Server error during authentication.'
 75	 });
 76	 }
 77	};
 78	
 79	// Middleware to check if user has required role
 80	const authorize = (...roles) => {
 81	 return (req, res, next) => {
 82	 if (!req.user) {
 83	 return res.status(401).json({
 84	 success: false,
 85	 message: 'Access denied. Authentication required.'
 86	 });
 87	 }
 88	 
 89	 if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
 90	 return res.status(403).json({
 91	 success: false,
 92	 message: `Access denied. Required role: ${roles.join(' or ')}`
 93	 });
 94	 }
 95	 
 96	 next();
 97	 };
 98	};
 99	
 100	// Middleware to check if user has required permission
 101	const requirePermission = (permission) => {
 102	 return (req, res, next) => {
 103	 if (!req.user) {
 104	 return res.status(401).json({
 105	 success: false,
 106	 message: 'Access denied. Authentication required.'
 107	 });
 108	 }
 109	 
 110	 // Admin users have all permissions
 111	 if (req.user.role === 'admin') {
 112	 return next();
 113	 }
 114	 
 115	 if (!req.user.permissions.includes(permission)) {
 116	 return res.status(403).json({
 117	 success: false,
 118	 message: `Access denied. Required permission: ${permission}`
 119	 });
 120	 }
 121	 
 122	 next();
 123	 };
 124	};
 125	
 126	// Middleware to check if user can access resource (owner or admin)
 127	const requireOwnershipOrAdmin = (resourceUserField = 'userId') => {
 128	 return (req, res, next) => {
 129	 if (!req.user) {
 130	 return res.status(401).json({
 131	 success: false,
 132	 message: 'Access denied. Authentication required.'
 133	 });
 134	 }
 135	 
 136	 // Admin users can access any resource
 137	 if (req.user.role === 'admin') {
 138	 return next();
 139	 }
 140	 
 141	 // Check if user owns the resource
 142	 const resourceUserId = req.body[resourceUserField] || req.params[resourceUserField];
 143	 
 144	 if (resourceUserId && resourceUserId.toString() !== req.user._id.toString()) {
 145	 return res.status(403).json({
 146	 success: false,
 147	 message: 'Access denied. You can only access your own resources.'
 148	 });
 149	 }
 150	 
 151	 next();
 152	 };
 153	};

 255	// Optional authentication (doesn't fail if no token)
 256	const optionalAuth = async (req, res, next) => {
 257	 try {
 258	 const authHeader = req.header('Authorization');
 259	 
 260	 if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
 261	 return next();
 262	 }
 263	 
 264	 const token = authHeader.substring(7);
 265	 
 266	 if (!token) {
 267	 return next();
 268	 }
 269	 
 270	 const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
 271	 const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-password');
 272	 
 273	 if (user && user.isActive && !user.isLocked) {
 274	 req.user = user;
 275	 }
 276	 
 277	 next();
 278	 
 279	 } catch (error) {
 280	 // Ignore token errors for optional auth
 281	 next();
 282	 }
 283	};

 170	 'view_analytics'
 171	 ];
 172	 break;
 173	 case 'viewer':
 174	 this.permissions = [];
 175	 break;
 176	 }

Path: README.md
 1	# Cargo Shipment Tracker
 2	
 3	A real-time cargo shipment tracking application built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). This application helps logistics companies and customers track cargo shipments with interactive maps and detailed status updates.
 4	
 5	## Features
 6	
 7	- Real-time shipment tracking with interactive maps
 8	- Comprehensive dashboard for shipment management
 9	- Detailed shipment information including:
 10	 - Container ID
 11	 - Current location (with latitude and longitude)
 12	 - Status updates
 13	 - Estimated Time of Arrival (ETA)
 14	- Interactive map visualization using React-Leaflet
 15	- Material-UI components for a modern, responsive design
 16	
 17	## Prerequisites
 18	
 19	- Node.js (v14 or higher)
 20	- MongoDB (local installation or Atlas connection)
 21	- npm or yarn package manager
 22	
 23	## Quick Start
 24	
 25	### Automated Setup (Recommended)
 26	
 27	**For Linux/Mac:**
 28	```bash
 29	git clone [your-repository-url]
 30	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 31	chmod +x start.sh
 32	./start.sh
 33	```
 34	
 35	**For Windows:**
 36	```bash
 37	git clone [your-repository-url]
 38	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 39	start.bat
 40	```
 41	
 42	### Manual Installation
 43	
 44	1. **Clone the repository:**
 45	 ```bash
 46	 git clone [your-repository-url]
 47	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 48	 ```
 49	
 50	2. **Install all dependencies:**
 51	 ```bash
 52	 npm run install-all
 53	 ```
 54	
 55	 Or install separately:
 56	 ```bash
 57	 # Backend dependencies
 58	 npm install
 59	
 60	 # Frontend dependencies
 61	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 62	 npm install
 63	 cd ..
 64	 ```
 65	
 66	3. **Set up environment variables:**
 67	 ```bash
 68	 # Copy environment files
 69	 cp .env.example .env
 70	 cp cargo-shipment-tracker/.env.example cargo-shipment-tracker/.env
 71	 ```
 72	
 73	 Update the `.env` files with your configuration if needed.
 74	
 75	4. **Start MongoDB:**
 76	 Make sure MongoDB is running on your system:
 77	 - **Ubuntu/Debian:** `sudo systemctl start mongod`
 78	 - **macOS:** `brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community`
 79	 - **Windows:** `net start MongoDB`
 80	 - **Docker:** `docker run -d -p 27017:27017 --name mongodb mongo:6.0`
 81	
 82	## Running the Application
 83	
 84	1. **Start the backend server:**
 85	 ```bash
 86	 npm start
 87	 ```
 88	 The server will run on http://localhost:5000
 89	
 90	 For development with auto-restart:
 91	 ```bash
 92	 npm run dev
 93	 ```
 94	
 95	2. **In a new terminal, start the frontend:**
 96	 ```bash
 97	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 98	 npm start
 99	 ```
 100	 The React app will run on http://localhost:3000
 101	
 102	3. **Seed sample data (optional):**
 103	 ```bash
 104	 npm run seed
 105	 ```
 106	 This will create sample shipments for testing.
 107	
 108	## Available Scripts
 109	
 110	### Backend Scripts
 111	- `npm start` - Start the production server
 112	- `npm run dev` - Start development server with auto-restart
 113	- `npm test` - Run API tests
 114	- `npm run seed` - Seed sample data
 115	- `npm run install-all` - Install both backend and frontend dependencies
 116	
 117	### Frontend Scripts
 118	- `npm start` - Start development server
 119	- `npm run build` - Build for production
 120	- `npm test` - Run tests
 121	
 122	## API Endpoints
 123	
 124	### Health Check
 125	- `GET /health` - Server health check
...

 154	
 155	## Technologies Used
 156	
 157	### Backend
 158	- Node.js
 159	- Express.js
 160	- MongoDB with Mongoose
 161	- CORS
 162	- dotenv
 163	
 164	### Frontend
 165	- React.js
 166	- Material-UI (MUI)
 167	- Redux Toolkit
 168	- React-Leaflet (for maps)
 169	- Axios (for API calls)
 170	
 171	## Features in Detail
 172	
 173	### Dashboard
 174	- **Statistics Overview**: Real-time statistics with delivery rates and performance metrics
 175	- **Shipment Table**: View all shipments with search and filter capabilities
 176	- **Auto-refresh**: Automatic data refresh every 30 seconds
 177	- **Status Management**: Quick status updates and tracking
 178	- **Responsive Design**: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
 179	
 180	### Shipment Management
 181	- **Create Shipments**: Add new shipments with detailed information
 182	- **Location Tracking**: Real-time GPS coordinate tracking
 183	- **Status Updates**: Update shipment status (pending, in-transit, delivered, delayed)
 184	- **ETA Management**: Set and track estimated arrival times
 185	- **Route Planning**: Define and visualize shipment routes
...

 209	### Manual Testing
 210	1. Create a new shipment
 211	2. Update shipment location
 212	3. Change shipment status
 213	4. View shipment details and map
 214	5. Test search and filter functionality
 215	
 216	## Deployment
 217	
 218	For production deployment instructions, see [DEPLOYMENT.md](DEPLOYMENT.md).
 219	
 220	### Quick Production Build
 221	```bash
 222	# Build frontend
 223	cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 224	npm run build
 225	
 226	# Set production environment
 227	export NODE_ENV=production
 228	export MONGODB_URI=your-production-mongodb-uri
 229	
 230	# Start production server
 231	npm start
 232	```
 233	
 234	## Troubleshooting
 235	
 236	### Common Issues
 237	
 238	1. **MongoDB Connection Error**
 239	 - Ensure MongoDB is running
 240	 - Check connection string in `.env`
 241	 - Verify network connectivity

 21	 - View detailed shipment information

 28	 // Response interceptor to handle token refresh
 29	 axios.interceptors.response.use(
 30	 (response) => response,
 31	 async (error) => {
 32	 const originalRequest = error.config;
 33	 
 34	 if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
 35	 originalRequest._retry = true;
 36	 
 37	 try {
 38	 await this.refreshToken();
 39	 const token = this.getToken();
 40	 originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
 41	 return axios(originalRequest);
 42	 } catch (refreshError) {
 43	 this.logout();
 44	 window.location.href = '/login';
 45	 return Promise.reject(refreshError);
 46	 }
 47	 }
 48	 
 49	 return Promise.reject(error);
 50	 }
 51	 );
 52	 }

 103	 async resetPassword(token, password) {
 104	 try {
 105	 const response = await axios.post(`${API_URL}/auth/reset-password`, {
 106	 token,
 107	 password,
 108	 });
 109	 return { success: true, message: response.data.message };
 110	 } catch (error) {
 111	 throw new Error(error.response?.data?.message || 'Password reset failed');
 112	 }
 113	 }
 114	
 115	 async refreshToken() {
 116	 try {
 117	 const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken');
 118	 if (!refreshToken) {
 119	 throw new Error('No refresh token available');
 120	 }
 121	
 122	 const response = await axios.post(`${API_URL}/auth/refresh-token`, {
 123	 refreshToken,
 124	 });
 125	
 126	 const { token, refreshToken: newRefreshToken, user } = response.data;
 127	 
 128	 this.setSession(token, newRefreshToken, user);
 129	 this.startRefreshTokenTimer();
 130	 
 131	 return token;
 132	 } catch (error) {
 133	 this.logout();
 134	 throw error;
 135	 }
 136	 }
 137	
 138	 logout() {
 139	 this.clearSession();
 140	 this.stopRefreshTokenTimer();
 141	 
 142	 // Call logout endpoint to invalidate tokens on server
 143	 axios.post(`${API_URL}/auth/logout`).catch(() => {
 144	 // Ignore errors on logout
 145	 });
 146	 }
 147	
 148	 setSession(token, refreshToken, user) {
 149	 this.token = token;
 150	 this.user = user;
 151	 
 152	 localStorage.setItem('token', token);
 153	 localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', refreshToken);
 154	 localStorage.setItem('user', JSON.stringify(user));
 155	 }
 156	
 157	 clearSession() {
 158	 this.token = null;
 159	 this.user = null;
 160	 
 161	 localStorage.removeItem('token');
 162	 localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken');
 163	 localStorage.removeItem('user');
 164	 }
 165	
 166	 getToken() {
 167	 return this.token || localStorage.getItem('token');
 168	 }
 169	
 170	 getUser() {
 171	 return this.user || JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
 172	 }
 173	
 174	 isAuthenticated() {
 175	 const token = this.getToken();
 176	 if (!token) return false;
 177	 
 178	 try {
 179	 const payload = JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1]));
 180	 return payload.exp > Date.now() / 1000;
 181	 } catch {
 182	 return false;
 183	 }
 184	 }
 185	
 186	 hasRole(role) {
 187	 const user = this.getUser();
 188	 return user?.role === role;
 189	 }
 190	
 191	 hasPermission(permission) {
 192	 const user = this.getUser();
 193	 return user?.permissions?.includes(permission) || user?.role === 'admin';
 194	 }
 195	
 196	 startRefreshTokenTimer() {
 197	 const token = this.getToken();
 198	 if (!token) return;
 199	
 200	 try {
 201	 const payload = JSON.parse(atob(token.split('.')[1]));
 202	 const expires = new Date(payload.exp * 1000);
 203	 const timeout = expires.getTime() - Date.now() - (60 * 1000); // Refresh 1 minute before expiry
 204	 
 205	 this.refreshTokenTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
 206	 this.refreshToken().catch(() => {
 207	 this.logout();
 208	 });
 209	 }, timeout);

 81	
 82	2. **Application Deployment**
 83	 ```bash
 84	 # Clone repository
 85	 git clone <repository-url>
 86	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 87	 
 88	 # Install dependencies
 89	 npm run install-all
 90	 
 91	 # Build frontend
 92	 cd cargo-shipment-tracker
 93	 npm run build
 94	 cd ..
 95	 
 96	 # Set up environment
 97	 cp .env.example .env
 98	 # Edit .env with production values
 99	 
 100	 # Start with PM2
 101	 pm2 start server.js --name "cargo-tracker-api"
 102	 pm2 startup
 103	 pm2 save
 104	 ```

RedisService {\n constructor() {\n this.client = null;\n this.isConnected = false;\n this.retryAttempts = 0;\n this.maxRetries = 5;\n }\n\n async connect() {\n try {\n const redisConfig = {\n host: process.env.REDIS_HOST || 'localhost',\n port: process.env.REDIS_PORT || 6379,\n password: process.env.REDIS_PASSWORD || undefined,\n db: process.env.REDIS_DB || 0,\n retryDelayOnFailover: 100,\n enableReadyCheck: true,\n maxRetriesPerRequest: 3,\n lazyConnect: true,\n keepAlive: 30000,\n connectTimeout: 10000,\n commandTimeout: 5000,\n };\n\n // Add TLS configuration for production\n if (process.env.REDIS_TLS === 'true') {\n redisConfig.tls = {\n rejectUnauthorized: false\n };\n }\n\n this.client = new Redis(redisConfig);\n\n // Event handlers\n this.client.on('connect', () => {\n console.log('Redis connected successfully');\n this.isConnected = true;\n this.retryAttempts = 0;\n });\n\n this.client.on('ready', () => {\n console.log('Redis ready to accept commands');\n });\n\n this.client.on('error', (error) => {\n console.error('Redis connection error:', error.message);\n this.isConnected = false;\n \n if (this.retryAttempts < this.maxRetries) {\n this.retryAttempts++;\n console.log(`Retrying Redis connection (${this.retryAttempts}/${this.maxRetries})...`);\n }\n });\n\n this.client.on('close', () => {\n console.log('Redis connection closed');\n this.isConnected = false;\n });\n\n this.client.on('reconnecting', () => {\n console.log('Redis reconnecting...');\n });\n\n // Connect to Redis\n await this.client.connect();\n \n return this.client;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Failed to connect to Redis:', error.message);\n this.isConnected = false;\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n async disconnect() {\n if (this.client) {\n await this.client.quit();\n this.client = null;\n this.isConnected = false;\n console.log('Redis disconnected');\n }\n }\n\n isReady() {\n return this.isConnected && this.client && this.client.status === 'ready';\n }\n\n // Cache operations\n async get(key) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n const value = await this.client.get(key);\n return value ? JSON.parse(value) : null;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis GET error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n async set(key, value, ttl = 3600) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const serializedValue = JSON.stringify(value);\n if (ttl > 0) {\n await this.client.setex(key, ttl, serializedValue);\n } else {\n await this.client.set(key, serializedValue);\n }\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis SET error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async del(key) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n await this.client.del(key);\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis DEL error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async exists(key) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const result = await this.client.exists(key);\n return result === 1;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis EXISTS error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async expire(key, ttl) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n await this.client.expire(key, ttl);\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis EXPIRE error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async flushPattern(pattern) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const keys = await this.client.keys(pattern);\n if (keys.length > 0) {\n await this.client.del(...keys);\n }\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis FLUSH PATTERN error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n // Hash operations\n async hget(key, field) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n const value = await this.client.hget(key, field);\n return value ? JSON.parse(value) : null;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis HGET error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n async hset(key, field, value, ttl = 3600) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const serializedValue = JSON.stringify(value);\n await this.client.hset(key, field, serializedValue);\n if (ttl > 0) {\n await this.client.expire(key, ttl);\n }\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis HSET error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async hgetall(key) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n const hash = await this.client.hgetall(key);\n const result = {};\n for (const [field, value] of Object.entries(hash)) {\n try {\n result[field] = JSON.parse(value);\n } catch {\n result[field] = value;\n }\n }\n return result;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis HGETALL error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n // List operations\n async lpush(key, value) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const serializedValue = JSON.stringify(value);\n await this.client.lpush(key, serializedValue);\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis LPUSH error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n async rpop(key) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n const value = await this.client.rpop(key);\n return value ? JSON.parse(value) : null;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis RPOP error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n async lrange(key, start = 0, stop = -1) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return [];\n \n try {\n const values = await this.client.lrange(key, start, stop);\n return values.map(value => {\n try {\n return JSON.parse(value);\n } catch {\n return value;\n }\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis LRANGE error:', error.message);\n return [];\n }\n }\n\n // Pub/Sub operations\n async publish(channel, message) {\n if (!this.isReady()) return false;\n \n try {\n const serializedMessage = JSON.stringify(message);\n await this.client.publish(channel, serializedMessage);\n return true;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis PUBLISH error:', error.message);\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n createSubscriber() {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n return this.client.duplicate();\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis SUBSCRIBER error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n\n // Performance monitoring\n async getStats() {\n if (!this.isReady()) return null;\n \n try {\n const info = await this.client.info('memory');\n const keyspace = await this.client.info('keyspace');\n \n return {\n connected: this.isConnected,\n memory: info,\n keyspace: keyspace,\n status: this.client.status\n };\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Redis STATS error:', error.message);\n return null;\n }\n }\n}\n\n// Create singleton instance\nconst redisService = new RedisService();\n\nmodule.exports = redisService;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Let me proceed with creating the Phase 3 implementation.
