require('../utils/redis');\nconst crypto = require('crypto');\n\n/**\n * Cache middleware for Express routes\n * Provides intelligent caching with automatic invalidation\n */\n\n// Generate cache key from request\nconst generateCacheKey = (req, prefix = 'api') => {\n const { method, originalUrl, query, user } = req;\n const userId = user ? user._id.toString() : 'anonymous';\n \n // Create a unique key based on method, URL, query params, and user\n const keyData = {\n method,\n url: originalUrl,\n query: JSON.stringify(query),\n userId\n };\n \n const hash = crypto\n .createHash('md5')\n .update(JSON.stringify(keyData))\n .digest('hex');\n \n return `${prefix}:${hash}`;\n};\n\n// Cache response middleware\nconst cacheResponse = (options = {}) => {\n const {\n ttl = 300, // 5 minutes default\n prefix = 'api',\n skipCache = false,\n varyBy = [],\n condition = null\n } = options;\n\n return async (req, res, next) => {\n // Skip caching if disabled or Redis not available\n if (skipCache || !redisService.isReady()) {\n return next();\n }\n\n // Check condition function if provided\n if (condition && !condition(req)) {\n return next();\n }\n\n // Only cache GET requests by default\n if (req.method !== 'GET') {\n return next();\n }\n\n try {\n // Generate cache key\n let cacheKey = generateCacheKey(req, prefix);\n \n // Add vary-by parameters to cache key\n if (varyBy.length > 0) {\n const varyData = varyBy.map(field => {\n if (field.startsWith('header.')) {\n return req.get(field.substring(7));\n }\n if (field.startsWith('query.')) {\n return req.query[field.substring(6)];\n }\n if (field.startsWith('user.')) {\n return req.user ? req.user[field.substring(5)] : null;\n }\n return req[field];\n }).join(':');\n \n cacheKey += `:${crypto.createHash('md5').update(varyData).digest('hex')}`;\n }\n\n // Try to get cached response\n const cachedResponse = await redisService.get(cacheKey);\n \n if (cachedResponse) {\n // Set cache headers\n res.set({\n 'X-Cache': 'HIT',\n 'X-Cache-Key': cacheKey,\n 'Cache-Control': `public, max-age=${ttl}`\n });\n \n // Return cached response\n return res.status(cachedResponse.status).json(cachedResponse.data);\n }\n\n // Store original res.json method\n const originalJson = res.json;\n \n // Override res.json to cache the response\n res.json = function(data) {\n // Cache successful responses only\n if (res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n const responseData = {\n status: res.statusCode,\n data: data,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n \n // Cache the response asynchronously\n redisService.set(cacheKey, responseData, ttl).catch(error => {\n console.error('Cache set error:', error.message);\n });\n \n // Set cache headers\n res.set({\n 'X-Cache': 'MISS',\n 'X-Cache-Key': cacheKey,\n 'Cache-Control': `public, max-age=${ttl}`\n });\n }\n \n // Call original json method\n return originalJson.call(this, data);\n };\n\n next();\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Cache middleware error:', error.message);\n next();\n }\n };\n};\n\n// Cache invalidation middleware\nconst invalidateCache = (patterns = []) => {\n return async (req, res, next) => {\n // Store original methods\n const originalJson = res.json;\n const originalSend = res.send;\n \n // Override response methods to invalidate cache after successful operations\n const invalidateAfterResponse = function(data) {\n // Only invalidate on successful operations\n if (res.statusCode >= 200 && res.statusCode < 300) {\n // Invalidate cache patterns asynchronously\n Promise.all(\n patterns.map(pattern => redisService.flushPattern(pattern))\n ).catch(error => {\n console.error('Cache invalidation error:', error.message);\n });\n }\n \n return data;\n };\n \n res.json = function(data) {\n const result = invalidateAfterResponse(data);\n return originalJson.call(this, result);\n };\n \n res.send = function(data) {\n invalidateAfterResponse(data);\n return originalSend.call(this, data);\n };\n\n next();\n };\n};\n\n// Shipment-specific cache middleware\nconst cacheShipments = cacheResponse({\n ttl: 300, // 5 minutes\n prefix: 'shipments',\n varyBy: ['user.role', 'query.status', 'query.search']\n});\n\nconst cacheShipmentDetails = cacheResponse({\n ttl: 600, // 10 minutes\n prefix: 'shipment',\n varyBy: ['user.role']\n});\n\nconst cacheAnalytics = cacheResponse({\n ttl: 900, // 15 minutes\n prefix: 'analytics',\n varyBy: ['user.role', 'query.period', 'query.type']\n});\n\n// Cache invalidation patterns\nconst invalidateShipmentCache = invalidateCache([\n 'shipments:*',\n 'shipment:*',\n 'analytics:*'\n]);\n\nconst invalidateAnalyticsCache = invalidateCache([\n 'analytics:*'\n]);\n\n// User session cache\nconst cacheUserSession = async (userId, sessionData, ttl = 3600) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return false;\n \n const key = `session:${userId}`;\n return await redisService.set(key, sessionData, ttl);\n};\n\nconst getUserSession = async (userId) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return null;\n \n const key = `session:${userId}`;\n return await redisService.get(key);\n};\n\nconst invalidateUserSession = async (userId) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return false;\n \n const key = `session:${userId}`;\n return await redisService.del(key);\n};\n\n// Rate limiting cache\nconst setRateLimit = async (identifier, limit, windowMs) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return false;\n \n const key = `ratelimit:${identifier}`;\n const current = await redisService.get(key) || 0;\n \n if (current >= limit) {\n return false; // Rate limit exceeded\n }\n \n const ttl = Math.ceil(windowMs / 1000);\n await redisService.set(key, current + 1, ttl);\n return true;\n};\n\nconst getRateLimit = async (identifier) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return null;\n \n const key = `ratelimit:${identifier}`;\n return await redisService.get(key) || 0;\n};\n\n// Real-time data cache\nconst cacheRealtimeData = async (type, id, data, ttl = 60) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return false;\n \n const key = `realtime:${type}:${id}`;\n return await redisService.set(key, data, ttl);\n};\n\nconst getRealtimeData = async (type, id) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return null;\n \n const key = `realtime:${type}:${id}`;\n return await redisService.get(key);\n};\n\n// Notification queue\nconst queueNotification = async (notification) => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return false;\n \n const key = 'notifications:queue';\n return await redisService.lpush(key, notification);\n};\n\nconst dequeueNotification = async () => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) return null;\n \n const key = 'notifications:queue';\n return await redisService.rpop(key);\n};\n\n// Cache warming\nconst warmCache = async () => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) {\n console.log('Redis not available, skipping cache warming');\n return;\n }\n \n try {\n console.log('Starting cache warming...');\n \n // Warm up common queries\n // This would typically be done by making requests to your API endpoints\n // or by pre-computing and storing frequently accessed data\n \n console.log('Cache warming completed');\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Cache warming error:', error.message);\n }\n};\n\n// Cache health check\nconst getCacheHealth = async () => {\n if (!redisService.isReady()) {\n return {\n status: 'unhealthy',\n connected: false,\n error: 'Redis not connected'\n };\n }\n \n try {\n const stats = await redisService.getStats();\n return {\n status: 'healthy',\n connected: true,\n stats\n };\n } catch (error) {\n return {\n status: 'unhealthy',\n connected: false,\n error: error.message\n };\n }\n};\n\nmodule.exports = {\n cacheResponse,\n invalidateCache,\n cacheShipments,\n cacheShipmentDetails,\n cacheAnalytics,\n invalidateShipmentCache,\n invalidateAnalyticsCache,\n cacheUserSession,\n getUserSession,\n invalidateUserSession,\n setRateLimit,\n getRateLimit,\n cacheRealtimeData,\n getRealtimeData,\n queueNotification,\n dequeueNotification,\n warmCache,\n getCacheHealth,\n generateCacheKey\n};"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create the caching middleware:

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "services/socketService.js", "file_content": "const { Server } = require('socket.io');\nconst jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');\nconst User = require('../models/User');\nconst redisService = require('../utils/redis');\n\nclass SocketService {\n constructor() {\n this.io = null;\n this.connectedUsers = new Map();\n this.rooms = new Map();\n this.eventHandlers = new Map();\n }\n\n initialize(server) {\n this.io = new Server(server, {\n cors: {\n origin: process.env.CLIENT_URL || \"http://localhost:3000\",\n methods: [\"GET\", \"POST\"],\n credentials: true\n },\n transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],\n pingTimeout: 60000,\n pingInterval: 25000\n });\n\n this.setupMiddleware();\n this.setupEventHandlers();\n this.setupRoomManagement();\n \n console.log('Socket.IO service initialized');\n return this.io;\n }\n\n setupMiddleware() {\n // Authentication middleware\n this.io.use(async (socket, next) => {\n try {\n const token = socket.handshake.auth.token || socket.handshake.headers.authorization?.split(' ')[1];\n \n if (!token) {\n return next(new Error('Authentication token required'));\n }\n\n const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);\n const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-password');\n \n if (!user || !user.isActive) {\n return next(new Error('Invalid or inactive user'));\n }\n\n socket.userId = user._id.toString();\n socket.user = user;\n next();\n } catch (error) {\n next(new Error('Authentication failed'));\n }\n });\n\n // Rate limiting middleware\n this.io.use(async (socket, next) => {\n const userId = socket.userId;\n const key = `socket_rate_limit:${userId}`;\n \n try {\n const current = await redisService.get(key) || 0;\n if (current > 100) { // 100 events per minute\n return next(new Error('Rate limit exceeded'));\n }\n \n await redisService.set(key, current + 1, 60);\n next();\n } catch (error) {\n next();\n }\n });\n }\n\n setupEventHandlers() {\n this.io.on('connection', (socket) => {\n this.handleConnection(socket);\n \n socket.on('disconnect', () => {\n this.handleDisconnection(socket);\n });\n\n // Shipment tracking events\n socket.on('track_shipment', (data) => {\n this.handleTrackShipment(socket, data);\n });\n\n socket.on('stop_tracking', (data) => {\n this.handleStopTracking(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Real-time location updates\n socket.on('location_update', (data) => {\n this.handleLocationUpdate(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Status updates\n socket.on('status_update', (data) => {\n this.handleStatusUpdate(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Chat/messaging\n socket.on('send_message', (data) => {\n this.handleMessage(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Notifications\n socket.on('mark_notification_read', (data) => {\n this.handleNotificationRead(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Analytics subscription\n socket.on('subscribe_analytics', (data) => {\n this.handleAnalyticsSubscription(socket, data);\n });\n\n socket.on('unsubscribe_analytics', (data) => {\n this.handleAnalyticsUnsubscription(socket, data);\n });\n\n // Error handling\n socket.on('error', (error) => {\n console.error('Socket error:', error);\n this.logActivity(socket.userId, 'socket_error', { error: error.message });\n });\n });\n }\n\n setupRoomManagement() {\n // Clean up empty rooms periodically\n setInterval(() => {\n this.cleanupEmptyRooms();\n }, 300000); // 5 minutes\n }\n\n handleConnection(socket) {\n const userId = socket.userId;\n const user = socket.user;\n \n console.log(`User ${user.email} connected (${socket.id})`);\n \n // Store user connection\n this.connectedUsers.set(userId, {\n socketId: socket.id,\n user: user,\n connectedAt: new Date(),\n lastActivity: new Date()\n });\n\n // Join user-specific room\n socket.join(`user:${userId}`);\n \n // Join role-based room\n socket.join(`role:${user.role}`);\n\n // Send connection confirmation\n socket.emit('connected', {\n message: 'Connected successfully',\n userId: userId,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n });\n\n // Send pending notifications\n this.sendPendingNotifications(socket);\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'socket_connect', { socketId: socket.id });\n\n // Broadcast user online status to relevant users\n this.broadcastUserStatus(userId, 'online');\n }\n\n handleDisconnection(socket) {\n const userId = socket.userId;\n \n if (userId) {\n console.log(`User ${userId} disconnected (${socket.id})`);\n \n // Remove from connected users\n this.connectedUsers.delete(userId);\n \n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'socket_disconnect', { socketId: socket.id });\n \n // Broadcast user offline status\n this.broadcastUserStatus(userId, 'offline');\n }\n }\n\n handleTrackShipment(socket, data) {\n const { shipmentId } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n \n if (!shipmentId) {\n return socket.emit('error', { message: 'Shipment ID required' });\n }\n\n // Join shipment tracking room\n socket.join(`shipment:${shipmentId}`);\n \n // Send current shipment data\n this.sendShipmentUpdate(shipmentId);\n \n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'track_shipment', { shipmentId });\n \n socket.emit('tracking_started', { shipmentId });\n }\n\n handleStopTracking(socket, data) {\n const { shipmentId } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n \n if (!shipmentId) {\n return socket.emit('error', { message: 'Shipment ID required' });\n }\n\n // Leave shipment tracking room\n socket.leave(`shipment:${shipmentId}`);\n \n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'stop_tracking', { shipmentId });\n \n socket.emit('tracking_stopped', { shipmentId });\n }\n\n handleLocationUpdate(socket, data) {\n const { shipmentId, location, coordinates } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n \n // Validate user permissions\n if (!this.canUpdateShipment(socket.user, shipmentId)) {\n return socket.emit('error', { message: 'Insufficient permissions' });\n }\n\n // Broadcast location update to all tracking this shipment\n this.io.to(`shipment:${shipmentId}`).emit('location_updated', {\n shipmentId,\n location,\n coordinates,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n updatedBy: userId\n });\n\n // Cache the update\n this.cacheRealtimeUpdate('location', shipmentId, {\n location,\n coordinates,\n timestamp: new Date(),\n updatedBy: userId\n });\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'location_update', { shipmentId, location });\n }\n\n handleStatusUpdate(socket, data) {\n const { shipmentId, status, notes } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n \n // Validate user permissions\n if (!this.canUpdateShipment(socket.user, shipmentId)) {\n return socket.emit('error', { message: 'Insufficient permissions' });\n }\n\n // Broadcast status update\n this.io.to(`shipment:${shipmentId}`).emit('status_updated', {\n shipmentId,\n status,\n notes,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n updatedBy: userId\n });\n\n // Cache the update\n this.cacheRealtimeUpdate('status', shipmentId, {\n status,\n notes,\n timestamp: new Date(),\n updatedBy: userId\n });\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'status_update', { shipmentId, status });\n }\n\n handleMessage(socket, data) {\n const { shipmentId, message, type = 'text' } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n const user = socket.user;\n\n const messageData = {\n id: Date.now().toString(),\n shipmentId,\n message,\n type,\n sender: {\n id: userId,\n name: user.fullName,\n role: user.role\n },\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n\n // Broadcast message to shipment room\n this.io.to(`shipment:${shipmentId}`).emit('message_received', messageData);\n\n // Store message in cache for history\n this.storeMessage(shipmentId, messageData);\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'send_message', { shipmentId, messageType: type });\n }\n\n handleNotificationRead(socket, data) {\n const { notificationId } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n\n // Mark notification as read\n this.markNotificationAsRead(userId, notificationId);\n\n socket.emit('notification_marked_read', { notificationId });\n }\n\n handleAnalyticsSubscription(socket, data) {\n const { type, filters } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n\n // Join analytics room\n socket.join(`analytics:${type}`);\n\n // Send current analytics data\n this.sendAnalyticsUpdate(socket, type, filters);\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'subscribe_analytics', { type });\n }\n\n handleAnalyticsUnsubscription(socket, data) {\n const { type } = data;\n const userId = socket.userId;\n\n // Leave analytics room\n socket.leave(`analytics:${type}`);\n\n // Log activity\n this.logActivity(userId, 'unsubscribe_analytics', { type });\n }\n\n // Utility methods\n canUpdateShipment(user, shipmentId) {\n // Admin and operators can update any shipment\n if (user.role === 'admin' || user.role === 'operator') {\n return true;\n }\n \n // Viewers cannot update shipments\n return false;\n }\n\n async sendPendingNotifications(socket) {\n try {\n const userId = socket.userId;\n const notifications = await this.getPendingNotifications(userId);\n \n if (notifications.length > 0) {\n socket.emit('pending_notifications', notifications);\n }\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error sending pending notifications:', error);\n }\n }\n\n broadcastUserStatus(userId, status) {\n // Broadcast to admin users\n this.io.to('role:admin').emit('user_status_changed', {\n userId,\n status,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n });\n }\n\n async sendShipmentUpdate(shipmentId) {\n try {\n // Get current shipment data from cache or database\n const shipmentData = await this.getShipmentData(shipmentId);\n \n if (shipmentData) {\n this.io.to(`shipment:${shipmentId}`).emit('shipment_data', shipmentData);\n }\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error sending shipment update:', error);\n }\n }\n\n async cacheRealtimeUpdate(type, shipmentId, data) {\n try {\n const key = `realtime:${type}:${shipmentId}`;\n await redisService.set(key, data, 300); // 5 minutes TTL\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error caching realtime update:', error);\n }\n }\n\n async storeMessage(shipmentId, messageData) {\n try {\n const key = `messages:${shipmentId}`;\n await redisService.lpush(key, messageData);\n \n // Keep only last 100 messages\n const messages = await redisService.lrange(key, 0, 99);\n await redisService.del(key);\n \n for (const message of messages) {\n await redisService.lpush(key, message);\n }\n \n await redisService.expire(key, 86400); // 24 hours\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error storing message:', error);\n }\n }\n\n async logActivity(userId, action, data = {}) {\n try {\n const activity = {\n userId,\n action,\n data,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n \n await redisService.lpush('socket_activities', activity);\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error logging socket activity:', error);\n }\n }\n\n cleanupEmptyRooms() {\n // This would clean up rooms with no connected clients\n // Implementation depends on your specific needs\n }\n\n // Public methods for external use\n emitToUser(userId, event, data) {\n this.io.to(`user:${userId}`).emit(event, data);\n }\n\n emitToRole(role, event, data) {\n this.io.to(`role:${role}`).emit(event, data);\n }\n\n emitToShipment(shipmentId, event, data) {\n this.io.to(`shipment:${shipmentId}`).emit(event, data);\n }\n\n broadcastToAll(event, data) {\n this.io.emit(event, data);\n }\n\n getConnectedUsers() {\n return Array.from(this.connectedUsers.values());\n }\n\n isUserConnected(userId) {\n return this.connectedUsers.has(userId);\n }\n}\n\n// Create singleton instance\nconst socketService = new SocketService();\n\nmodule.exports = socketService;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create the 'connected' : 'disconnected',\n redis: redisService.isReady() ? 'connected' : 'disconnected',\n socketio: socketService.io ? 'initialized' : 'not initialized'\n },\n uptime: process.uptime(),\n memory: process.memoryUsage(),\n version: process.env.npm_package_version || '1.0.0'\n };\n\n const statusCode = health.services.mongodb === 'connected' ? 200 : 503;\n res.status(statusCode).json(health);\n});\n\n// API Routes\napp.use('/api/auth', require('./routes/auth.routes'));\napp.use('/api/shipments', require('./routes/shipment.routes'));\n\n// Error handling middleware\napp.use((err, req, res, next) => {\n console.error('Unhandled error:', err);\n \n res.status(err.status || 500).json({\n success: false,\n message: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' \n ? 'Internal server error' \n : err.message,\n ...(process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && { stack: err.stack })\n });\n});\n\n// 404 handler\napp.use('*', (req, res) => {\n res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Route not found'\n });\n});\n\n// Graceful shutdown\nprocess.on('SIGTERM', async () => {\n console.log('SIGTERM received, shutting down gracefully');\n \n try {\n await mongoose.connection.close();\n await redisService.disconnect();\n \n server.close(() => {\n console.log('Server closed');\n process.exit(0);\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error during shutdown:', error);\n process.exit(1);\n }\n});\n\nprocess.on('SIGINT', async () => {\n console.log('SIGINT received, shutting down gracefully');\n \n try {\n await mongoose.connection.close();\n await redisService.disconnect();\n \n server.close(() => {\n console.log('Server closed');\n process.exit(0);\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error during shutdown:', error);\n process.exit(1);\n }\n});\n\n// Start server\nconst PORT = process.env.PORT || 5000;\n\nasync function startServer() {\n try {\n await initializeServices();\n \n server.listen(PORT, () => {\n console.log(`\ud83d\ude80 Server is running on port ${PORT}`);\n console.log(`\ud83d\udcca Health check: http://localhost:${PORT}/health`);\n console.log(`\ud83d\udd0c Socket.IO ready for connections`);\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Failed to start server:', error);\n process.exit(1);\n }\n}\n\nstartServer();", "old_str_start_line_number": 95, "old_str_end_line_number": 107}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":""},{"id":2,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":3,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"seen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"Successfully edited the file server.js.

require('mongoose');\n\nconst analyticsSchema = new mongoose.Schema({\n type: {\n type: String,\n required: true,\n enum: [\n 'shipment_created',\n 'shipment_updated', \n 'shipment_delivered',\n 'location_update',\n 'status_change',\n 'user_login',\n 'user_action',\n 'system_event',\n 'performance_metric',\n 'error_event'\n ]\n },\n category: {\n type: String,\n required: true,\n enum: ['shipment', 'user', 'system', 'performance', 'security']\n },\n entityId: {\n type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId,\n required: false // Some events might not be tied to a specific entity\n },\n entityType: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['shipment', 'user', 'system'],\n required: false\n },\n userId: {\n type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId,\n ref: 'User',\n required: false // System events might not have a user\n },\n data: {\n type: mongoose.Schema.Types.Mixed,\n required: true\n },\n metadata: {\n ipAddress: String,\n userAgent: String,\n location: {\n country: String,\n city: String,\n coordinates: {\n lat: Number,\n lng: Number\n }\n },\n sessionId: String,\n requestId: String,\n source: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['web', 'mobile', 'api', 'system'],\n default: 'web'\n }\n },\n metrics: {\n duration: Number, // in milliseconds\n responseTime: Number,\n memoryUsage: Number,\n cpuUsage: Number,\n errorCount: Number,\n successCount: Number\n },\n tags: [String], // For categorization and filtering\n severity: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'],\n default: 'low'\n },\n processed: {\n type: Boolean,\n default: false\n },\n aggregated: {\n type: Boolean,\n default: false\n }\n}, {\n timestamps: true,\n collection: 'analytics'\n});\n\n// Indexes for performance\nanalyticsSchema.index({ type: 1, createdAt: -1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ category: 1, createdAt: -1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ userId: 1, createdAt: -1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ entityId: 1, entityType: 1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ createdAt: -1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ tags: 1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ severity: 1, processed: 1 });\n\n// Compound indexes for common queries\nanalyticsSchema.index({ type: 1, category: 1, createdAt: -1 });\nanalyticsSchema.index({ userId: 1, type: 1, createdAt: -1 });\n\n// TTL index for automatic cleanup (optional - keep data for 1 year)\nanalyticsSchema.index({ createdAt: 1 }, { expireAfterSeconds: 31536000 });\n\n// Static methods for analytics operations\nanalyticsSchema.statics.recordEvent = async function(eventData) {\n try {\n const event = new this(eventData);\n await event.save();\n return event;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error recording analytics event:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.statics.getShipmentAnalytics = async function(filters = {}) {\n const {\n startDate = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), // 30 days ago\n endDate = new Date(),\n userId,\n shipmentId\n } = filters;\n\n const matchStage = {\n category: 'shipment',\n createdAt: { $gte: startDate, $lte: endDate }\n };\n\n if (userId) matchStage.userId = new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(userId);\n if (shipmentId) matchStage.entityId = new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(shipmentId);\n\n const pipeline = [\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: {\n type: '$type',\n date: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$createdAt' } }\n },\n count: { $sum: 1 },\n avgDuration: { $avg: '$metrics.duration' },\n totalEvents: { $sum: 1 }\n }\n },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$_id.type',\n dailyStats: {\n $push: {\n date: '$_id.date',\n count: '$count',\n avgDuration: '$avgDuration'\n }\n },\n totalCount: { $sum: '$count' }\n }\n },\n { $sort: { totalCount: -1 } }\n ];\n\n return await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.statics.getUserAnalytics = async function(filters = {}) {\n const {\n startDate = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n endDate = new Date(),\n userId\n } = filters;\n\n const matchStage = {\n category: 'user',\n createdAt: { $gte: startDate, $lte: endDate }\n };\n\n if (userId) matchStage.userId = new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(userId);\n\n const pipeline = [\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: {\n userId: '$userId',\n date: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$createdAt' } }\n },\n loginCount: {\n $sum: { $cond: [{ $eq: ['$type', 'user_login'] }, 1, 0] }\n },\n actionCount: {\n $sum: { $cond: [{ $eq: ['$type', 'user_action'] }, 1, 0] }\n },\n totalEvents: { $sum: 1 }\n }\n },\n {\n $lookup: {\n from: 'users',\n localField: '_id.userId',\n foreignField: '_id',\n as: 'user'\n }\n },\n {\n $unwind: '$user'\n },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$_id.userId',\n userName: { $first: '$user.fullName' },\n userEmail: { $first: '$user.email' },\n dailyStats: {\n $push: {\n date: '$_id.date',\n loginCount: '$loginCount',\n actionCount: '$actionCount',\n totalEvents: '$totalEvents'\n }\n },\n totalLogins: { $sum: '$loginCount' },\n totalActions: { $sum: '$actionCount' }\n }\n },\n { $sort: { totalActions: -1 } }\n ];\n\n return await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.statics.getPerformanceMetrics = async function(filters = {}) {\n const {\n startDate = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), // 24 hours ago\n endDate = new Date(),\n type\n } = filters;\n\n const matchStage = {\n category: 'performance',\n createdAt: { $gte: startDate, $lte: endDate }\n };\n\n if (type) matchStage.type = type;\n\n const pipeline = [\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: {\n hour: { $hour: '$createdAt' },\n date: { $dateToString: { format: '%Y-%m-%d', date: '$createdAt' } }\n },\n avgResponseTime: { $avg: '$metrics.responseTime' },\n avgMemoryUsage: { $avg: '$metrics.memoryUsage' },\n avgCpuUsage: { $avg: '$metrics.cpuUsage' },\n errorCount: { $sum: '$metrics.errorCount' },\n successCount: { $sum: '$metrics.successCount' },\n totalRequests: { $sum: 1 }\n }\n },\n {\n $sort: { '_id.date': 1, '_id.hour': 1 }\n }\n ];\n\n return await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.statics.getSystemHealth = async function() {\n const now = new Date();\n const oneHourAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 60 * 60 * 1000);\n\n const pipeline = [\n {\n $match: {\n category: 'system',\n createdAt: { $gte: oneHourAgo }\n }\n },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$type',\n count: { $sum: 1 },\n avgMetrics: {\n $avg: {\n $add: [\n { $ifNull: ['$metrics.responseTime', 0] },\n { $ifNull: ['$metrics.memoryUsage', 0] },\n { $ifNull: ['$metrics.cpuUsage', 0] }\n ]\n }\n },\n errors: { $sum: '$metrics.errorCount' },\n lastEvent: { $max: '$createdAt' }\n }\n }\n ];\n\n return await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.statics.getDashboardStats = async function(userId, userRole) {\n const now = new Date();\n const startOfDay = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());\n const startOfWeek = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n const startOfMonth = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);\n\n const matchStage = {\n createdAt: { $gte: startOfDay }\n };\n\n // Filter by user if not admin\n if (userRole !== 'admin' && userId) {\n matchStage.userId = new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(userId);\n }\n\n const pipeline = [\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $facet: {\n today: [\n { $match: { createdAt: { $gte: startOfDay } } },\n { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } }\n ],\n week: [\n { $match: { createdAt: { $gte: startOfWeek } } },\n { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } }\n ],\n month: [\n { $match: { createdAt: { $gte: startOfMonth } } },\n { $group: { _id: '$category', count: { $sum: 1 } } }\n ],\n recentEvents: [\n { $sort: { createdAt: -1 } },\n { $limit: 10 },\n {\n $project: {\n type: 1,\n category: 1,\n createdAt: 1,\n severity: 1,\n 'data.message': 1\n }\n }\n ]\n }\n }\n ];\n\n return await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n};\n\n// Instance methods\nanalyticsSchema.methods.markAsProcessed = async function() {\n this.processed = true;\n return await this.save();\n};\n\nanalyticsSchema.methods.addTag = async function(tag) {\n if (!this.tags.includes(tag)) {\n this.tags.push(tag);\n return await this.save();\n }\n return this;\n};\n\nmodule.exports = mongoose.model('Analytics', analyticsSchema);"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create the require('express');\nconst Analytics = require('../models/Analytics');\nconst Shipment = require('../models/Shipment');\nconst User = require('../models/User');\nconst { authenticate, authorize, requirePermission } = require('../middleware/auth');\nconst { cacheAnalytics, invalidateAnalyticsCache } = require('../middleware/cache');\nconst socketService = require('../services/socketService');\n\nconst router = express.Router();\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/dashboard\n// @desc Get dashboard analytics\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/dashboard', authenticate, cacheAnalytics, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const userId = req.user._id;\n const userRole = req.user.role;\n\n // Get dashboard statistics\n const dashboardStats = await Analytics.getDashboardStats(userId, userRole);\n \n // Get shipment statistics\n const shipmentStats = await getShipmentStatistics(userId, userRole);\n \n // Get user activity (admin only)\n let userActivity = null;\n if (userRole === 'admin') {\n userActivity = await getUserActivityStats();\n }\n\n // Get system health\n const systemHealth = await Analytics.getSystemHealth();\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n dashboard: dashboardStats[0] || {},\n shipments: shipmentStats,\n userActivity,\n systemHealth,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Dashboard analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching dashboard analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/shipments\n// @desc Get shipment analytics\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/shipments', authenticate, requirePermission('view_analytics'), cacheAnalytics, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const {\n startDate,\n endDate,\n shipmentId,\n groupBy = 'day',\n metrics = 'all'\n } = req.query;\n\n const filters = {\n startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : new Date(),\n userId: req.user.role === 'admin' ? null : req.user._id,\n shipmentId\n };\n\n const analytics = await Analytics.getShipmentAnalytics(filters);\n \n // Get additional shipment metrics\n const shipmentMetrics = await getDetailedShipmentMetrics(filters, groupBy, metrics);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n analytics,\n metrics: shipmentMetrics,\n filters,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Shipment analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching shipment analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/users\n// @desc Get user analytics (admin only)\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/users', authenticate, authorize('admin'), cacheAnalytics, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const {\n startDate,\n endDate,\n userId,\n groupBy = 'day'\n } = req.query;\n\n const filters = {\n startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : new Date(),\n userId\n };\n\n const userAnalytics = await Analytics.getUserAnalytics(filters);\n \n // Get user engagement metrics\n const engagementMetrics = await getUserEngagementMetrics(filters);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n analytics: userAnalytics,\n engagement: engagementMetrics,\n filters,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('User analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching user analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/performance\n// @desc Get performance metrics\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/performance', authenticate, authorize('admin'), cacheAnalytics, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const {\n startDate,\n endDate,\n type,\n interval = 'hour'\n } = req.query;\n\n const filters = {\n startDate: startDate ? new Date(startDate) : new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),\n endDate: endDate ? new Date(endDate) : new Date(),\n type\n };\n\n const performanceMetrics = await Analytics.getPerformanceMetrics(filters);\n \n // Get system resource usage\n const resourceUsage = await getSystemResourceUsage(filters, interval);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n performance: performanceMetrics,\n resources: resourceUsage,\n filters,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Performance analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching performance analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/realtime\n// @desc Get real-time analytics\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/realtime', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { type = 'all' } = req.query;\n \n // Get real-time metrics from the last 5 minutes\n const fiveMinutesAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 5 * 60 * 1000);\n \n const realtimeData = await Analytics.find({\n createdAt: { $gte: fiveMinutesAgo },\n ...(type !== 'all' && { type })\n })\n .sort({ createdAt: -1 })\n .limit(100)\n .lean();\n\n // Get active connections\n const activeConnections = socketService.getConnectedUsers().length;\n \n // Get current system status\n const systemStatus = await getCurrentSystemStatus();\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n events: realtimeData,\n activeConnections,\n systemStatus,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Real-time analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching real-time analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/analytics/event\n// @desc Record analytics event\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/event', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const {\n type,\n category,\n entityId,\n entityType,\n data,\n metadata = {},\n metrics = {},\n tags = [],\n severity = 'low'\n } = req.body;\n\n // Validate required fields\n if (!type || !category || !data) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Type, category, and data are required'\n });\n }\n\n // Create analytics event\n const eventData = {\n type,\n category,\n entityId,\n entityType,\n userId: req.user._id,\n data,\n metadata: {\n ...metadata,\n ipAddress: req.ip,\n userAgent: req.get('User-Agent'),\n source: 'api'\n },\n metrics,\n tags,\n severity\n };\n\n const event = await Analytics.recordEvent(eventData);\n\n // Emit real-time update if needed\n if (severity === 'high' || severity === 'critical') {\n socketService.emitToRole('admin', 'analytics_alert', {\n event: event,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n });\n }\n\n res.status(201).json({\n success: true,\n data: event,\n message: 'Analytics event recorded successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Record analytics event error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error recording analytics event'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/analytics/export\n// @desc Export analytics data\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/export', authenticate, authorize('admin'), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const {\n startDate,\n endDate,\n type,\n category,\n format = 'json'\n } = req.query;\n\n const filters = {\n ...(startDate && { createdAt: { $gte: new Date(startDate) } }),\n ...(endDate && { createdAt: { ...filters.createdAt, $lte: new Date(endDate) } }),\n ...(type && { type }),\n ...(category && { category })\n };\n\n const data = await Analytics.find(filters)\n .sort({ createdAt: -1 })\n .limit(10000) // Limit for performance\n .lean();\n\n if (format === 'csv') {\n // Convert to CSV format\n const csv = convertToCSV(data);\n res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/csv');\n res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', 'attachment; filename=analytics-export.csv');\n return res.send(csv);\n }\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data,\n count: data.length,\n filters,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Export analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error exporting analytics data'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// Helper functions\nasync function getShipmentStatistics(userId, userRole) {\n const matchStage = userRole === 'admin' ? {} : { userId };\n \n const stats = await Shipment.aggregate([\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$status',\n count: { $sum: 1 },\n avgDeliveryTime: {\n $avg: {\n $cond: [\n { $eq: ['$status', 'delivered'] },\n { $subtract: ['$updatedAt', '$createdAt'] },\n null\n ]\n }\n }\n }\n }\n ]);\n\n return stats;\n}\n\nasync function getUserActivityStats() {\n const oneDayAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);\n \n return await User.aggregate([\n {\n $match: {\n lastLogin: { $gte: oneDayAgo }\n }\n },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$role',\n activeUsers: { $sum: 1 },\n avgSessionTime: { $avg: '$sessionDuration' }\n }\n }\n ]);\n}\n\nasync function getDetailedShipmentMetrics(filters, groupBy, metrics) {\n // Implementation for detailed shipment metrics\n // This would include delivery times, route efficiency, etc.\n return {};\n}\n\nasync function getUserEngagementMetrics(filters) {\n // Implementation for user engagement metrics\n return {};\n}\n\nasync function getSystemResourceUsage(filters, interval) {\n // Implementation for system resource usage\n return {};\n}\n\nasync function getCurrentSystemStatus() {\n return {\n uptime: process.uptime(),\n memory: process.memoryUsage(),\n cpu: process.cpuUsage(),\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n}\n\nfunction convertToCSV(data) {\n if (!data.length) return '';\n \n const headers = Object.keys(data[0]);\n const csvContent = [\n headers.join(','),\n ...data.map(row => \n headers.map(header => {\n const value = row[header];\n return typeof value === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(value) : value;\n }).join(',')\n )\n ].join('\\n');\n \n return csvContent;\n}\n\nmodule.exports = router;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create the Analytics routes:

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "cargo-shipment-tracker/src/services/socketService.js", "file_content": "import { io } from 'socket.io-client';\nimport authService from './authService';\n\nclass SocketService {\n constructor() {\n this.socket = null;\n this.isConnected = false;\n this.reconnectAttempts = 0;\n this.maxReconnectAttempts = 5;\n this.eventHandlers = new Map();\n this.subscriptions = new Set();\n }\n\n connect() {\n if (this.socket && this.isConnected) {\n return Promise.resolve(this.socket);\n }\n\n return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n const token = authService.getToken();\n \n if (!token) {\n reject(new Error('No authentication token available'));\n return;\n }\n\n const serverUrl = process.env.REACT_APP_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';\n \n this.socket = io(serverUrl, {\n auth: {\n token: token\n },\n transports: ['websocket', 'polling'],\n timeout: 20000,\n forceNew: true\n });\n\n this.setupEventHandlers();\n\n this.socket.on('connect', () => {\n console.log('Socket.IO connected');\n this.isConnected = true;\n this.reconnectAttempts = 0;\n resolve(this.socket);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('connect_error', (error) => {\n console.error('Socket.IO connection error:', error.message);\n this.isConnected = false;\n \n if (error.message === 'Authentication failed') {\n // Token might be expired, try to refresh\n authService.refreshToken().then(() => {\n this.reconnect();\n }).catch(() => {\n authService.logout();\n reject(error);\n });\n } else {\n reject(error);\n }\n });\n\n this.socket.on('disconnect', (reason) => {\n console.log('Socket.IO disconnected:', reason);\n this.isConnected = false;\n \n if (reason === 'io server disconnect') {\n // Server disconnected, try to reconnect\n this.reconnect();\n }\n });\n });\n }\n\n setupEventHandlers() {\n if (!this.socket) return;\n\n // Connection events\n this.socket.on('connected', (data) => {\n console.log('Socket connection confirmed:', data);\n this.emit('connection_confirmed', data);\n });\n\n // Shipment tracking events\n this.socket.on('shipment_data', (data) => {\n this.emit('shipment_updated', data);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('location_updated', (data) => {\n this.emit('location_updated', data);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('status_updated', (data) => {\n this.emit('status_updated', data);\n });\n\n // Real-time notifications\n this.socket.on('notification', (data) => {\n this.emit('notification_received', data);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('pending_notifications', (data) => {\n this.emit('pending_notifications', data);\n });\n\n // Analytics events\n this.socket.on('analytics_update', (data) => {\n this.emit('analytics_updated', data);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('analytics_alert', (data) => {\n this.emit('analytics_alert', data);\n });\n\n // User status events\n this.socket.on('user_status_changed', (data) => {\n this.emit('user_status_changed', data);\n });\n\n // Message events\n this.socket.on('message_received', (data) => {\n this.emit('message_received', data);\n });\n\n // Error handling\n this.socket.on('error', (error) => {\n console.error('Socket error:', error);\n this.emit('socket_error', error);\n });\n\n // Tracking events\n this.socket.on('tracking_started', (data) => {\n this.emit('tracking_started', data);\n });\n\n this.socket.on('tracking_stopped', (data) => {\n this.emit('tracking_stopped', data);\n });\n }\n\n disconnect() {\n if (this.socket) {\n this.socket.disconnect();\n this.socket = null;\n this.isConnected = false;\n this.subscriptions.clear();\n console.log('Socket.IO disconnected manually');\n }\n }\n\n reconnect() {\n if (this.reconnectAttempts >= this.maxReconnectAttempts) {\n console.error('Max reconnection attempts reached');\n return;\n }\n\n this.reconnectAttempts++;\n console.log(`Attempting to reconnect (${this.reconnectAttempts}/${this.maxReconnectAttempts})...`);\n \n setTimeout(() => {\n this.disconnect();\n this.connect().catch(error => {\n console.error('Reconnection failed:', error);\n });\n }, 1000 * this.reconnectAttempts);\n }\n\n // Event handling\n on(event, handler) {\n if (!this.eventHandlers.has(event)) {\n this.eventHandlers.set(event, new Set());\n }\n this.eventHandlers.get(event).add(handler);\n }\n\n off(event, handler) {\n if (this.eventHandlers.has(event)) {\n this.eventHandlers.get(event).delete(handler);\n }\n }\n\n emit(event, data) {\n if (this.eventHandlers.has(event)) {\n this.eventHandlers.get(event).forEach(handler => {\n try {\n handler(data);\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error in event handler:', error);\n }\n });\n }\n }\n\n // Shipment tracking methods\n trackShipment(shipmentId) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot track shipment');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('track_shipment', { shipmentId });\n this.subscriptions.add(`shipment:${shipmentId}`);\n }\n\n stopTracking(shipmentId) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot stop tracking');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('stop_tracking', { shipmentId });\n this.subscriptions.delete(`shipment:${shipmentId}`);\n }\n\n updateLocation(shipmentId, location, coordinates) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot update location');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('location_update', {\n shipmentId,\n location,\n coordinates\n });\n }\n\n updateStatus(shipmentId, status, notes) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot update status');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('status_update', {\n shipmentId,\n status,\n notes\n });\n }\n\n // Messaging methods\n sendMessage(shipmentId, message, type = 'text') {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot send message');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('send_message', {\n shipmentId,\n message,\n type\n });\n }\n\n // Notification methods\n markNotificationRead(notificationId) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot mark notification as read');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('mark_notification_read', { notificationId });\n }\n\n // Analytics methods\n subscribeToAnalytics(type, filters = {}) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot subscribe to analytics');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('subscribe_analytics', { type, filters });\n this.subscriptions.add(`analytics:${type}`);\n }\n\n unsubscribeFromAnalytics(type) {\n if (!this.isConnected) {\n console.warn('Socket not connected, cannot unsubscribe from analytics');\n return;\n }\n\n this.socket.emit('unsubscribe_analytics', { type });\n this.subscriptions.delete(`analytics:${type}`);\n }\n\n // Utility methods\n getConnectionStatus() {\n return {\n connected: this.isConnected,\n socketId: this.socket?.id,\n subscriptions: Array.from(this.subscriptions),\n reconnectAttempts: this.reconnectAttempts\n };\n }\n\n // Auto-reconnect on auth token refresh\n onTokenRefresh() {\n if (this.socket && this.isConnected) {\n // Disconnect and reconnect with new token\n this.disconnect();\n this.connect().catch(error => {\n console.error('Failed to reconnect after token refresh:', error);\n });\n }\n }\n\n // Cleanup method\n cleanup() {\n this.disconnect();\n this.eventHandlers.clear();\n this.subscriptions.clear();\n }\n}\n\n// Create singleton instance\nconst socketService = new SocketService();\n\n// Auto-connect when auth service initializes\nauthService.on?.('token_refreshed', () => {\n socketService.onTokenRefresh();\n});\n\nexport default socketService;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create the client-side Socket.IO service:

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "cargo-shipment-tracker/src/hooks/useSocket.js", "file_content": "import { useEffect, useRef, useCallback, useState } from 'react';\nimport { useSelector, useDispatch } from 'react-redux';\nimport socketService from '../services/socketService';\nimport { updateShipmentLocation, updateShipmentStatus } from '../store/shipmentSlice';\nimport { addNotification } from '../store/notificationSlice';\n\nexport const useSocket = () => {\n const [isConnected, setIsConnected] = useState(false);\n const [connectionError, setConnectionError] = useState(null);\n const { isAuthenticated } = useSelector(state => state.auth);\n const dispatch = useDispatch();\n const reconnectTimeoutRef = useRef(null);\n\n const connect = useCallback(async () => {\n if (!isAuthenticated) return;\n\n try {\n await socketService.connect();\n setIsConnected(true);\n setConnectionError(null);\n } catch (error) {\n setConnectionError(error.message);\n setIsConnected(false);\n }\n }, [isAuthenticated]);\n\n const disconnect = useCallback(() => {\n socketService.disconnect();\n setIsConnected(false);\n if (reconnectTimeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(reconnectTimeoutRef.current);\n }\n }, []);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isAuthenticated) {\n connect();\n } else {\n disconnect();\n }\n\n return () => {\n disconnect();\n };\n }, [isAuthenticated, connect, disconnect]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n // Set up event handlers\n const handleConnectionConfirmed = (data) => {\n console.log('Socket connection confirmed:', data);\n setIsConnected(true);\n setConnectionError(null);\n };\n\n const handleSocketError = (error) => {\n console.error('Socket error:', error);\n setConnectionError(error.message);\n \n // Attempt to reconnect after a delay\n reconnectTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n if (isAuthenticated) {\n connect();\n }\n }, 5000);\n };\n\n const handleLocationUpdate = (data) => {\n dispatch(updateShipmentLocation({\n shipmentId: data.shipmentId,\n location: data.location,\n coordinates: data.coordinates,\n timestamp: data.timestamp\n }));\n };\n\n const handleStatusUpdate = (data) => {\n dispatch(updateShipmentStatus({\n shipmentId: data.shipmentId,\n status: data.status,\n notes: data.notes,\n timestamp: data.timestamp\n }));\n };\n\n const handleNotification = (data) => {\n dispatch(addNotification({\n id: Date.now(),\n type: data.type || 'info',\n title: data.title,\n message: data.message,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n read: false\n }));\n };\n\n // Register event handlers\n socketService.on('connection_confirmed', handleConnectionConfirmed);\n socketService.on('socket_error', handleSocketError);\n socketService.on('location_updated', handleLocationUpdate);\n socketService.on('status_updated', handleStatusUpdate);\n socketService.on('notification_received', handleNotification);\n\n return () => {\n // Cleanup event handlers\n socketService.off('connection_confirmed', handleConnectionConfirmed);\n socketService.off('socket_error', handleSocketError);\n socketService.off('location_updated', handleLocationUpdate);\n socketService.off('status_updated', handleStatusUpdate);\n socketService.off('notification_received', handleNotification);\n \n if (reconnectTimeoutRef.current) {\n clearTimeout(reconnectTimeoutRef.current);\n }\n };\n }, [dispatch, isAuthenticated, connect]);\n\n return {\n isConnected,\n connectionError,\n connect,\n disconnect,\n socket: socketService\n };\n};\n\nexport const useShipmentTracking = (shipmentId) => {\n const { socket, isConnected } = useSocket();\n const [isTracking, setIsTracking] = useState(false);\n const [trackingData, setTrackingData] = useState(null);\n\n const startTracking = useCallback(() => {\n if (isConnected && shipmentId) {\n socket.trackShipment(shipmentId);\n setIsTracking(true);\n }\n }, [socket, isConnected, shipmentId]);\n\n const stopTracking = useCallback(() => {\n if (isConnected && shipmentId) {\n socket.stopTracking(shipmentId);\n setIsTracking(false);\n }\n }, [socket, isConnected, shipmentId]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (!shipmentId) return;\n\n const handleShipmentData = (data) => {\n if (data.shipmentId === shipmentId) {\n setTrackingData(data);\n }\n };\n\n const handleTrackingStarted = (data) => {\n if (data.shipmentId === shipmentId) {\n setIsTracking(true);\n }\n };\n\n const handleTrackingStopped = (data) => {\n if (data.shipmentId === shipmentId) {\n setIsTracking(false);\n }\n };\n\n socket.on('shipment_data', handleShipmentData);\n socket.on('tracking_started', handleTrackingStarted);\n socket.on('tracking_stopped', handleTrackingStopped);\n\n return () => {\n socket.off('shipment_data', handleShipmentData);\n socket.off('tracking_started', handleTrackingStarted);\n socket.off('tracking_stopped', handleTrackingStopped);\n };\n }, [socket, shipmentId]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n // Auto-start tracking when component mounts\n if (isConnected && shipmentId && !isTracking) {\n startTracking();\n }\n\n return () => {\n // Auto-stop tracking when component unmounts\n if (isTracking) {\n stopTracking();\n }\n };\n }, [isConnected, shipmentId, isTracking, startTracking, stopTracking]);\n\n return {\n isTracking,\n trackingData,\n startTracking,\n stopTracking\n };\n};\n\nexport const useRealTimeNotifications = () => {\n const { socket } = useSocket();\n const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState([]);\n const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0);\n\n const markAsRead = useCallback((notificationId) => {\n socket.markNotificationRead(notificationId);\n setNotifications(prev => \n prev.map(notif => \n notif.id === notificationId \n ? { ...notif, read: true }\n : notif\n )\n );\n setUnreadCount(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1));\n }, [socket]);\n\n const markAllAsRead = useCallback(() => {\n notifications.forEach(notif => {\n if (!notif.read) {\n socket.markNotificationRead(notif.id);\n }\n });\n setNotifications(prev => prev.map(notif => ({ ...notif, read: true })));\n setUnreadCount(0);\n }, [socket, notifications]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const handleNotification = (data) => {\n const notification = {\n id: data.id || Date.now(),\n type: data.type || 'info',\n title: data.title,\n message: data.message,\n timestamp: data.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),\n read: false\n };\n\n setNotifications(prev => [notification, ...prev.slice(0, 49)]); // Keep last 50\n setUnreadCount(prev => prev + 1);\n };\n\n const handlePendingNotifications = (data) => {\n setNotifications(data);\n setUnreadCount(data.filter(notif => !notif.read).length);\n };\n\n const handleNotificationRead = (data) => {\n setNotifications(prev => \n prev.map(notif => \n notif.id === data.notificationId \n ? { ...notif, read: true }\n : notif\n )\n );\n };\n\n socket.on('notification_received', handleNotification);\n socket.on('pending_notifications', handlePendingNotifications);\n socket.on('notification_marked_read', handleNotificationRead);\n\n return () => {\n socket.off('notification_received', handleNotification);\n socket.off('pending_notifications', handlePendingNotifications);\n socket.off('notification_marked_read', handleNotificationRead);\n };\n }, [socket]);\n\n return {\n notifications,\n unreadCount,\n markAsRead,\n markAllAsRead\n };\n};\n\nexport const useRealTimeAnalytics = (type, filters = {}) => {\n const { socket, isConnected } = useSocket();\n const [analyticsData, setAnalyticsData] = useState(null);\n const [isSubscribed, setIsSubscribed] = useState(false);\n\n const subscribe = useCallback(() => {\n if (isConnected && type) {\n socket.subscribeToAnalytics(type, filters);\n setIsSubscribed(true);\n }\n }, [socket, isConnected, type, filters]);\n\n const unsubscribe = useCallback(() => {\n if (isConnected && type) {\n socket.unsubscribeFromAnalytics(type);\n setIsSubscribed(false);\n }\n }, [socket, isConnected, type]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const handleAnalyticsUpdate = (data) => {\n if (data.type === type) {\n setAnalyticsData(data);\n }\n };\n\n const handleAnalyticsAlert = (data) => {\n if (data.type === type) {\n // Handle critical analytics alerts\n console.warn('Analytics Alert:', data);\n }\n };\n\n socket.on('analytics_updated', handleAnalyticsUpdate);\n socket.on('analytics_alert', handleAnalyticsAlert);\n\n return () => {\n socket.off('analytics_updated', handleAnalyticsUpdate);\n socket.off('analytics_alert', handleAnalyticsAlert);\n };\n }, [socket, type]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n if (isConnected && type) {\n subscribe();\n }\n\n return () => {\n if (isSubscribed) {\n unsubscribe();\n }\n };\n }, [isConnected, type, subscribe, unsubscribe, isSubscribed]);\n\n return {\n analyticsData,\n isSubscribed,\n subscribe,\n unsubscribe\n };\n};\n\nexport const useRealTimeMessages = (shipmentId) => {\n const { socket } = useSocket();\n const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);\n\n const sendMessage = useCallback((message, type = 'text') => {\n if (shipmentId) {\n socket.sendMessage(shipmentId, message, type);\n }\n }, [socket, shipmentId]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const handleMessage = (data) => {\n if (data.shipmentId === shipmentId) {\n IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "cargo-shipment-tracker/src/components/RealTimeMap.js", "file_content": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\nimport { MapContainer, TileLayer, Marker, Popup, Polyline, useMap } from 'react-leaflet';\nimport { \n Box, \n Card, \n CardContent, \n Typography, \n Chip, \n IconButton,\n Tooltip,\n Switch,\n FormControlLabel,\n Alert,\n CircularProgress\n} from '@mui/material';\nimport {\n MyLocation as MyLocationIcon,\n Refresh as RefreshIcon,\n Fullscreen as FullscreenIcon,\n FullscreenExit as FullscreenExitIcon,\n Timeline as TimelineIcon\n} from '@mui/icons-material';\nimport L from 'leaflet';\nimport { useShipmentTracking } from '../hooks/useSocket';\nimport { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';\n\n// Custom marker icons\nconst createCustomIcon = (status, isActive = false) => {\n const colors = {\n pending: '#ff9800',\n 'in-transit': '#2196f3',\n delivered: '#4caf50',\n delayed: '#f44336'\n };\n\n const color = colors[status] || '#757575';\n const size = isActive ? 40 : 30;\n \n return L.divIcon({\n html: `\n <div style=\"\n width: ${size}px;\n height: ${size}px;\n background-color: ${color};\n border: 3px solid white;\n border-radius: 50%;\n box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n color: white;\n font-weight: bold;\n font-size: ${size > 30 ? '14px' : '12px'};\n ${isActive ? 'animation: pulse 2s infinite;' : ''}\n \">\n ${status === 'in-transit' ? '\ud83d\ude9b' : status === 'delivered' ? '\u2713' : '\ud83d\udce6'}\n </div>\n <style>\n @keyframes pulse {\n 0% { transform: scale(1); }\n 50% { transform: scale(1.1); }\n 100% { transform: scale(1); }\n }\n </style>\n `,\n className: 'custom-marker',\n iconSize: [size, size],\n iconAnchor: [size / 2, size / 2]\n });\n};\n\n// Map controller component\nconst MapController = ({ center, zoom, onLocationFound }) => {\n const map = useMap();\n\n const centerMap = useCallback(() => {\n if (center) {\n map.setView(center, zoom || 13);\n }\n }, [map, center, zoom]);\n\n const locateUser = useCallback(() => {\n map.locate({ setView: true, maxZoom: 16 });\n }, [map]);\n\n useEffect(() => {\n const handleLocationFound = (e) => {\n onLocationFound?.(e.latlng);\n };\n\n map.on('locationfound', handleLocationFound);\n \n return () => {\n map.off('locationfound', handleLocationFound);\n };\n }, [map, onLocationFound]);\n\n return (\n <Box\n sx={{\n position: 'absolute',\n top: 10,\n right: 10,\n zIndex: 1000,\n display: 'flex',\n flexDirection: 'column',\n gap: 1\n }}\n >\n <Tooltip title=\"Center on shipment\">\n <IconButton\n onClick={centerMap}\n sx={{\n backgroundColor: 'white',\n boxShadow: 2,\n '&:hover': { backgroundColor: 'grey.100' }\n }}\n >\n <RefreshIcon />\n </IconButton>\n </Tooltip>\n \n <Tooltip title=\"Find my location\">\n <IconButton\n onClick={locateUser}\n sx={{\n backgroundColor: 'white',\n boxShadow: 2,\n '&:hover': { backgroundColor: 'grey.100' }\n }}\n >\n <MyLocationIcon />\n </IconButton>\n </Tooltip>\n </Box>\n );\n};\n\nconst RealTimeMap = ({ \n shipmentId, \n height = 400, \n showRoute = true, \n showControls = true,\n autoCenter = true,\n onLocationUpdate \n}) => {\n const [isFullscreen, setIsFullscreen] = useState(false);\n const [showTrail, setShowTrail] = useState(true);\n const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState(null);\n const [mapCenter, setMapCenter] = useState([40.7128, -74.0060]); // Default to NYC\n const [zoom, setZoom] = useState(10);\n const mapRef = useRef(null);\n \n const { \n isTracking, \n trackingData, \n startTracking, \n stopTracking \n } = useShipmentTracking(shipmentId);\n\n // Extract shipment data\n const shipment = trackingData?.shipment;\n const currentLocation = shipment?.currentLocation;\n const route = shipment?.route || [];\n const locationHistory = trackingData?.locationHistory || [];\n\n // Update map center when shipment location changes\n useEffect(() => {\n if (autoCenter && currentLocation?.coordinates) {\n setMapCenter([\n currentLocation.coordinates.lat,\n currentLocation.coordinates.lng\n ]);\n setZoom(13);\n }\n }, [currentLocation, autoCenter]);\n\n // Handle real-time location updates\n useEffect(() => {\n if (currentLocation && onLocationUpdate) {\n onLocationUpdate(currentLocation);\n }\n }, [currentLocation, onLocationUpdate]);\n\n const handleLocationFound = useCallback((latlng) => {\n setUserLocation([latlng.lat, latlng.lng]);\n }, []);\n\n const toggleFullscreen = () => {\n setIsFullscreen(!isFullscreen);\n };\n\n const toggleTracking = () => {\n if (isTracking) {\n stopTracking();\n } else {\n startTracking();\n }\n };\n\n // Create route polyline\n const routeCoordinates = route\n .filter(point => point.coordinates)\n .map(point => [point.coordinates.lat, point.coordinates.lng]);\n\n // Create location history trail\n const trailCoordinates = showTrail \n ? locationHistory\n .filter(point => point.coordinates)\n .map(point => [point.coordinates.lat, point.coordinates.lng])\n : [];\n\n const mapHeight = isFullscreen ? '100vh' : height;\n\n return (\n <Box\n sx={{\n position: isFullscreen ? 'fixed' : 'relative',\n top: isFullscreen ? 0 : 'auto',\n left: isFullscreen ? 0 : 'auto',\n width: isFullscreen ? '100vw' : '100%',\n height: mapHeight,\n zIndex: isFullscreen ? 9999 : 1,\n backgroundColor: 'white'\n }}\n >\n {/* Map Controls */}\n {showControls && (\n <Box\n sx={{\n position: 'absolute',\n top: 10,\n left: 10,\n zIndex: 1000,\n display: 'flex',\n flexDirection: 'column',\n gap: 1\n }}\n >\n <Card sx={{ p: 1 }}>\n <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1 }}>\n <FormControlLabel\n control={\n <Switch\n checked={isTracking}\n onChange={toggleTracking}\n size=\"small\"\n />\n }\n label=\"Live Tracking\"\n sx={{ m: 0 }}\n />\n \n {isTracking && (\n <motion.div\n animate={{ scale: [1, 1.2, 1] }}\n transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 2 }}\n >\n <CircularProgress size={16} />\n </motion.div>\n )}\n </Box>\n </Card>\n\n <Card sx={{ p: 1 }}>\n <FormControlLabel\n control={\n <Switch\n checked={showTrail}\n onChange={(e) => setShowTrail(e.target.checked)}\n size=\"small\"\n />\n }\n label=\"Show Trail\"\n sx={{ m: 0 }}\n />\n </Card>\n\n {shipment && (\n <Card sx={{ p: 1, minWidth: 200 }}>\n <Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"textSecondary\">\n Container: {shipment.containerId}\n </Typography>\n <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 1, mt: 0.5 }}>\n <Chip\n label={shipment.status}\n size=\"small\"\n color={\n shipment.status === 'delivered' ? 'success' :\n shipment.status === 'in-transit' ? 'primary' :\n shipment.status === 'delayed' ? 'error' : 'default'\n }\n />\n {currentLocation?.timestamp && (\n <Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"textSecondary\">\n {new Date(currentLocation.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString()}\n </Typography>\n )}\n </Box>\n </Card>\n )}\n </Box>\n )}\n\n {/* Fullscreen Toggle */}\n <Tooltip title={isFullscreen ? \"Exit fullscreen\" : \"Enter fullscreen\"}>\n <IconButton\n onClick={toggleFullscreen}\n sx={{\n position: 'absolute',\n top: 10,\n right: 60,\n zIndex: 1000,\n backgroundColor: 'white',\n boxShadow: 2,\n '&:hover': { backgroundColor: 'grey.100' }\n }}\n >\n {isFullscreen ? <FullscreenExitIcon /> : <FullscreenIcon />}\n </IconButton>\n </Tooltip>\n\n {/* Map Container */}\n <MapContainer\n ref={mapRef}\n center={mapCenter}\n zoom={zoom}\n style={{ height: '100%', width: '100%' }}\n zoomControl={false}\n >\n <TileLayer\n attribution='© <a href=\"https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright\">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors'\n url=\"https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png\"\n />\n\n <MapController\n center={mapCenter}\n zoom={zoom}\n onLocationFound={handleLocationFound}\n />\n\n {/* Current Location Marker */}\n {currentLocation?.coordinates && (\n <Marker\n position={[\n currentLocation.coordinates.lat,\n currentLocation.coordinates.lng\n ]}\n icon={createCustomIcon(shipment?.status, isTracking)}\n >\n <Popup>\n <Box>\n <Typography variant=\"subtitle2\" fontWeight=\"bold\">\n {shipment?.containerId}\n </Typography>\n <Typography variant=\"body2\">\n Status: {shipment?.status}\n </Typography>\n <Typography variant=\"body2\">\n Location: {currentLocation.location}\n </Typography>\n <Typography variant=\"caption\" color=\"textSecondary\">\n Updated: {new Date(currentLocation.timestamp).toLocaleString()}\n </Typography>\n </Box>\n </Popup>\n </Marker>\n )}\n\n {/* User Location Marker */}\n {userLocation && (\n <Marker\n position={userLocation}\n icon={L.divIcon({\n html: `\n <div style=\"\n width: 20px;\n height: 20px;\n background-color: #2196f3;\n border: 3px solid white;\n border-radius: 50%;\n box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);\n \"></div>\n `,\n iconSize: [20, 20],\n iconAnchor: [10, 10]\n })}\n >\n <Popup>Your Location</Popup>\n </Marker>\n )}\n\n {/* Route Polyline */}\n {showRoute && routeCoordinates.length > 1 && (\n <Polyline\n positions={routeCoordinates}\n color=\"#2196f3\"\n weight={4}\n opacity={0.7}\n dashArray=\"10, 10\"\n />\n )}\n\n {/* Location History Trail */}\n {showTrail && trailCoordinates.length > 1 && (\n <Polyline\n positions={trailCoordinates}\n color=\"#ff9800\"\n weight={3}\n opacity={0.8}\n />\n )}\n\n {/* Route Waypoints */}\n {route.map((waypoint, index) => (\n waypoint.coordinates && (\n <Marker\n key={index}\n position={[waypoint.coordinates.lat, waypoint.coordinates.lng]}\n icon={L.divIcon({\n html: `\n <div style=\"\n width: 24px;\n height: 24px;\n background-color: white;\n border: 2px solid #2196f3;\n border-radius: 50%;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n font-size: 12px;\n font-weight: bold;\n color: #2196f3;\n \">${index + 1}</div>\n `,\n iconSize: [24, 24],\n iconAnchor: [12, 12]\n })}\n >\n <Popup>\n <Box>\n <Typography variant=\"subtitle2\">\n {waypoint.location}\n </Typography>\n {waypoint.arrivalTime && (\n <Typography variant=\"caption\">\n Arrival: {new Date(waypoint.arrivalTime).toLocaleString()}\n </Typography>\n )}\n {waypoint.departureTime && (\n <Typography variant=\"caption\" display=\"block\">\n Departure: {new Date(waypoint.departureTime).toLocaleString()}\n </Typography>\n )}\n </Box>\n </Popup>\n </Marker>\n )\n ))}\n </MapContainer>\n\n {/* Connection Status */}\n <AnimatePresence>\n {!isTracking && shipmentId && (\n <motion.div\n initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}\n animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}\n exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 50 }}\n style={{\n position: 'absolute',\n bottom: 20,\n left: '50%',\n transform: 'translateX(-50%)',\n zIndex: 1000\n }}\n >\n <Alert \n severity=\"info\" \n action={\n <IconButton\n color=\"inherit\"\n size=\"small\"\n onClick={startTracking}\n >\n <TimelineIcon />\n </IconButton>\n }\n >\n Real-time tracking is disabled. Click to enable live updates.\n </Alert>\n </motion.div>\n )}\n </AnimatePresence>\n </Box>\n );\n};\n\nexport default RealTimeMap;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Now let me create a Real-Time Map component:

1) * limit;\n const shipments = await Shipment.find(query)\n .sort({ createdAt: -1 })\n .skip(skip)\n .limit(parseInt(limit));\n \n const total = await Shipment.countDocuments(query);\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'shipment_query',\n category: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: { query, resultCount: shipments.length },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: shipments,\n pagination: {\n page: parseInt(page),\n limit: parseInt(limit),\n total,\n pages: Math.ceil(total / limit)\n }\n });\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get shipments error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({ \n success: false, \n message: 'Error fetching shipments' \n });\n }\n});", "old_str_start_line_number": 12, "old_str_end_line_number": 20}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":""},{"id":2,"type":2,"content":""},{"id":3,"type":3,"content":""}],"seen_state":"seen","structured_request_nodes":[{"id":1,"type":1,"tool_result_node":{"content":"Successfully edited the file routes/shipment.routes.js.

IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": "cargo-shipment-tracker/src/store/notificationSlice.js", "file_content": "import { createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';\nimport axios from 'axios';\n\nconst API_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000/api';\n\n// Async thunks\nexport const fetchNotifications = createAsyncThunk(\n 'notifications/fetchNotifications',\n async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {\n try {\n const response = await axios.get(`${API_URL}/notifications`);\n return response.data.data;\n } catch (error) {\n return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch notifications');\n }\n }\n);\n\nexport const markNotificationAsRead = createAsyncThunk(\n 'notifications/markAsRead',\n async (notificationId, { rejectWithValue }) => {\n try {\n const response = await axios.patch(`${API_URL}/notifications/${notificationId}/read`);\n return response.data.data;\n } catch (error) {\n return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to mark notification as read');\n }\n }\n);\n\nexport const markAllNotificationsAsRead = createAsyncThunk(\n 'notifications/markAllAsRead',\n async (_, { rejectWithValue }) => {\n try {\n const response = await axios.patch(`${API_URL}/notifications/mark-all-read`);\n return response.data.data;\n } catch (error) {\n return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to mark all notifications as read');\n }\n }\n);\n\nexport const deleteNotification = createAsyncThunk(\n 'notifications/deleteNotification',\n async (notificationId, { rejectWithValue }) => {\n try {\n await axios.delete(`${API_URL}/notifications/${notificationId}`);\n return notificationId;\n } catch (error) {\n return rejectWithValue(error.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to delete notification');\n }\n }\n);\n\nconst initialState = {\n notifications: [],\n unreadCount: 0,\n status: 'idle',\n error: null,\n lastFetch: null,\n settings: {\n enableSound: true,\n enableDesktop: true,\n enableEmail: true,\n autoMarkAsRead: false,\n maxNotifications: 50\n }\n};\n\nconst notificationSlice = createSlice({\n name: 'notifications',\n initialState,\n reducers: {\n addNotification: (state, action) => {\n const notification = {\n id: action.payload.id || Date.now(),\n type: action.payload.type || 'info',\n title: action.payload.title,\n message: action.payload.message,\n timestamp: action.payload.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),\n read: action.payload.read || false,\n priority: action.payload.priority || 'normal',\n category: action.payload.category || 'general',\n actions: action.payload.actions || [],\n metadata: action.payload.metadata || {}\n };\n\n // Add to beginning of array\n state.notifications.unshift(notification);\n \n // Keep only the latest notifications based on settings\n if (state.notifications.length > state.settings.maxNotifications) {\n state.notifications = state.notifications.slice(0, state.settings.maxNotifications);\n }\n \n // Update unread count\n if (!notification.read) {\n state.unreadCount += 1;\n }\n\n // Play sound if enabled\n if (state.settings.enableSound && !notification.read) {\n // This would trigger a sound effect\n // Implementation depends on your audio setup\n }\n\n // Show desktop notification if enabled\n if (state.settings.enableDesktop && !notification.read && 'Notification' in window) {\n if (Notification.permission === 'granted') {\n new Notification(notification.title, {\n body: notification.message,\n icon: '/favicon.ico',\n tag: notification.id\n });\n }\n }\n },\n\n markAsRead: (state, action) => {\n const notificationId = action.payload;\n const notification = state.notifications.find(n => n.id === notificationId);\n \n if (notification && !notification.read) {\n notification.read = true;\n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);\n }\n },\n\n markAllAsRead: (state) => {\n state.notifications.forEach(notification => {\n notification.read = true;\n });\n state.unreadCount = 0;\n },\n\n removeNotification: (state, action) => {\n const notificationId = action.payload;\n const index = state.notifications.findIndex(n => n.id === notificationId);\n \n if (index !== -1) {\n const notification = state.notifications[index];\n if (!notification.read) {\n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);\n }\n state.notifications.splice(index, 1);\n }\n },\n\n clearAllNotifications: (state) => {\n state.notifications = [];\n state.unreadCount = 0;\n },\n\n updateSettings: (state, action) => {\n state.settings = { ...state.settings, ...action.payload };\n },\n\n setNotifications: (state, action) => {\n state.notifications = action.payload;\n state.unreadCount = action.payload.filter(n => !n.read).length;\n },\n\n updateUnreadCount: (state, action) => {\n state.unreadCount = action.payload;\n },\n\n // Real-time notification handlers\n handleRealtimeNotification: (state, action) => {\n const notification = action.payload;\n \n // Check if notification already exists\n const existingIndex = state.notifications.findIndex(n => n.id === notification.id);\n \n if (existingIndex === -1) {\n // Add new notification\n notificationSlice.caseReducers.addNotification(state, { payload: notification });\n } else {\n // Update existing notification\n state.notifications[existingIndex] = { ...state.notifications[existingIndex], ...notification };\n }\n },\n\n // Filter notifications\n filterNotifications: (state, action) => {\n const { type, category, read, priority } = action.payload;\n \n let filtered = [...state.notifications];\n \n if (type) {\n filtered = filtered.filter(n => n.type === type);\n }\n \n if (category) {\n filtered = filtered.filter(n => n.category === category);\n }\n \n if (read !== undefined) {\n filtered = filtered.filter(n => n.read === read);\n }\n \n if (priority) {\n filtered = filtered.filter(n => n.priority === priority);\n }\n \n return filtered;\n },\n\n // Batch operations\n batchMarkAsRead: (state, action) => {\n const notificationIds = action.payload;\n let markedCount = 0;\n \n state.notifications.forEach(notification => {\n if (notificationIds.includes(notification.id) && !notification.read) {\n notification.read = true;\n markedCount++;\n }\n });\n \n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - markedCount);\n },\n\n batchDelete: (state, action) => {\n const notificationIds = action.payload;\n let deletedUnreadCount = 0;\n \n state.notifications = state.notifications.filter(notification => {\n if (notificationIds.includes(notification.id)) {\n if (!notification.read) {\n deletedUnreadCount++;\n }\n return false;\n }\n return true;\n });\n \n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - deletedUnreadCount);\n }\n },\n\n extraReducers: (builder) => {\n builder\n // Fetch notifications\n .addCase(fetchNotifications.pending, (state) => {\n state.status = 'loading';\n state.error = null;\n })\n .addCase(fetchNotifications.fulfilled, (state, action) => {\n state.status = 'succeeded';\n state.notifications = action.payload;\n state.unreadCount = action.payload.filter(n => !n.read).length;\n state.lastFetch = new Date().toISOString();\n })\n .addCase(fetchNotifications.rejected, (state, action) => {\n state.status = 'failed';\n state.error = action.payload;\n })\n\n // Mark as read\n .addCase(markNotificationAsRead.fulfilled, (state, action) => {\n const notification = state.notifications.find(n => n.id === action.payload.id);\n if (notification && !notification.read) {\n notification.read = true;\n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);\n }\n })\n\n // Mark all as read\n .addCase(markAllNotificationsAsRead.fulfilled, (state) => {\n state.notifications.forEach(notification => {\n notification.read = true;\n });\n state.unreadCount = 0;\n })\n\n // Delete notification\n .addCase(deleteNotification.fulfilled, (state, action) => {\n const notificationId = action.payload;\n const index = state.notifications.findIndex(n => n.id === notificationId);\n \n if (index !== -1) {\n const notification = state.notifications[index];\n if (!notification.read) {\n state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1);\n }\n state.notifications.splice(index, 1);\n }\n });\n }\n});\n\nexport const {\n addNotification,\n markAsRead,\n markAllAsRead,\n removeNotification,\n clearAllNotifications,\n updateSettings,\n setNotifications,\n updateUnreadCount,\n handleRealtimeNotification,\n filterNotifications,\n batchMarkAsRead,\n batchDelete\n} = notificationSlice.actions;\n\n// Selectors\nexport const selectNotifications = (state) => state.notifications.notifications;\nexport const selectUnreadCount = (state) => state.notifications.unreadCount;\nexport const selectNotificationStatus = (state) => state.notifications.status;\nexport const selectNotificationError = (state) => state.notifications.error;\nexport const selectNotificationSettings = (state) => state.notifications.settings;\n\nexport const selectUnreadNotifications = (state) => \n state.notifications.notifications.filter(n => !n.read);\n\nexport const selectNotificationsByType = (type) => (state) =>\n state.notifications.notifications.filter(n => n.type === type);\n\nexport const selectNotificationsByCategory = (category) => (state) =>\n state.notifications.notifications.filter(n => n.category === category);\n\nexport const selectRecentNotifications =
