require('crypto');\n\n/**\n * Blockchain Service for Supply Chain Transparency\n * Provides immutable tracking, smart contracts, and verification\n */\n\nclass BlockchainService {\n constructor() {\n this.chain = [];\n this.pendingTransactions = [];\n this.miningReward = 100;\n this.difficulty = 2;\n this.smartContracts = new Map();\n this.validators = new Set();\n \n // Create genesis block\n this.createGenesisBlock();\n }\n\n createGenesisBlock() {\n const genesisBlock = new Block(0, Date.now(), [], '0');\n genesisBlock.hash = this.calculateHash(genesisBlock);\n this.chain.push(genesisBlock);\n }\n\n getLatestBlock() {\n return this.chain[this.chain.length - 1];\n }\n\n /**\n * Record shipment event on blockchain\n */\n async recordShipmentEvent(shipmentId, eventType, data, organizationId) {\n try {\n const transaction = new ShipmentTransaction(\n shipmentId,\n eventType,\n data,\n organizationId,\n Date.now()\n );\n\n // Add digital signature\n transaction.signature = this.signTransaction(transaction);\n \n this.pendingTransactions.push(transaction);\n\n // Auto-mine if enough transactions\n if (this.pendingTransactions.length >= 5) {\n await this.minePendingTransactions();\n }\n\n return transaction;\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Error recording shipment event:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Create smart contract for shipment\n */\n async createShipmentContract(shipmentData) {\n const contractId = this.generateContractId();\n \n const contract = new SmartContract(contractId, {\n type: 'shipment_tracking',\n shipmentId: shipmentData.shipmentId,\n organizationId: shipmentData.organizationId,\n conditions: {\n deliveryDeadline: shipmentData.eta,\n temperatureRange: shipmentData.temperatureRange,\n routeCompliance: shipmentData.allowedRoutes,\n customsCompliance: shipmentData.customsRequirements\n },\n penalties: {\n lateDelivery: shipmentData.lateDeliveryPenalty || 0,\n temperatureBreach: shipmentData.temperaturePenalty || 0,\n routeDeviation: shipmentData.routePenalty || 0\n },\n rewards: {\n onTimeDelivery: shipmentData.onTimeBonus || 0,\n earlyDelivery: shipmentData.earlyBonus || 0,\n perfectConditions: shipmentData.perfectBonus || 0\n },\n stakeholders: shipmentData.stakeholders || []\n });\n\n this.smartContracts.set(contractId, contract);\n \n // Record contract creation on blockchain\n await this.recordShipmentEvent(\n shipmentData.shipmentId,\n 'contract_created',\n { contractId, terms: contract.terms },\n shipmentData.organizationId\n );\n\n return contract;\n }\n\n /**\n * Execute smart contract conditions\n */\n async executeContract(contractId, eventData) {\n const contract = this.smartContracts.get(contractId);\n if (!contract) {\n throw new Error('Contract not found');\n }\n\n const results = await contract.execute(eventData);\n \n // Record execution on blockchain\n await this.recordShipmentEvent(\n contract.terms.shipmentId,\n 'contract_executed',\n { contractId, results, eventData },\n contract.terms.organizationId\n );\n\n return results;\n }\n\n /**\n * Verify shipment authenticity\n */\n async verifyShipment(shipmentId) {\n const shipmentEvents = this.getShipmentHistory(shipmentId);\n \n const verification = {\n isValid: true,\n events: shipmentEvents.length,\n firstEvent: shipmentEvents[0]?.timestamp,\n lastEvent: shipmentEvents[shipmentEvents.length - 1]?.timestamp,\n integrityChecks: [],\n anomalies: []\n };\n\n // Verify each event\n for (const event of shipmentEvents) {\n const isValid = this.verifyTransaction(event);\n verification.integrityChecks.push({\n eventId: event.id,\n isValid,\n timestamp: event.timestamp\n });\n\n if (!isValid) {\n verification.isValid = false;\n verification.anomalies.push({\n type: 'invalid_signature',\n eventId: event.id,\n timestamp: event.timestamp\n });\n }\n }\n\n // Check for timeline anomalies\n this.detectTimelineAnomalies(shipmentEvents, verification);\n \n // Check for location anomalies\n this.detectLocationAnomalies(shipmentEvents, verification);\n\n return verification;\n }\n\n /**\n * Get complete shipment history from blockchain\n */\n getShipmentHistory(shipmentId) {\n const history = [];\n \n for (const block of this.chain) {\n for (const transaction of block.transactions) {\n if (transaction.shipmentId === shipmentId) {\n history.push({\n id: transaction.id,\n eventType: transaction.eventType,\n data: transaction.data,\n timestamp: transaction.timestamp,\n blockHash: block.hash,\n blockIndex: block.index,\n signature: transaction.signature\n });\n }\n }\n }\n\n return history.sort((a, b) => a.timestamp - b.timestamp);\n }\n\n /**\n * Generate proof of authenticity\n */\n generateProofOfAuthenticity(shipmentId) {\n const history = this.getShipmentHistory(shipmentId);\n const verification = this.verifyShipment(shipmentId);\n \n const proof = {\n shipmentId,\n generatedAt: Date.now(),\n totalEvents: history.length,\n verificationStatus: verification.isValid ? 'VERIFIED' : 'INVALID',\n blockchainHash: this.calculateChainHash(),\n eventHashes: history.map(event => ({\n eventType: event.eventType,\n timestamp: event.timestamp,\n hash: this.calculateEventHash(event)\n })),\n digitalSignature: null\n };\n\n // Sign the proof\n proof.digitalSignature = this.signData(JSON.stringify(proof));\n \n return proof;\n }\n\n /**\n * Mine pending transactions\n */\n async minePendingTransactions() {\n const block = new Block(\n this.getLatestBlock().index + 1,\n Date.now(),\n this.pendingTransactions,\n this.getLatestBlock().hash\n );\n\n block.mineBlock(this.difficulty);\n \n this.chain.push(block);\n this.pendingTransactions = [];\n\n return block;\n }\n\n /**\n * Validate blockchain integrity\n */\n isChainValid() {\n for (let i = 1; i < this.chain.length; i++) {\n const currentBlock = this.chain[i];\n const previousBlock = this.chain[i - 1];\n\n if (currentBlock.hash !== this.calculateHash(currentBlock)) {\n return false;\n }\n\n if (currentBlock.previousHash !== previousBlock.hash) {\n return false;\n }\n }\n\n return true;\n }\n\n // Helper methods\n calculateHash(block) {\n return crypto\n .createHash('sha256')\n .update(block.index + block.previousHash + block.timestamp + JSON.stringify(block.transactions) + block.nonce)\n .digest('hex');\n }\n\n calculateChainHash() {\n const chainData = this.chain.map(block => block.hash).join('');\n return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(chainData).digest('hex');\n }\n\n calculateEventHash(event) {\n return crypto\n .createHash('sha256')\n .update(JSON.stringify(event))\n .digest('hex');\n }\n\n signTransaction(transaction) {\n const transactionData = JSON.stringify({\n shipmentId: transaction.shipmentId,\n eventType: transaction.eventType,\n data: transaction.data,\n timestamp: transaction.timestamp\n });\n \n return this.signData(transactionData);\n }\n\n signData(data) {\n // In production, use proper private key signing\n return crypto\n .createHash('sha256')\n .update(data + process.env.BLOCKCHAIN_PRIVATE_KEY || 'default-key')\n .digest('hex');\n }\n\n verifyTransaction(transaction) {\n const expectedSignature = this.signTransaction(transaction);\n return transaction.signature === expectedSignature;\n }\n\n generateContractId() {\n return crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');\n }\n\n detectTimelineAnomalies(events, verification) {\n for (let i = 1; i < events.length; i++) {\n const timeDiff = events[i].timestamp - events[i - 1].timestamp;\n \n // Check for impossible time gaps (negative or too large)\n if (timeDiff < 0) {\n verification.anomalies.push({\n type: 'negative_time_gap',\n events: [events[i - 1].id, events[i].id],\n timeDiff\n });\n verification.isValid = false;\n }\n \n if (timeDiff > 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) { // 30 days\n verification.anomalies.push({\n type: 'excessive_time_gap',\n events: [events[i - 1].id, events[i].id],\n timeDiff\n });\n }\n }\n }\n\n detectLocationAnomalies(events, verification) {\n const locationEvents = events.filter(e => e.data.location);\n \n for (let i = 1; i < locationEvents.length; i++) {\n const prev = locationEvents[i - 1];\n const curr = locationEvents[i];\n \n if (prev.data.coordinates && curr.data.coordinates) {\n const distance = this.calculateDistance(\n prev.data.coordinates,\n curr.data.coordinates\n );\n \n const timeDiff = (curr.timestamp - prev.timestamp) / 1000 / 3600; // hours\n const speed = distance / timeDiff; // km/h\n \n // Check for impossible speeds (>500 km/h for ground transport)\n if (speed > 500) {\n verification.anomalies.push({\n type: 'impossible_speed',\n events: [prev.id, curr.id],\n speed,\n distance,\n timeDiff\n });\n }\n }\n }\n }\n\n calculateDistance(coord1, coord2) {\n const R = 6371; // Earth's radius in km\n const dLat = (coord2.lat - coord1.lat) * Math.PI / 180;\n const dLon = (coord2.lng - coord1.lng) * Math.PI / 180;\n const a = Math.sin(dLat / 2) * Math.sin(dLat / 2) +\n Math.cos(coord1.lat * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(coord2.lat * Math.PI / 180) *\n Math.sin(dLon / 2) * Math.sin(dLon / 2);\n const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));\n return R * c;\n }\n}\n\n// Block class\nclass Block {\n constructor(index, timestamp, transactions, previousHash = '') {\n this.index = index;\n this.timestamp = timestamp;\n this.transactions = transactions;\n this.previousHash = previousHash;\n this.nonce = 0;\n this.hash = '';\n }\n\n mineBlock(difficulty) {\n const target = Array(difficulty + 1).join('0');\n \n while (this.hash.substring(0, difficulty) !== target) {\n this.nonce++;\n this.hash = this.calculateHash();\n }\n }\n\n calculateHash() {\n return crypto\n .createHash('sha256')\n .update(this.index + this.previousHash + this.timestamp + JSON.stringify(this.transactions) + this.nonce)\n .digest('hex');\n }\n}\n\n// Shipment Transaction class\nclass ShipmentTransaction {\n constructor(shipmentId, eventType, data, organizationId, timestamp) {\n this.id = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');\n this.shipmentId = shipmentId;\n this.eventType = eventType;\n this.data = data;\n this.organizationId = organizationId;\n this.timestamp = timestamp;\n this.signature = null;\n }\n}\n\n// Smart Contract class\nclass SmartContract {\n constructor(id, terms) {\n this.id = id;\n this.terms = terms;\n this.status = 'active';\n this.executions = [];\n this.createdAt = Date.now();\n }\n\n async execute(eventData) {\n const results = {\n contractId: this.id,\n eventType: eventData.eventType,\n timestamp: Date.now(),\n conditions: [],\n penalties: 0,\n rewards: 0,\n actions: []\n };\n\n // Check delivery deadline\n if (eventData.eventType === 'delivered') {\n const deliveryTime = eventData.timestamp;\n const deadline = this.terms.conditions.deliveryDeadline;\n \n if (deliveryTime <= deadline) {\n results.rewards += this.terms.rewards.onTimeDelivery;\n results.conditions.push({\n type: 'on_time_delivery',\n met: true,\n reward: this.terms.rewards.onTimeDelivery\n });\n } else {\n results.penalties += this.terms.penalties.lateDelivery;\n results.conditions.push({\n type: 'late_delivery',\n met: false,\n penalty: this.terms.penalties.lateDelivery\n });\n }\n }\n\n // Check temperature conditions\n if (eventData.data.temperature && this.terms.conditions.temperatureRange) {\n const temp = eventData.data.temperature;\n const range = this.terms.conditions.temperatureRange;\n \n if (temp < range.min || temp > range.max) {\n results.penalties += this.terms.penalties.temperatureBreach;\n results.conditions.push({\n type: 'temperature_breach',\n met: false,\n penalty: this.terms.penalties.temperatureBreach,\n actual: temp,\n required: range\n });\n }\n }\n\n this.executions.push(results);\n return results;\n }\n}\n\n// Create singleton instance\nconst blockchainService = new BlockchainService();\n\nmodule.exports = blockchainService;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"Let me proceed with the implementation and require('sharp');\nconst fs = require('fs').promises;\nconst path = require('path');\n\n/**\n * Computer Vision Service for Document Processing and Image Analysis\n * Provides OCR, document classification, damage detection, and quality control\n */\n\nclass ComputerVisionService {\n constructor() {\n this.supportedFormats = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'pdf', 'tiff'];\n this.documentTypes = {\n 'bill_of_lading': {\n keywords: ['bill of lading', 'b/l', 'shipper', 'consignee', 'vessel'],\n confidence: 0.8\n },\n 'commercial_invoice': {\n keywords: ['commercial invoice', 'invoice', 'total amount', 'payment terms'],\n confidence: 0.8\n },\n 'packing_list': {\n keywords: ['packing list', 'package', 'quantity', 'weight', 'dimensions'],\n confidence: 0.7\n },\n 'customs_declaration': {\n keywords: ['customs', 'declaration', 'tariff', 'duty', 'import', 'export'],\n confidence: 0.8\n },\n 'delivery_receipt': {\n keywords: ['delivery', 'receipt', 'received', 'signature', 'date delivered'],\n confidence: 0.7\n },\n 'damage_report': {\n keywords: ['damage', 'broken', 'defect', 'condition', 'inspection'],\n confidence: 0.8\n }\n };\n }\n\n /**\n * Process uploaded document\n */\n async processDocument(filePath, documentType = null) {\n try {\n const fileExtension = path.extname(filePath).toLowerCase().slice(1);\n \n if (!this.supportedFormats.includes(fileExtension)) {\n throw new Error(`Unsupported file format: ${fileExtension}`);\n }\n\n // Preprocess image\n const processedImagePath = await this.preprocessImage(filePath);\n \n // Extract text using OCR\n const extractedText = await this.performOCR(processedImagePath);\n \n // Classify document if type not provided\n const classification = documentType || await this.classifyDocument(extractedText);\n \n // Extract structured data based on document type\n const structuredData = await this.extractStructuredData(extractedText, classification);\n \n // Validate extracted data\n const validation = await this.validateExtractedData(structuredData, classification);\n \n // Clean up processed image\n await this.cleanup(processedImagePath);\n\n return {\n success: true,\n documentType: classification,\n extractedText,\n structuredData,\n validation,\n confidence: validation.overallConfidence,\n processedAt: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Document processing error:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Analyze cargo images for damage detection\n */\n async analyzeCargo(imagePath, cargoType = 'general') {\n try {\n // Preprocess image for analysis\n const processedImage = await this.preprocessForAnalysis(imagePath);\n \n // Detect damage indicators\n const damageAnalysis = await this.detectDamage(processedImage, cargoType);\n \n // Analyze packaging condition\n const packagingAnalysis = await this.analyzePackaging(processedImage);\n \n // Quality assessment\n const qualityScore = await this.assessQuality(processedImage, cargoType);\n \n // Generate recommendations\n const recommendations = this.generateRecommendations(damageAnalysis, packagingAnalysis, qualityScore);\n\n return {\n success: true,\n cargoType,\n damageAnalysis,\n packagingAnalysis,\n qualityScore,\n recommendations,\n analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Cargo analysis error:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Extract text from QR codes and barcodes\n */\n async extractCodes(imagePath) {\n try {\n // Preprocess image for code detection\n const processedImage = await this.preprocessForCodes(imagePath);\n \n // Detect and decode QR codes\n const qrCodes = await this.detectQRCodes(processedImage);\n \n // Detect and decode barcodes\n const barcodes = await this.detectBarcodes(processedImage);\n \n return {\n success: true,\n qrCodes,\n barcodes,\n totalCodes: qrCodes.length + barcodes.length,\n extractedAt: new Date().toISOString()\n };\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Code extraction error:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Preprocess image for better OCR results\n */\n async preprocessImage(inputPath) {\n const outputPath = inputPath.replace(/\\.[^/.]+$/, '_processed.jpg');\n \n await sharp(inputPath)\n .resize(2000, null, { \n withoutEnlargement: true,\n fit: 'inside'\n })\n .normalize()\n .sharpen()\n .greyscale()\n .threshold(128)\n .jpeg({ quality: 95 })\n .toFile(outputPath);\n \n return outputPath;\n }\n\n /**\n * Perform OCR on processed image\n */\n async performOCR(imagePath) {\n // Simulated OCR - in production, integrate with Tesseract.js or cloud OCR\n try {\n // This would be replaced with actual OCR implementation\n const mockOCRResults = {\n 'bill_of_lading': `\n BILL OF LADING\n Shipper: ABC Logistics Inc.\n Consignee: XYZ Manufacturing Ltd.\n Vessel: CARGO STAR\n Port of Loading: Los Angeles\n Port of Discharge: Shanghai\n Container No: ABCD1234567\n Seal No: 12345\n Gross Weight: 15,000 KG\n Measurement: 25 CBM\n `,\n 'commercial_invoice': `\n COMMERCIAL INVOICE\n Invoice No: INV-2024-001\n Date: ${new Date().toLocaleDateString()}\n Seller: Global Trade Corp\n Buyer: International Imports LLC\n Total Amount: $25,000.00\n Payment Terms: 30 Days Net\n Incoterms: FOB\n `,\n 'default': `\n Document contains text that requires processing.\n Various fields and data points detected.\n Quality: Good\n Confidence: High\n `\n };\n\n // Simulate processing delay\n await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n \n return mockOCRResults.default;\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('OCR processing error:', error);\n throw error;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Classify document type based on extracted text\n */\n async classifyDocument(text) {\n const textLower = text.toLowerCase();\n let bestMatch = 'unknown';\n let highestScore = 0;\n\n for (const [docType, config] of Object.entries(this.documentTypes)) {\n let score = 0;\n let matchedKeywords = 0;\n\n for (const keyword of config.keywords) {\n if (textLower.includes(keyword.toLowerCase())) {\n matchedKeywords++;\n score += 1 / config.keywords.length;\n }\n }\n\n // Boost score if multiple keywords match\n if (matchedKeywords > 1) {\n score *= 1.2;\n }\n\n if (score > highestScore && score >= config.confidence) {\n highestScore = score;\n bestMatch = docType;\n }\n }\n\n return {\n type: bestMatch,\n confidence: highestScore,\n alternativeTypes: this.getAlternativeTypes(text)\n };\n }\n\n /**\n * Extract structured data based on document type\n */\n async extractStructuredData(text, classification) {\n const docType = classification.type || classification;\n \n switch (docType) {\n case 'bill_of_lading':\n return this.extractBillOfLadingData(text);\n case 'commercial_invoice':\n return this.extractInvoiceData(text);\n case 'packing_list':\n return this.extractPackingListData(text);\n case 'customs_declaration':\n return this.extractCustomsData(text);\n case 'delivery_receipt':\n return this.extractDeliveryReceiptData(text);\n default:\n return this.extractGenericData(text);\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Extract Bill of Lading specific data\n */\n extractBillOfLadingData(text) {\n const data = {\n shipper: this.extractField(text, ['shipper', 'from']),\n consignee: this.extractField(text, ['consignee', 'to', 'receiver']),\n vessel: this.extractField(text, ['vessel', 'ship']),\n voyage: this.extractField(text, ['voyage', 'trip']),\n portOfLoading: this.extractField(text, ['port of loading', 'loading port']),\n portOfDischarge: this.extractField(text, ['port of discharge', 'discharge port']),\n containerNumber: this.extractField(text, ['container', 'container no']),\n sealNumber: this.extractField(text, ['seal', 'seal no']),\n grossWeight: this.extractField(text, ['gross weight', 'weight']),\n measurement: this.extractField(text, ['measurement', 'volume', 'cbm']),\n freightTerms: this.extractField(text, ['freight', 'prepaid', 'collect'])\n };\n\n return data;\n }\n\n /**\n * Extract Commercial Invoice data\n */\n extractInvoiceData(text) {\n const data = {\n invoiceNumber: this.extractField(text, ['invoice no', 'invoice number']),\n date: this.extractField(text, ['date', 'invoice date']),\n seller: this.extractField(text, ['seller', 'vendor', 'from']),\n buyer: this.extractField(text, ['buyer', 'purchaser', 'to']),\n totalAmount: this.extractField(text, ['total', 'amount', 'sum']),\n currency: this.extractField(text, ['usd', 'eur', 'currency']),\n paymentTerms: this.extractField(text, ['payment terms', 'terms']),\n incoterms: this.extractField(text, ['incoterms', 'fob', 'cif', 'exw'])\n };\n\n return data;\n }\n\n /**\n * Detect damage in cargo images\n */\n async detectDamage(imagePath, cargoType) {\n // Simulated damage detection - in production, use ML models\n const damageIndicators = {\n scratches: Math.random() > 0.8,\n dents: Math.random() > 0.9,\n waterDamage: Math.random() > 0.95,\n packaging: Math.random() > 0.7,\n labels: Math.random() > 0.85\n };\n\n const severity = this.calculateDamageSeverity(damageIndicators);\n \n return {\n detected: Object.values(damageIndicators).some(Boolean),\n indicators: damageIndicators,\n severity,\n confidence: 0.85,\n recommendations: this.getDamageRecommendations(damageIndicators, severity)\n };\n }\n\n /**\n * Analyze packaging condition\n */\n async analyzePackaging(imagePath) {\n return {\n condition: 'good', // 'excellent', 'good', 'fair', 'poor'\n integrity: 0.9,\n labelsReadable: true,\n sealIntact: true,\n recommendations: []\n };\n }\n\n /**\n * Assess overall quality\n */\n async assessQuality(imagePath, cargoType) {\n return {\n overall: 0.85,\n visual: 0.9,\n packaging: 0.8,\n documentation: 0.85,\n grade: 'A' // A, B, C, D\n };\n }\n\n // Helper methods\n extractField(text, keywords) {\n for (const keyword of keywords) {\n const regex = new RegExp(`${keyword}[:\\\\s]*([^\\\\n\\\\r]+)`, 'i');\n const match = text.match(regex);\n if (match) {\n return match[1].trim();\n }\n }\n return null;\n }\n\n getAlternativeTypes(text) {\n const alternatives = [];\n const textLower = text.toLowerCase();\n\n for (const [docType, config] of Object.entries(this.documentTypes)) {\n let score = 0;\n for (const keyword of config.keywords) {\n if (textLower.includes(keyword.toLowerCase())) {\n score += 1 / config.keywords.length;\n }\n }\n if (score > 0.3) {\n alternatives.push({ type: docType, confidence: score });\n }\n }\n\n return alternatives.sort((a, b) => b.confidence - a.confidence).slice(0, 3);\n }\n\n async validateExtractedData(data, classification) {\n const validation = {\n isValid: true,\n errors: [],\n warnings: [],\n completeness: 0,\n overallConfidence: 0.8\n };\n\n const fields = Object.keys(data);\n const filledFields = fields.filter(field => data[field] !== null && data[field] !== '');\n \n validation.completeness = filledFields.length / fields.length;\n \n if (validation.completeness < 0.5) {\n validation.warnings.push('Low data completeness - manual review recommended');\n }\n\n return validation;\n }\n\n calculateDamageSeverity(indicators) {\n const weights = {\n scratches: 0.2,\n dents: 0.3,\n waterDamage: 0.4,\n packaging: 0.3,\n labels: 0.1\n };\n\n let severity = 0;\n for (const [indicator, detected] of Object.entries(indicators)) {\n if (detected) {\n severity += weights[indicator] || 0.1;\n }\n }\n\n if (severity === 0) return 'none';\n if (severity < 0.3) return 'minor';\n if (severity < 0.6) return 'moderate';\n return 'severe';\n }\n\n getDamageRecommendations(indicators, severity) {\n const recommendations = [];\n \n if (indicators.waterDamage) {\n recommendations.push('Immediate inspection required - water damage detected');\n }\n if (indicators.packaging) {\n recommendations.push('Repackaging may be necessary');\n }\n if (severity === 'severe') {\n recommendations.push('Consider insurance claim documentation');\n }\n\n return recommendations;\n }\n\n generateRecommendations(damageAnalysis, packagingAnalysis, qualityScore) {\n const recommendations = [];\n \n if (damageAnalysis.detected) {\n recommendations.push(...damageAnalysis.recommendations);\n }\n \n if (packagingAnalysis.condition === 'poor') {\n recommendations.push('Immediate repackaging required');\n }\n \n if (qualityScore.overall < 0.7) {\n recommendations.push('Quality inspection recommended');\n }\n\n return recommendations;\n }\n\n async cleanup(filePath) {\n try {\n await fs.unlink(filePath);\n } catch (error) {\n console.warn('Cleanup warning:', error.message);\n }\n }\n\n // Placeholder methods for additional functionality\n async preprocessForAnalysis(imagePath) { return imagePath; }\n async preprocessForCodes(imagePath) { return imagePath; }\n async detectQRCodes(imagePath) { return []; }\n async detectBarcodes(imagePath) { return []; }\n extractPackingListData(text) { return {}; }\n extractCustomsData(text) { return {}; }\n extractDeliveryReceiptData(text) { return {}; }\n extractGenericData(text) { return { content: text }; }\n}\n\n// Create singleton instance\nconst computerVisionService = new ComputerVisionService();\n\nmodule.exports = computerVisionService;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## 2. },\n bestInClass: {\n carbonIntensity: Number,\n energyIntensity: Number,\n wasteIntensity: Number\n },\n performance: {\n carbonRanking: { type: String, enum: ['top_10', 'top_25', 'top_50', 'below_average'] },\n energyRanking: { type: String, enum: ['top_10', 'top_25', 'top_50', 'below_average'] },\n wasteRanking: { type: String, enum: ['top_10', 'top_25', 'top_50', 'below_average'] }\n }\n },\n calculationMethod: {\n carbonFactors: {\n diesel: { type: Number, default: 2.68 }, // kg CO2 per liter\n gasoline: { type: Number, default: 2.31 },\n electricity: { type: Number, default: 0.5 }, // kg CO2 per kWh (varies by region)\n naturalGas: { type: Number, default: 2.0 }\n },\n methodology: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['ghg_protocol', 'iso14064', 'ipcc', 'custom'],\n default: 'ghg_protocol'\n },\n lastUpdated: { type: Date, default: Date.now }\n }\n}, {\n timestamps: true,\n collection: 'sustainability_metrics'\n});\n\n// Indexes\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.index({ organizationId: 1, period: 1, createdAt: -1 });\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.index({ shipmentId: 1 });\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.index({ 'carbonFootprint.total': -1 });\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.index({ 'esgScores.overall': -1 });\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.index({ createdAt: -1 });\n\n// Virtual for carbon intensity\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.virtual('carbonIntensity').get(function() {\n if (this.transportation.distance > 0) {\n return this.carbonFootprint.total / this.transportation.distance;\n }\n return 0;\n});\n\n// Virtual for energy efficiency\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.virtual('energyEfficiency').get(function() {\n if (this.transportation.distance > 0) {\n return this.energyConsumption.total / this.transportation.distance;\n }\n return 0;\n});\n\n// Methods\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.methods.calculateCarbonFootprint = function() {\n const factors = this.calculationMethod.carbonFactors;\n \n // Transportation emissions\n this.carbonFootprint.transportation = \n (this.fuelConsumption.diesel * factors.diesel) +\n (this.fuelConsumption.gasoline * factors.gasoline) +\n (this.fuelConsumption.naturalGas * factors.naturalGas) +\n (this.fuelConsumption.electric * factors.electricity);\n \n // Packaging emissions (estimated)\n this.carbonFootprint.packaging = this.packaging.totalWeight * 0.5; // kg CO2 per kg packaging\n \n // Warehousing emissions (estimated)\n this.carbonFootprint.warehousing = this.energyConsumption.total * factors.electricity * 0.1;\n \n // Total emissions\n this.carbonFootprint.total = \n this.carbonFootprint.transportation +\n this.carbonFootprint.packaging +\n this.carbonFootprint.warehousing +\n this.carbonFootprint.lastMile;\n \n return this.carbonFootprint.total;\n};\n\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.methods.calculateESGScore = function() {\n // Environmental score (40% weight)\n const envScore = this.calculateEnvironmentalScore();\n \n // Social score (30% weight) - placeholder\n const socialScore = 75; // Would be calculated based on social metrics\n \n // Governance score (30% weight) - placeholder\n const governanceScore = 80; // Would be calculated based on governance metrics\n \n this.esgScores.environmental = envScore;\n this.esgScores.social = socialScore;\n this.esgScores.governance = governanceScore;\n this.esgScores.overall = (envScore * 0.4) + (socialScore * 0.3) + (governanceScore * 0.3);\n \n return this.esgScores.overall;\n};\n\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.methods.calculateEnvironmentalScore = function() {\n let score = 100;\n \n // Carbon intensity penalty\n if (this.carbonIntensity > 0.5) score -= 20;\n else if (this.carbonIntensity > 0.3) score -= 10;\n \n // Renewable energy bonus\n score += this.energyConsumption.renewablePercentage * 0.2;\n \n // Recycling rate bonus\n score += this.wasteGeneration.recyclingRate * 0.15;\n \n // Certification bonuses\n if (this.certifications.iso14001) score += 5;\n if (this.certifications.carbonNeutral) score += 10;\n if (this.certifications.renewableEnergy) score += 5;\n \n return Math.min(100, Math.max(0, score));\n};\n\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.methods.updateTargetProgress = function() {\n // Carbon reduction progress\n if (this.targets.carbonReduction.baseline > 0) {\n const reduction = ((this.targets.carbonReduction.baseline - this.carbonFootprint.total) / this.targets.carbonReduction.baseline) * 100;\n this.targets.carbonReduction.current = Math.max(0, reduction);\n this.targets.carbonReduction.achieved = reduction >= this.targets.carbonReduction.target;\n }\n \n // Renewable energy progress\n this.targets.renewableEnergy.current = this.energyConsumption.renewablePercentage;\n this.targets.renewableEnergy.achieved = this.energyConsumption.renewablePercentage >= this.targets.renewableEnergy.target;\n \n // Waste reduction progress\n if (this.targets.wasteReduction.baseline > 0) {\n const reduction = ((this.targets.wasteReduction.baseline - this.wasteGeneration.total) / this.targets.wasteReduction.baseline) * 100;\n this.targets.wasteReduction.current = Math.max(0, reduction);\n this.targets.wasteReduction.achieved = reduction >= this.targets.wasteReduction.target;\n }\n};\n\n// Static methods\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.statics.getOrganizationSummary = async function(organizationId, period = 'monthly') {\n const pipeline = [\n { $match: { organizationId: new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(organizationId), period } },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: null,\n totalCarbon: { $sum: '$carbonFootprint.total' },\n totalEnergy: { $sum: '$energyConsumption.total' },\n totalWaste: { $sum: '$wasteGeneration.total' },\n avgESGScore: { $avg: '$esgScores.overall' },\n renewablePercentage: { $avg: '$energyConsumption.renewablePercentage' },\n recyclingRate: { $avg: '$wasteGeneration.recyclingRate' },\n shipmentCount: { $sum: 1 }\n }\n }\n ];\n \n const result = await this.aggregate(pipeline);\n return result[0] || {};\n};\n\nsustainabilityMetricsSchema.statics.getBenchmarkData = async function(organizationId) {\n // Get industry benchmarks\n const industryData = await this.aggregate([\n { $match: { organizationId: { $ne: new mongoose.Types.ObjectId(organizationId) } } },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: null,\n avgCarbonIntensity: { $avg: { $divide: ['$carbonFootprint.total', '$transportation.distance'] } },\n avgEnergyIntensity: { $avg: { $divide: ['$energyConsumption.total', '$transportation.distance'] } },\n avgWasteIntensity: { $avg: { $divide: ['$wasteGeneration.total', '$transportation.distance'] } }\n }\n }\n ]);\n \n return industryData[0] || {};\n};\n\nmodule.exports = mongoose.model('SustainabilityMetrics', sustainabilityMetricsSchema);"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## 3. Convert currency amount\n */\n async convertCurrency(amount, fromCurrency, toCurrency) {\n if (fromCurrency === toCurrency) {\n return amount;\n }\n\n await this.ensureRatesUpdated();\n\n const fromRate = this.exchangeRates.get(fromCurrency) || 1;\n const toRate = this.exchangeRates.get(toCurrency) || 1;\n\n // Convert to USD first, then to target currency\n const usdAmount = amount / fromRate;\n const convertedAmount = usdAmount * toRate;\n\n return Math.round(convertedAmount * 100) / 100; // Round to 2 decimals\n }\n\n /**\n * Format currency amount for display\n */\n formatCurrency(amount, currency, language = 'en') {\n const currencyInfo = this.supportedCurrencies[currency];\n if (!currencyInfo) {\n return `${amount} ${currency}`;\n }\n\n try {\n return new Intl.NumberFormat(this.getLocaleCode(language), {\n style: 'currency',\n currency: currency,\n minimumFractionDigits: currencyInfo.decimals,\n maximumFractionDigits: currencyInfo.decimals\n }).format(amount);\n } catch (error) {\n // Fallback formatting\n return `${currencyInfo.symbol}${amount.toFixed(currencyInfo.decimals)}`;\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Format date for specific locale\n */\n formatDate(date, language = 'en', options = {}) {\n const defaultOptions = {\n year: 'numeric',\n month: 'long',\n day: 'numeric',\n ...options\n };\n\n try {\n return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(this.getLocaleCode(language), defaultOptions).format(new Date(date));\n } catch (error) {\n return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString();\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Format number for specific locale\n */\n formatNumber(number, language = 'en', options = {}) {\n try {\n return new Intl.NumberFormat(this.getLocaleCode(language), options).format(number);\n } catch (error) {\n return number.toString();\n }\n }\n\n /**\n * Get user's preferred settings based on location/browser\n */\n detectUserPreferences(request) {\n const preferences = {\n language: 'en',\n currency: 'USD',\n timezone: 'UTC',\n dateFormat: 'MM/DD/YYYY'\n };\n\n // Detect language from Accept-Language header\n const acceptLanguage = request.headers['accept-language'];\n if (acceptLanguage) {\n const languages = acceptLanguage.split(',').map(lang => lang.split(';')[0].trim());\n for (const lang of languages) {\n const langCode = lang.split('-')[0];\n if (this.supportedLanguages[langCode]) {\n preferences.language = langCode;\n break;\n }\n }\n }\n\n // Detect currency/region from IP or other headers\n const country = this.detectCountryFromIP(request.ip);\n if (country) {\n timeFormat: '12h'\n },\n 'GB': {\n units: 'mixed',\n weightUnit: 'kg',\n distanceUnit: 'miles',\n temperatureUnit: 'celsius',\n dateFormat: 'DD/MM/YYYY',\n timeFormat: '24h'\n },\n 'DE': {\n units: 'metric',\n weightUnit: 'kg',\n distanceUnit: 'km',\n temperatureUnit: 'celsius',\n dateFormat: 'DD.MM.YYYY',\n timeFormat: '24h'\n },\n 'JP': {\n units: 'metric',\n weightUnit: 'kg',\n distanceUnit: return countryCurrencies[country] || 'USD';\n }\n\n getTimezoneForCountry(country) {\n const countryTimezones = {\n 'US': 'America/New_York',\n 'GB': 'Europe/London',\n 'DE': 'Europe/Berlin',\n 'JP': 'Asia/Tokyo',\n 'CN': 'Asia/Shanghai',\n 'AU': 'Australia/Sydney'\n };\n\n return countryTimezones[country] || 'UTC';\n }\n\n getDateFormatForCountry(country) {\n const countryDateFormats = {\n 'US': require('mongoose');\n\nconst partnerIntegrationSchema = new mongoose.Schema({\n organizationId: {\n type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId,\n ref: 'Organization',\n required: true\n },\n partnerId: {\n type: String,\n required: true,\n unique: true\n },\n partnerName: {\n type: String,\n required: true\n },\n partnerType: {\n type: String,\n enum: [\n 'shipping_carrier',\n 'logistics_provider',\n 'customs_broker',\n 'freight_forwarder',\n 'warehouse_provider',\n 'payment_processor',\n 'insurance_provider',\n 'tracking_service',\n 'erp_system',\n 'ecommerce_platform',\n 'marketplace',\n 'api_service',\n 'iot_provider',\n 'analytics_service'\n ],\n required: true\n },\n category: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['transportation', 'technology', 'financial', 'compliance', 'marketplace'],\n required: true\n },\n status: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'suspended', 'testing'],\n default: 'pending'\n },\n integrationLevel: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['basic', 'standard', 'premium', 'enterprise'],\n default: 'basic'\n },\n configuration: {\n apiEndpoint: String,\n apiVersion: String,\n authentication: {\n type: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['api_key', 'oauth2', 'jwt', 'basic_auth', 'custom'],\n default: 'api_key'\n },\n credentials: {\n apiKey: String,\n clientId: String,\n clientSecret: String,\n accessToken: String,\n refreshToken: String,\n username: String,\n password: String\n },\n tokenExpiry: Date,\n scopes: [String]\n },\n webhooks: {\n enabled: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n url: String,\n secret: String,\n events: [String],\n retryPolicy: {\n maxRetries: { type: Number, default: 3 },\n retryDelay: { type: Number, default: 1000 }\n }\n },\n rateLimits: {\n requestsPerMinute: { type: Number, default: 60 },\n requestsPerHour: { type: Number, default: 1000 },\n requestsPerDay: { type: Number, default: 10000 }\n },\n timeout: { type: Number, default: 30000 }, // milliseconds\n retryConfig: {\n enabled: { type: Boolean, default: true },\n maxRetries: { type: Number, default: 3 },\n backoffStrategy: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['linear', 'exponential', 'fixed'],\n default: 'exponential'\n }\n }\n },\n capabilities: {\n tracking: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n rateQuoting: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n booking: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n documentation: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n customs: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n insurance: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n payment: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n analytics: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n realTimeUpdates: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n bulkOperations: { type: Boolean, default: false }\n },\n serviceAreas: {\n global: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n regions: [String], // ['north_america', 'europe', 'asia_pacific', etc.]\n countries: [String], // ISO country codes\n ports: [String],\n airports: [String]\n },\n pricing: {\n model: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['free', 'per_transaction', 'monthly_subscription', 'annual_subscription', 'usage_based', 'custom'],\n default: 'per_transaction'\n },\n baseCost: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n transactionFee: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n monthlyFee: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n annualFee: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n currency: { type: String, default: 'USD' },\n freeTransactions: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n discountTiers: [{\n minVolume: Number,\n discountPercentage: Number\n }]\n },\n dataMapping: {\n inbound: {\n shipmentStatus: String,\n trackingNumber: String,\n location: String,\n estimatedDelivery: String,\n actualDelivery: String,\n events: String\n },\n outbound: {\n shipmentData: String,\n customerData: String,\n addressData: String,\n itemData: String\n },\n transformations: [{\n field: String,\n sourceFormat: String,\n targetFormat: String,\n transformation: String // JavaScript function as string\n }]\n },\n compliance: {\n certifications: [String], // ['ISO27001', 'SOC2', 'GDPR', etc.]\n dataResidency: [String], // Countries where data can be stored\n encryptionStandards: [String],\n auditFrequency: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['monthly', 'quarterly', 'annually'],\n default: 'annually'\n },\n lastAudit: Date,\n nextAudit: Date,\n complianceScore: { type: Number, min: 0, max: 100, default: 0 }\n },\n performance: {\n availability: { type: Number, min: 0, max: 100, default: 99.9 }, // percentage\n averageResponseTime: { type: Number, default: 0 }, // milliseconds\n errorRate: { type: Number, min: 0, max: 100, default: 0 }, // percentage\n throughput: { type: Number, default: 0 }, // requests per second\n lastHealthCheck: Date,\n healthStatus: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['healthy', 'degraded', 'unhealthy', 'unknown'],\n default: 'unknown'\n }\n },\n usage: {\n totalRequests: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n successfulRequests: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n failedRequests: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n lastRequestTime: Date,\n monthlyUsage: [{\n month: String, // YYYY-MM format\n requests: Number,\n cost: Number,\n errors: Number\n }],\n quotaUsed: { type: Number, default: 0 },\n quotaLimit: { type: Number, default: 1000 }\n },\n support: {\n contactEmail: String,\n contactPhone: String,\n supportUrl: String,\n documentationUrl: String,\n statusPageUrl: String,\n supportLevel: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['basic', 'standard', 'premium', 'enterprise'],\n default: 'basic'\n },\n responseTime: {\n type: String,\n enum: ['24h', '12h', '4h', '1h', 'real_time'],\n default: '24h'\n }\n },\n testing: {\n sandboxAvailable: { type: Boolean, default: false },\n sandboxEndpoint: String,\n testCredentials: {\n apiKey: String,\n username: String,\n password: String\n },\n testScenarios: [{\n name: String,\n description: String,\n testData: mongoose.Schema.Types.Mixed,\n expectedResult: mongoose.Schema.Types.Mixed\n }]\n },\n metadata: {\n version: { type: String, default: '1.0.0' },\n lastUpdated: { type: Date, default: Date.now },\n integrationDate: { type: Date, default: Date.now },\n notes: String,\n tags: [String],\n customFields: mongoose.Schema.Types.Mixed\n }\n}, {\n timestamps: true,\n collection: 'partner_integrations'\n});\n\n// Indexes\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ organizationId: 1, partnerType: 1 });\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ partnerId: 1 }, { unique: true });\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ status: 1 });\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ partnerType: 1, category: 1 });\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ 'serviceAreas.countries': 1 });\npartnerIntegrationSchema.index({ createdAt: -1 });\n\n// Virtual for integration health score\npartnerIntegrationSchema.virtual('healthScore').get(function() {\n let score = 100;\n \n // Availability impact\n score *= (this.performance.availability / 100);\n \n // Error rate impact\n score *= (1 - this.performance.errorRate / 100);\n \n // Response time impact (penalize if > 5 seconds)\n if (this.performance.averageResponseTime > 5000) {\n score *= 0.8;\n }\n \n // Compliance score impact\n score *= (this.compliance.complianceScore / 100);\n \n return Math.round(score);\n});\n\n// Virtual for cost efficiency\npartnerIntegrationSchema.virtual('costEfficiency').get(function() {\n if (this.usage.totalRequests === 0) return 0;\n \n const currentMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);\n const monthlyData = this.usage.monthlyUsage.find(m => m.month === currentMonth);\n \n if (!monthlyData || monthlyData.requests === 0) return 0;\n \n return monthlyData.cost / monthlyData.requests;\n});\n\n// Methods\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.updateUsageStats = function(success, responseTime, cost = 0) {\n this.usage.totalRequests += 1;\n this.usage.lastRequestTime = new Date();\n \n if (success) {\n this.usage.successfulRequests += 1;\n } else {\n this.usage.failedRequests += 1;\n }\n \n // Update performance metrics\n this.performance.errorRate = (this.usage.failedRequests / this.usage.totalRequests) * 100;\n this.performance.averageResponseTime = \n (this.performance.averageResponseTime + responseTime) / 2;\n \n // Update monthly usage\n const currentMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);\n let monthlyData = this.usage.monthlyUsage.find(m => m.month === currentMonth);\n \n if (!monthlyData) {\n monthlyData = { month: currentMonth, requests: 0, cost: 0, errors: 0 };\n this.usage.monthlyUsage.push(monthlyData);\n }\n \n monthlyData.requests += 1;\n monthlyData.cost += cost;\n if (!success) monthlyData.errors += 1;\n \n return this.save();\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.checkQuotaLimit = function() {\n return this.usage.quotaUsed < this.usage.quotaLimit;\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.incrementQuota = function(amount = 1) {\n this.usage.quotaUsed += amount;\n return this.usage.quotaUsed <= this.usage.quotaLimit;\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.resetMonthlyQuota = function() {\n this.usage.quotaUsed = 0;\n return this.save();\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.updateHealthStatus = function(status, responseTime) {\n this.performance.healthStatus = status;\n this.performance.lastHealthCheck = new Date();\n \n if (responseTime) {\n this.performance.averageResponseTime = responseTime;\n }\n \n return this.save();\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.methods.isRateLimited = function() {\n const now = Date.now();\n const oneMinute = 60 * 1000;\n const oneHour = 60 * oneMinute;\n const oneDay = 24 * oneHour;\n \n // Check requests in last minute/hour/day\n // This would need to be implemented with a proper rate limiting store\n return false; // Placeholder\n};\n\n// Static methods\npartnerIntegrationSchema.statics.findByType = function(partnerType, organizationId = null) {\n const query = { partnerType, status: 'active' };\n if (organizationId) {\n query.organizationId = organizationId;\n }\n return this.find(query);\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.statics.findByServiceArea = function(country, region = null) {\n const query = {\n status: 'active',\n $or: [\n { 'serviceAreas.global': true },\n { 'serviceAreas.countries': country }\n ]\n };\n \n if (region) {\n query.$or.push({ 'serviceAreas.regions': region });\n }\n \n return this.find(query);\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.statics.getHealthSummary = async function(organizationId) {\n const integrations = await this.find({ organizationId });\n \n const summary = {\n total: integrations.length,\n healthy: 0,\n degraded: 0,\n unhealthy: 0,\n averageHealth: 0,\n totalRequests: 0,\n totalCost: 0\n };\n \n let totalHealthScore = 0;\n \n integrations.forEach(integration => {\n const health = integration.performance.healthStatus;\n summary[health] = (summary[health] || 0) + 1;\n \n totalHealthScore += integration.healthScore;\n summary.totalRequests += integration.usage.totalRequests;\n \n const currentMonth = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 7);\n const monthlyData = integration.usage.monthlyUsage.find(m => m.month === currentMonth);\n if (monthlyData) {\n summary.totalCost += monthlyData.cost;\n }\n });\n \n summary.averageHealth = integrations.length > 0 ? totalHealthScore / integrations.length : 0;\n \n return summary;\n};\n\npartnerIntegrationSchema.statics.findRecommendations = async function(organizationId, requirements) {\n const query = {\n status: 'active',\n organizationId: { $ne: organizationId } // Exclude current org's integrations\n };\n \n // Add capability filters\n if (requirements.capabilities) {\n Object.keys(requirements.capabilities).forEach(capability => {\n if (requirements.capabilities[capability]) {\n query[`capabilities.${capability}`] = true;\n }\n });\n }\n \n // Add service area filters\n if (requirements.serviceArea) {\n query.$or = [\n { 'serviceAreas.global': true },\n { 'serviceAreas.countries': requirements.serviceArea.country },\n { 'serviceAreas.regions': requirements.serviceArea.region }\n ];\n }\n \n const recommendations = await this.find(query)\n .sort({ 'performance.availability': -1, 'compliance.complianceScore': -1 })\n .limit(10);\n \n return recommendations;\n};\n\nmodule.exports = mongoose.model('PartnerIntegration', partnerIntegrationSchema);"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## 5. require('express');\nconst blockchainService = require('../services/blockchainService');\nconst Shipment = require('../models/Shipment');\nconst Analytics = require('../models/Analytics');\nconst { authenticate, authorize, requirePermission } = require('../middleware/auth');\nconst { cacheResponse, invalidateCache } = require('../middleware/cache');\nconst { body, validationResult } = require('express-validator');\n\nconst router = express.Router();\n\n// @route POST /api/blockchain/record-event\n// @desc Record shipment event on blockchain\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/record-event', authenticate, [\n body('shipmentId').isMongoId().withMessage('Valid shipment ID required'),\n body('eventType').isIn(['created', 'picked_up', 'in_transit', 'customs_cleared', 'delivered', 'damaged', 'delayed']).withMessage('Invalid event type'),\n body('data').isObject().withMessage('Event data must be an object')\n], async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const errors = validationResult(req);\n if (!errors.isEmpty()) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Validation failed',\n errors: errors.array()\n });\n }\n\n const { shipmentId, eventType, data } = req.body;\n\n // Verify shipment exists and user has access\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Record event on blockchain\n const transaction = await blockchainService.recordShipmentEvent(\n shipmentId,\n eventType,\n {\n ...data,\n userId: req.user._id,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n location: data.location || shipment.currentLocation?.location,\n coordinates: data.coordinates || shipment.currentLocation?.coordinates\n },\n req.user.organizationId\n );\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'blockchain_event_recorded',\n category: 'blockchain',\n entityId: shipmentId,\n entityType: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n eventType,\n transactionId: transaction.id,\n blockchainHash: transaction.signature\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n transactionId: transaction.id,\n signature: transaction.signature,\n timestamp: transaction.timestamp\n },\n message: 'Event recorded on blockchain successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Record blockchain event error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error recording event on blockchain'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/blockchain/create-contract\n// @desc Create smart contract for shipment\n// @access Private (Admin/Operator)\nrouter.post('/create-contract', authenticate, requirePermission('manage_iot'), [\n body('shipmentId').isMongoId().withMessage('Valid shipment ID required'),\n body('conditions').isObject().withMessage('Contract conditions required'),\n body('stakeholders').isArray().withMessage('Stakeholders must be an array')\n], async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const errors = validationResult(req);\n if (!errors.isEmpty()) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Validation failed',\n errors: errors.array()\n });\n }\n\n const { shipmentId, conditions, stakeholders, penalties = {}, rewards = {} } = req.body;\n\n // Verify shipment exists\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Create smart contract\n const contract = await blockchainService.createShipmentContract({\n shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId,\n eta: shipment.eta,\n temperatureRange: conditions.temperatureRange,\n allowedRoutes: conditions.allowedRoutes,\n customsRequirements: conditions.customsRequirements,\n lateDeliveryPenalty: penalties.lateDelivery || 0,\n temperaturePenalty: penalties.temperatureBreach || 0,\n routePenalty: penalties.routeDeviation || 0,\n onTimeBonus: rewards.onTimeDelivery || 0,\n earlyBonus: rewards.earlyDelivery || 0,\n perfectBonus: rewards.perfectConditions || 0,\n stakeholders\n });\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'smart_contract_created',\n category: 'blockchain',\n entityId: shipmentId,\n entityType: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n contractId: contract.id,\n stakeholders: stakeholders.length,\n conditions: Object.keys(conditions)\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.status(201).json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n contractId: contract.id,\n terms: contract.terms,\n status: contract.status,\n createdAt: contract.createdAt\n },\n message: 'Smart contract created successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Create smart contract error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error creating smart contract'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/blockchain/execute-contract\n// @desc Execute smart contract conditions\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/execute-contract/:contractId', authenticate, [\n body('eventData').isObject().withMessage('Event data required for contract execution')\n], async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const errors = validationResult(req);\n if (!errors.isEmpty()) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Validation failed',\n errors: errors.array()\n });\n }\n\n const { contractId } = req.params;\n const { eventData } = req.body;\n\n // Execute smart contract\n const results = await blockchainService.executeContract(contractId, {\n ...eventData,\n executedBy: req.user._id,\n timestamp: new Date().toISOString()\n });\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'smart_contract_executed',\n category: 'blockchain',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n contractId,\n eventType: eventData.eventType,\n penalties: results.penalties,\n rewards: results.rewards,\n conditionsMet: results.conditions.length\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: results,\n message: 'Smart contract executed successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Execute smart contract error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error executing smart contract'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/blockchain/shipment/:shipmentId/history\n// @desc Get complete blockchain history for shipment\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/shipment/:shipmentId/history', authenticate, cacheResponse({ ttl: 300 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { shipmentId } = req.params;\n\n // Verify shipment access\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Get blockchain history\n const history = blockchainService.getShipmentHistory(shipmentId);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n totalEvents: history.length,\n events: history,\n chainIntegrity: blockchainService.isChainValid()\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get blockchain history error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching blockchain history'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/blockchain/shipment/:shipmentId/verify\n// @desc Verify shipment authenticity and integrity\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/shipment/:shipmentId/verify', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { shipmentId } = req.params;\n\n // Verify shipment access\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Verify shipment on blockchain\n const verification = await blockchainService.verifyShipment(shipmentId);\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'shipment_verification',\n category: 'blockchain',\n entityId: shipmentId,\n entityType: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n isValid: verification.isValid,\n eventsVerified: verification.events,\n anomaliesFound: verification.anomalies.length\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: verification\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Verify shipment error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error verifying shipment'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/blockchain/shipment/:shipmentId/proof\n// @desc Generate proof of authenticity certificate\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/shipment/:shipmentId/proof', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { shipmentId } = req.params;\n\n // Verify shipment access\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Generate proof of authenticity\n const proof = blockchainService.generateProofOfAuthenticity(shipmentId);\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'proof_generated',\n category: 'blockchain',\n entityId: shipmentId,\n entityType: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n proofHash: proof.blockchainHash,\n totalEvents: proof.totalEvents,\n verificationStatus: proof.verificationStatus\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: proof,\n message: 'Proof of authenticity generated successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Generate proof error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error generating proof of authenticity'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/blockchain/chain/status\n// @desc Get blockchain status and health\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/chain/status', authenticate, authorize('admin'), cacheResponse({ ttl: 60 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const status = {\n chainLength: blockchainService.chain.length,\n pendingTransactions: blockchainService.pendingTransactions.length,\n isValid: blockchainService.isChainValid(),\n difficulty: blockchainService.difficulty,\n lastBlock: blockchainService.getLatestBlock(),\n smartContracts: blockchainService.smartContracts.size,\n validators: blockchainService.validators.size\n };\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: status\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get blockchain status error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching blockchain status'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/blockchain/mine\n// @desc Manually trigger mining of pending transactions\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.post('/mine', authenticate, authorize('admin'), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n if (blockchainService.pendingTransactions.length === 0) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'No pending transactions to mine'\n });\n }\n\n const block = await blockchainService.minePendingTransactions();\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'blockchain_mining',\n category: 'blockchain',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n blockIndex: block.index,\n transactionCount: block.transactions.length,\n blockHash: block.hash,\n nonce: block.nonce\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n blockIndex: block.index,\n blockHash: block.hash,\n transactionCount: block.transactions.length,\n timestamp: block.timestamp\n },\n message: 'Block mined successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Mine block error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error mining block'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/blockchain/analytics\n// @desc Get blockchain analytics and metrics\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/analytics', authenticate, authorize('admin'), cacheResponse({ ttl: 600 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { startDate, endDate } = req.query;\n \n const dateFilter = {};\n if (startDate) dateFilter.$gte = new Date(startDate);\n if (endDate) dateFilter.$lte = new Date(endDate);\n\n const matchStage = {\n type: { $in: ['blockchain_event_recorded', 'smart_contract_created', 'smart_contract_executed', 'shipment_verification'] }\n };\n\n if (Object.keys(dateFilter).length > 0) {\n matchStage.createdAt = dateFilter;\n }\n\n const analytics = await Analytics.aggregate([\n { $match: matchStage },\n {\n $group: {\n _id: '$type',\n count: { $sum: 1 },\n organizations: { $addToSet: '$data.organizationId' },\n avgResponseTime: { $avg: '$metadata.responseTime' }\n }\n }\n ]);\n\n const summary = {\n totalEvents: blockchainService.chain.reduce((sum, block) => sum + block.transactions.length, 0),\n totalBlocks: blockchainService.chain.length,\n chainIntegrity: blockchainService.isChainValid(),\n smartContracts: blockchainService.smartContracts.size,\n pendingTransactions: blockchainService.pendingTransactions.length,\n analytics\n };\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: summary\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get blockchain analytics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching blockchain analytics'\n });\n }\n});\n\nmodule.exports = router;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## 6. require('express');\nconst SustainabilityMetrics = require('../models/SustainabilityMetrics');\nconst Shipment = require('../models/Shipment');\nconst Analytics = require('../models/Analytics');\nconst { authenticate, authorize, requirePermission } = require('../middleware/auth');\nconst { cacheResponse, invalidateCache } = require('../middleware/cache');\nconst { body, validationResult } = require('express-validator');\n\nconst router = express.Router();\n\n// @route GET /api/sustainability/dashboard\n// @desc Get sustainability dashboard data\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/dashboard', authenticate, cacheResponse({ ttl: 300 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { period = 'monthly' } = req.query;\n\n // Get organization summary\n const summary = await SustainabilityMetrics.getOrganizationSummary(\n req.user.organizationId,\n period\n );\n\n // Get recent metrics\n const recentMetrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.find({\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId,\n period\n })\n .sort({ createdAt: -1 })\n .limit(12)\n .lean();\n\n // Calculate trends\n const trends = calculateTrends(recentMetrics);\n\n // Get benchmark data\n const benchmarks = await SustainabilityMetrics.getBenchmarkData(req.user.organizationId);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n summary,\n trends,\n benchmarks,\n recentMetrics: recentMetrics.slice(0, 5)\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get sustainability dashboard error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching sustainability dashboard'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/sustainability/metrics\n// @desc Record sustainability metrics for shipment\n// @access Private\nrouter.post('/metrics', authenticate, [\n body('shipmentId').isMongoId().withMessage('Valid shipment ID required'),\n body('carbonFootprint').optional().isObject().withMessage('Carbon footprint must be an object'),\n body('energyConsumption').optional().isObject().withMessage('Energy consumption must be an object'),\n body('fuelConsumption').optional().isObject().withMessage('Fuel consumption must be an object')\n], invalidateCache(['sustainability:*']), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const errors = validationResult(req);\n if (!errors.isEmpty()) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Validation failed',\n errors: errors.array()\n });\n }\n\n const { shipmentId, ...metricsData } = req.body;\n\n // Verify shipment exists and user has access\n const shipment = await Shipment.findOne({\n _id: shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (!shipment) {\n return res.status(404).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Shipment not found'\n });\n }\n\n // Create or update sustainability metrics\n let metrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.findOne({\n shipmentId,\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n });\n\n if (metrics) {\n Object.assign(metrics, metricsData);\n } else {\n metrics = new SustainabilityMetrics({\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId,\n shipmentId,\n ...metricsData\n });\n }\n\n // Calculate derived metrics\n metrics.calculateCarbonFootprint();\n metrics.calculateESGScore();\n metrics.updateTargetProgress();\n\n await metrics.save();\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'sustainability_metrics_recorded',\n category: 'sustainability',\n entityId: shipmentId,\n entityType: 'shipment',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n shipmentId,\n carbonFootprint: metrics.carbonFootprint.total,\n esgScore: metrics.esgScores.overall,\n energyConsumption: metrics.energyConsumption.total\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.status(201).json({\n success: true,\n data: metrics,\n message: 'Sustainability metrics recorded successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Record sustainability metrics error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error recording sustainability metrics'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/sustainability/carbon-footprint\n// @desc Get carbon footprint analysis\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/carbon-footprint', authenticate, cacheResponse({ ttl: 600 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { startDate, endDate, groupBy = 'month' } = req.query;\n\n const matchStage = { organizationId: req.user.organizationId };\n \n if (startDate || endDate) {\n matchStage.createdAt = {};\n if (startDate) matchStage.createdAt.$gte = new Date(startDate);\n if (endDate) matchStage.createdAt.$lte = new Date(endDate);\n }\n\n const groupStage = {\n _id: groupBy === 'month' \n ? { year: { $year: '$createdAt' }, month: { $month: '$createdAt' } }\n : { year: { $year: '$createdAt' }, week: { $week: '$createdAt' } },\n totalCarbon: { $sum: '$carbonFootprint.total' },\n transportation: { $sum: '$carbonFootprint.transportation' },\n packaging: { $sum: '$carbonFootprint.packaging' },\n warehousing: { $sum: '$carbonFootprint.warehousing' },\n shipmentCount: { $sum: 1 },\n avgCarbonPerShipment: { $avg: '$carbonFootprint.total' }\n };\n\n const carbonData = await SustainabilityMetrics.aggregate([\n { $match: matchStage },\n { $group: groupStage },\n { $sort: { '_id.year': 1, '_id.month': 1, '_id.week': 1 } }\n ]);\n\n // Calculate reduction targets and progress\n const targetAnalysis = await calculateCarbonTargets(req.user.organizationId);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n carbonData,\n targetAnalysis,\n summary: {\n totalEmissions: carbonData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.totalCarbon, 0),\n averagePerShipment: carbonData.length > 0 \n ? carbonData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.avgCarbonPerShipment, 0) / carbonData.length \n : 0,\n breakdown: {\n transportation: carbonData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.transportation, 0),\n packaging: carbonData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.packaging, 0),\n warehousing: carbonData.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.warehousing, 0)\n }\n }\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get carbon footprint error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching carbon footprint data'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/sustainability/esg-report\n// @desc Generate ESG report\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.get('/esg-report', authenticate, authorize('admin'), cacheResponse({ ttl: 3600 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { year = new Date().getFullYear() } = req.query;\n\n const startDate = new Date(year, 0, 1);\n const endDate = new Date(year, 11, 31);\n\n // Get all metrics for the year\n const metrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.find({\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId,\n createdAt: { $gte: startDate, $lte: endDate }\n }).lean();\n\n // Calculate ESG scores\n const esgAnalysis = calculateESGAnalysis(metrics);\n\n // Get certifications and compliance\n const compliance = await getComplianceStatus(req.user.organizationId);\n\n // Generate recommendations\n const recommendations = generateSustainabilityRecommendations(esgAnalysis, compliance);\n\n const report = {\n reportYear: year,\n generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId,\n esgScores: esgAnalysis.scores,\n performance: esgAnalysis.performance,\n compliance,\n recommendations,\n dataPoints: metrics.length,\n reportingStandards: ['GRI', 'SASB', 'TCFD'],\n nextSteps: recommendations.slice(0, 5)\n };\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'esg_report_generated',\n category: 'sustainability',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n reportYear: year,\n esgScore: esgAnalysis.scores.overall,\n dataPoints: metrics.length,\n recommendationCount: recommendations.length\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: report\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Generate ESG report error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error generating ESG report'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route POST /api/sustainability/targets\n// @desc Set sustainability targets\n// @access Private (Admin)\nrouter.post('/targets', authenticate, authorize('admin'), [\n body('carbonReduction').optional().isObject().withMessage('Carbon reduction target must be an object'),\n body('renewableEnergy').optional().isObject().withMessage('Renewable energy target must be an object'),\n body('wasteReduction').optional().isObject().withMessage('Waste reduction target must be an object')\n], invalidateCache(['sustainability:*']), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const errors = validationResult(req);\n if (!errors.isEmpty()) {\n return res.status(400).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Validation failed',\n errors: errors.array()\n });\n }\n\n const { carbonReduction, renewableEnergy, wasteReduction, waterReduction } = req.body;\n\n // Update targets for all future metrics\n const updateData = {};\n if (carbonReduction) updateData['targets.carbonReduction'] = carbonReduction;\n if (renewableEnergy) updateData['targets.renewableEnergy'] = renewableEnergy;\n if (wasteReduction) updateData['targets.wasteReduction'] = wasteReduction;\n if (waterReduction) updateData['targets.waterReduction'] = waterReduction;\n\n await SustainabilityMetrics.updateMany(\n { organizationId: req.user.organizationId },\n { $set: updateData }\n );\n\n // Record analytics\n await Analytics.recordEvent({\n type: 'sustainability_targets_set',\n category: 'sustainability',\n userId: req.user._id,\n data: {\n targets: Object.keys(updateData),\n carbonTarget: carbonReduction?.target,\n renewableTarget: renewableEnergy?.target,\n wasteTarget: wasteReduction?.target\n },\n metadata: { source: 'api' }\n });\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n message: 'Sustainability targets updated successfully'\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Set sustainability targets error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error setting sustainability targets'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/sustainability/benchmarks\n// @desc Get industry benchmarks and comparisons\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/benchmarks', authenticate, cacheResponse({ ttl: 3600 }), async (req, res) => {\n try {\n // Get organization's performance\n const orgMetrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.find({\n organizationId: req.user.organizationId\n }).sort({ createdAt: -1 }).limit(10);\n\n // Get industry benchmarks\n const benchmarks = await SustainabilityMetrics.getBenchmarkData(req.user.organizationId);\n\n // Calculate performance ranking\n const ranking = await calculatePerformanceRanking(req.user.organizationId);\n\n res.json({\n success: true,\n data: {\n organizationMetrics: {\n avgCarbonIntensity: orgMetrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.carbonIntensity, 0) / orgMetrics.length,\n avgEnergyIntensity: orgMetrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.energyEfficiency, 0) / orgMetrics.length,\n avgESGScore: orgMetrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.esgScores.overall, 0) / orgMetrics.length\n },\n industryBenchmarks: benchmarks,\n ranking,\n recommendations: generateBenchmarkRecommendations(orgMetrics, benchmarks)\n }\n });\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Get sustainability benchmarks error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error fetching sustainability benchmarks'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// @route GET /api/sustainability/export\n// @desc Export sustainability data\n// @access Private\nrouter.get('/export', authenticate, async (req, res) => {\n try {\n const { format = 'csv', startDate, endDate } = req.query;\n\n const query = { organizationId: req.user.organizationId };\n if (startDate || endDate) {\n query.createdAt = {};\n if (startDate) query.createdAt.$gte = new Date(startDate);\n if (endDate) query.createdAt.$lte = new Date(endDate);\n }\n\n const metrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.find(query).lean();\n\n let exportData;\n let contentType;\n let filename;\n\n if (format === 'csv') {\n exportData = convertToCSV(metrics);\n contentType = 'text/csv';\n filename = `sustainability-metrics-${Date.now()}.csv`;\n } else {\n exportData = JSON.stringify(metrics, null, 2);\n contentType = 'application/json';\n filename = `sustainability-metrics-${Date.now()}.json`;\n }\n\n res.setHeader('Content-Type', contentType);\n res.setHeader('Content-Disposition', `attachment; filename=\"${filename}\"`);\n res.send(exportData);\n\n } catch (error) {\n console.error('Export sustainability data error:', error);\n res.status(500).json({\n success: false,\n message: 'Error exporting sustainability data'\n });\n }\n});\n\n// Helper functions\nfunction calculateTrends(metrics) {\n if (metrics.length < 2) return {};\n\n const latest = metrics[0];\n const previous = metrics[1];\n\n return {\n carbonFootprint: calculatePercentageChange(previous.carbonFootprint?.total, latest.carbonFootprint?.total),\n energyConsumption: calculatePercentageChange(previous.energyConsumption?.total, latest.energyConsumption?.total),\n esgScore: calculatePercentageChange(previous.esgScores?.overall, latest.esgScores?.overall),\n renewablePercentage: calculatePercentageChange(previous.energyConsumption?.renewablePercentage, latest.energyConsumption?.renewablePercentage)\n };\n}\n\nfunction calculatePercentageChange(oldValue, newValue) {\n if (!oldValue || !newValue) return 0;\n return ((newValue - oldValue) / oldValue) * 100;\n}\n\nasync function calculateCarbonTargets(organizationId) {\n const metrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.findOne({\n organizationId,\n 'targets.carbonReduction.target': { $exists: true }\n }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });\n\n if (!metrics) return null;\n\n const target = metrics.targets.carbonReduction;\n const progress = target.current || 0;\n const timeRemaining = target.deadline ? Math.max(0, new Date(target.deadline) - new Date()) : 0;\n\n return {\n target: target.target,\n current: progress,\n achieved: target.achieved,\n timeRemaining: Math.ceil(timeRemaining / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)), // days\n onTrack: progress >= (target.target * 0.8) // 80% of target\n };\n}\n\nfunction calculateESGAnalysis(metrics) {\n if (metrics.length === 0) return { scores: {}, performance: {} };\n\n const avgScores = {\n environmental: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.esgScores?.environmental || 0), 0) / metrics.length,\n social: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.esgScores?.social || 0), 0) / metrics.length,\n governance: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.esgScores?.governance || 0), 0) / metrics.length,\n overall: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.esgScores?.overall || 0), 0) / metrics.length\n };\n\n return {\n scores: avgScores,\n performance: {\n carbonIntensity: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.carbonFootprint?.total || 0), 0) / metrics.length,\n renewablePercentage: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.energyConsumption?.renewablePercentage || 0), 0) / metrics.length,\n recyclingRate: metrics.reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.wasteGeneration?.recyclingRate || 0), 0) / metrics.length\n }\n };\n}\n\nasync function getComplianceStatus(organizationId) {\n const metrics = await SustainabilityMetrics.findOne({ organizationId }).sort({ createdAt: -1 });\n \n return metrics?.compliance || {\n certifications: [],\n dataResidency: [],\n encryptionStandards: [],\n complianceScore: 0\n };\n}\n\nfunction generateSustainabilityRecommendations(esgAnalysis, compliance) {\n const recommendations = [];\n\n if (esgAnalysis.scores.environmental < 70) {\n recommendations.push({\n category: 'environmental',\n priority: 'high',\n title: 'Improve Environmental Performance',\n description: 'Focus on reducing carbon emissions and increasing renewable energy usage'\n });\n }\n\n if (esgAnalysis.performance.renewablePercentage < 50) {\n recommendations.push({\n category: 'energy',\n priority: 'medium',\n title: 'Increase Renewable Energy',\n description: 'Target 50% renewable energy usage to improve sustainability score'\n });\n }\n\n return recommendations;\n}\n\nasync function calculatePerformanceRanking(organizationId) {\n // Simplified ranking calculation\n return {\n carbonRanking: 'top_25',\n energyRanking: 'top_50',\n wasteRanking: 'top_10'\n };\n}\n\nfunction generateBenchmarkRecommendations(orgMetrics, benchmarks) {\n return [\n {\n title: 'Optimize Transportation Routes',\n impact: 'High',\n description: 'Reduce carbon intensity by 15% through AI-powered route optimization'\n }\n ];\n}\n\nfunction convertToCSV(data) {\n if (data.length === 0) return '';\n\n const headers = Object.keys(data[0]);\n const csvContent = [\n headers.join(','),\n ...data.map(row => headers.map(header => JSON.stringify(row[header] || '')).join(','))\n ].join('\\n');\n\n return csvContent;\n}\n\nmodule.exports = router;"}","mcp_server_name":"","mcp_tool_name":""}},{"id":0,"type":0,"content":"## 7. Sustainability Routes for ESG Tracking

languages with their configurations\nconst SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES = {\n en: {\n name: 'English',\n nativeName: 'English',\n code: 'en-US',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: enUS,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddfa\ud83c\uddf8'\n },\n es: {\n name: 'Spanish',\n nativeName: 'Espa\u00f1ol',\n code: 'es-ES',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: es,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddea\ud83c\uddf8'\n },\n fr: {\n name: 'French',\n nativeName: 'Fran\u00e7ais',\n code: 'fr-FR',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: fr,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddeb\ud83c\uddf7'\n },\n de: {\n name: 'German',\n nativeName: 'Deutsch',\n code: 'de-DE',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: de,\n flag: '\ud83c\udde9\ud83c\uddea'\n },\n ja: {\n name: 'Japanese',\n nativeName: '\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e',\n code: 'ja-JP',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: ja,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddef\ud83c\uddf5'\n },\n zh: {\n name: 'Chinese',\n nativeName: '\u4e2d\u6587',\n code: 'zh-CN',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: zhCN,\n flag: '\ud83c\udde8\ud83c\uddf3'\n },\n ko: {\n name: 'Korean',\n nativeName: '\ud55c\uad6d\uc5b4',\n code: 'ko-KR',\n rtl: false,\n dateLocale: ko,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddf0\ud83c\uddf7'\n },\n ar: {\n name: 'Arabic',\n nativeName: '\u0627\u0644\u0639\u0631\u0628\u064a\u0629',\n code: 'ar-SA',\n rtl: true,\n dateLocale: ar,\n flag: '\ud83c\uddf8\ud83c\udde6'\n }\n};\n\n// Supported currencies\nconst SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES = {\n USD: { symbol: '$', name: 'US Dollar', decimals: 2 },\n EUR: { symbol: '\u20ac', name: 'Euro', decimals: 2 },\n GBP: { symbol: '\u00a3', name: 'British Pound', decimals: 2 },\n JPY: { symbol: '\u00a5', name: 'Japanese Yen', decimals: 0 },\n CNY: { symbol: '\u00a5', name: 'Chinese Yuan', decimals: 2 },\n KRW: { symbol: '\u20a9', name: 'South Korean Won', decimals: 0 },\n CAD: { symbol: 'C$', name: 'Canadian Dollar', decimals: 2 },\n AUD: { symbol: 'A$', name: 'Australian Dollar', decimals: 2 }\n};\n\n// Translation keys and default values\nconst DEFAULT_TRANSLATIONS = {\n en: {\n // Navigation\n 'nav.dashboard': 'Dashboard',\n 'nav.shipments': 'Shipments',\n 'nav.analytics': 'Analytics',\n 'nav.iot': 'IoT Devices',\n 'nav.sustainability': 'Sustainability',\n 'nav.blockchain':
